authors_text: Laura Bussi,Vincenzo Ciancia,Fabio Gadducci
title: A spatial model checker in GPU (extended version)
title_zh: GPU 中的空间模型检查器（扩展版）
abstract: The tool voxlogica merges the state-of-the-art library of computational imaging algorithms ITK with the combination of declarative specification and optimised execution provided by spatial logic model checking. The analysis of an existing benchmark for segmentation of brain tumours via a simple logical specification reached state-of-the-art accuracy. We present a new, GPU-based version of voxlogica and discuss its implementation, scalability, and applications.
summary: The tool voxlogica merges the state-of-the-art library of computational imaging algorithms ITK with the combination of declarative specification and optimised execution provided by spatial logic model checking. The analysis of an existing benchmark for segmentation of brain tumours via a simple logical specification reached state-of-the-art accuracy. We present a new, GPU-based version of voxlogica and discuss its implementation, scalability, and applications.
abstract_zh: voxlogica 工具将最先进的计算成像算法 ITK 库与空间逻辑模型检查提供的声明性规范和优化执行相结合。通过简单的逻辑规范对脑肿瘤分割的现有基准进行的分析达到了最先进的准确性。我们提出了基于 GPU 的新版本 voxlogica 并讨论了它的实现、可扩展性和应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于GPU的空间模型检查工具voxlogica，结合ITK库与空间逻辑模型检查技术，用于提升医学图像分割的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有图像分割方法在处理复杂医学影像时存在效率与精度不足的问题，需通过声明式规范与优化执行结合，利用GPU并行计算能力突破性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 整合ITK计算成像算法库与空间逻辑模型检查框架，开发GPU加速版本voxlogica，通过并行化实现与算法优化提升可扩展性。
AI.result: 在脑肿瘤分割基准测试中达到最先进精度，GPU版本相较传统实现显著提升计算效率与大规模数据处理能力。
AI.conclusion: 验证了GPU加速空间模型检查在医学图像分析中的有效性，为复杂场景下的实时分割应用提供了新方法论与技术路径。

authors_text: Makesh Narsimhan Sreedhar,Kun Ni,Siva Reddy
title: Learning Improvised Chatbots from Adversarial Modifications of Natural Language Feedback
title_zh: 从自然语言反馈的对抗性修改中学习即兴聊天机器人
comment: Accepted for publication at Findings of EMNLP 2020
comments: Accepted for publication at Findings of EMNLP 2020
abstract: The ubiquitous nature of chatbots and their interaction with users generate an enormous amount of data. Can we improve chatbots using this data? A self-feeding chatbot improves itself by asking natural language feedback when a user is dissatisfied with its response and uses this feedback as an additional training sample. However, user feedback in most cases contains extraneous sequences hindering their usefulness as a training sample. In this work, we propose a generative adversarial model that converts noisy feedback into a plausible natural response in a conversation. The generator's goal is to convert the feedback into a response that answers the user's previous utterance and to fool the discriminator which distinguishes feedback from natural responses. We show that augmenting original training data with these modified feedback responses improves the original chatbot performance from 69.94% to 75.96% in ranking correct responses on the Personachat dataset, a large improvement given that the original model is already trained on 131k samples.
summary: The ubiquitous nature of chatbots and their interaction with users generate an enormous amount of data. Can we improve chatbots using this data? A self-feeding chatbot improves itself by asking natural language feedback when a user is dissatisfied with its response and uses this feedback as an additional training sample. However, user feedback in most cases contains extraneous sequences hindering their usefulness as a training sample. In this work, we propose a generative adversarial model that converts noisy feedback into a plausible natural response in a conversation. The generator's goal is to convert the feedback into a response that answers the user's previous utterance and to fool the discriminator which distinguishes feedback from natural responses. We show that augmenting original training data with these modified feedback responses improves the original chatbot performance from 69.94% to 75.96% in ranking correct responses on the Personachat dataset, a large improvement given that the original model is already trained on 131k samples.
abstract_zh: 聊天机器人的普遍性及其与用户的交互产生了大量的数据。我们可以使用这些数据改进聊天机器人吗？当用户对其响应不满意时，自反馈聊天机器人会通过询问自然语言反馈来改进自身，并将此反馈用作额外的训练样本。然而，在大多数情况下，用户反馈包含无关的序列，阻碍了它们作为训练样本的有用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种生成对抗模型，可将嘈杂的反馈转换为对话中合理的自然反应。生成器的目标是将反馈转换为回答用户先前话语的响应，并欺骗区分反馈和自然响应的鉴别器。我们表明，使用这些修改后的反馈响应来增强原始训练数据，在对 Personachat 数据集上的正确响应进行排名时，原始聊天机器人的性能从 69.94% 提高到 75.96%，考虑到原始模型已经在 131k 个样本上进行了训练，这是一个很大的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗生成模型，将用户反馈中的噪声转化为有效训练数据，以提升聊天机器人的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有聊天机器人依赖用户反馈进行训练，但反馈中常包含冗余信息，影响模型效果，需有效方法提取有用信息。
AI.method: 采用生成对抗网络（GAN）框架，生成器将噪声反馈转化为合理回应，判别器区分反馈与自然回复，通过对抗训练优化生成质量。
AI.result: 在Personachat数据集上，模型性能从69.94%提升至75.96%，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 对抗生成方法能有效净化用户反馈数据，显著提升聊天机器人回答准确性，为自优化对话系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Stefan Zwaard,Henk-Jan Boele,Hani Alers,Christos Strydis,Casey Lew-Williams,Zaid Al-Ars
title: Privacy-Preserving Object Detection & Localization Using Distributed Machine Learning: A Case Study of Infant Eyeblink Conditioning
title_zh: 使用分布式机器学习进行隐私保护对象检测和定位：婴儿眨眼条件反射案例研究
comment: This is a preprint version of "Privacy-Preserving Object Detection & Localization Using Distributed Machine Learning: A Case Study of Infant Eyeblink Conditioning". This work consists of 12 pages including refs and, 4 tables and 7 figures
comments: This is a preprint version of "Privacy-Preserving Object Detection & Localization Using Distributed Machine Learning: A Case Study of Infant Eyeblink Conditioning". This work consists of 12 pages including refs and, 4 tables and 7 figures
abstract: Distributed machine learning is becoming a popular model-training method due to privacy, computational scalability, and bandwidth capacities. In this work, we explore scalable distributed-training versions of two algorithms commonly used in object detection. A novel distributed training algorithm using Mean Weight Matrix Aggregation (MWMA) is proposed for Linear Support Vector Machine (L-SVM) object detection based in Histogram of Orientated Gradients (HOG). In addition, a novel Weighted Bin Aggregation (WBA) algorithm is proposed for distributed training of Ensemble of Regression Trees (ERT) landmark localization. Both algorithms do not restrict the location of model aggregation and allow custom architectures for model distribution. For this work, a Pool-Based Local Training and Aggregation (PBLTA) architecture for both algorithms is explored. The application of both algorithms in the medical field is examined using a paradigm from the fields of psychology and neuroscience - eyeblink conditioning with infants - where models need to be trained on facial images while protecting participant privacy. Using distributed learning, models can be trained without sending image data to other nodes. The custom software has been made available for public use on GitHub: https://github.com/SLWZwaard/DMT. Results show that the aggregation of models for the HOG algorithm using MWMA not only preserves the accuracy of the model but also allows for distributed learning with an accuracy increase of 0.9% compared with traditional learning. Furthermore, WBA allows for ERT model aggregation with an accuracy increase of 8% when compared to single-node models.
summary: Distributed machine learning is becoming a popular model-training method due to privacy, computational scalability, and bandwidth capacities. In this work, we explore scalable distributed-training versions of two algorithms commonly used in object detection. A novel distributed training algorithm using Mean Weight Matrix Aggregation (MWMA) is proposed for Linear Support Vector Machine (L-SVM) object detection based in Histogram of Orientated Gradients (HOG). In addition, a novel Weighted Bin Aggregation (WBA) algorithm is proposed for distributed training of Ensemble of Regression Trees (ERT) landmark localization. Both algorithms do not restrict the location of model aggregation and allow custom architectures for model distribution. For this work, a Pool-Based Local Training and Aggregation (PBLTA) architecture for both algorithms is explored. The application of both algorithms in the medical field is examined using a paradigm from the fields of psychology and neuroscience - eyeblink conditioning with infants - where models need to be trained on facial images while protecting participant privacy. Using distributed learning, models can be trained without sending image data to other nodes. The custom software has been made available for public use on GitHub: https://github.com/SLWZwaard/DMT. Results show that the aggregation of models for the HOG algorithm using MWMA not only preserves the accuracy of the model but also allows for distributed learning with an accuracy increase of 0.9% compared with traditional learning. Furthermore, WBA allows for ERT model aggregation with an accuracy increase of 8% when compared to single-node models.
abstract_zh: 由于隐私、计算可扩展性和带宽容量，分布式机器学习正在成为一种流行的模型训练方法。在这项工作中，我们探索了对象检测中常用的两种算法的可扩展分布式训练版本。提出了一种使用平均权重矩阵聚合（MWMA）的新型分布式训练算法，用于基于方向梯度直方图（HOG）的线性支持向量机（L-SVM）目标检测。此外，还提出了一种新颖的加权箱聚合（WBA）算法，用于回归树集成（ERT）地标定位的分布式训练。两种算法都不限制模型聚合的位置，并允许自定义模型分发架构。在这项工作中，探索了两种算法的基于池的本地训练和聚合（PBLTA）架构。使用心理学和神经科学领域的范例（婴儿的眨眼条件反射）来检验这两种算法在医学领域的应用，其中模型需要在面部图像上进行训练，同时保护参与者的隐私。使用分布式学习，无需将图像数据发送到其他节点即可训练模型。该定制软件已在 GitHub 上可供公众使用：https://github.com/SLWZwaard/DMT。结果表明，使用MWMA聚合HOG算法的模型不仅保留了模型的准确性，而且允许分布式学习，与传统学习相比，准确性提高了0.9%。此外，WBA 允许 ERT 模型聚合，与单节点模型相比，准确度提高了 8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种分布式机器学习算法（MWMA和WBA），用于在保护隐私的前提下实现婴儿眼睑条件反射实验中的目标检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域需在保护患者隐私的同时进行模型训练，传统集中式学习存在数据泄露风险，分布式学习可避免图像数据跨节点传输。
AI.method: 基于HOG特征设计MWMA算法优化L-SVM检测模型，采用WBA算法聚合ERT定位模型，通过PBLTA架构实现本地训练与分布式聚合。
AI.result: MWMA使HOG模型准确率提升0.9%，WBA使ERT模型准确率提升8%，验证了分布式训练在隐私保护下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布式算法在保持模型精度的同时满足隐私需求，为医疗场景下的联邦学习提供了可行方案，开源代码已发布。

tldr: 本文提出两种分布式机器学习算法（MWMA和WBA），用于在保护隐私的前提下实现婴儿眼睑条件反射实验中的目标检测与定位。
motivation: 医疗领域需在保护患者隐私的同时进行模型训练，传统集中式学习存在数据泄露风险，分布式学习可避免图像数据跨节点传输。
method: 基于HOG特征设计MWMA算法优化L-SVM检测模型，采用WBA算法聚合ERT定位模型，通过PBLTA架构实现本地训练与分布式聚合。
result: MWMA使HOG模型准确率提升0.9%，WBA使ERT模型准确率提升8%，验证了分布式训练在隐私保护下的有效性。
conclusion: 提出的分布式算法在保持模型精度的同时满足隐私需求，为医疗场景下的联邦学习提供了可行方案，开源代码已发布。
search_text: Privacy-Preserving Object Detection & Localization Using Distributed Machine Learning: A Case Study of Infant Eyeblink Conditioning 使用分布式机器学习进行隐私保护对象检测和定位：婴儿眨眼条件反射案例研究 Distributed machine learning is becoming a popular model-training method due to privacy, computational scalability, and bandwidth capacities. In this work, we explore scalable distributed-training versions of two algorithms commonly used in object detection. A novel distributed training algorithm using Mean Weight Matrix Aggregation (MWMA) is proposed for Linear Support Vector Machine (L-SVM) object detection based in Histogram of Orientated Gradients (HOG). In addition, a novel Weighted Bin Aggregation (WBA) algorithm is proposed for distributed training of Ensemble of Regression Trees (ERT) landmark localization. Both algorithms do not restrict the location of model aggregation and allow custom architectures for model distribution. For this work, a Pool-Based Local Training and Aggregation (PBLTA) architecture for both algorithms is explored. The application of both algorithms in the medical field is examined using a paradigm from the fields of psychology and neuroscience - eyeblink conditioning with infants - where models need to be trained on facial images while protecting participant privacy. Using distributed learning, models can be trained without sending image data to other nodes. The custom software has been made available for public use on GitHub: https://github.com/SLWZwaard/DMT. Results show that the aggregation of models for the HOG algorithm using MWMA not only preserves the accuracy of the model but also allows for distributed learning with an accuracy increase of 0.9% compared with traditional learning. Furthermore, WBA allows for ERT model aggregation with an accuracy increase of 8% when compared to single-node models. 由于隐私、计算可扩展性和带宽容量，分布式机器学习正在成为一种流行的模型训练方法。在这项工作中，我们探索了对象检测中常用的两种算法的可扩展分布式训练版本。提出了一种使用平均权重矩阵聚合（MWMA）的新型分布式训练算法，用于基于方向梯度直方图（HOG）的线性支持向量机（L-SVM）目标检测。此外，还提出了一种新颖的加权箱聚合（WBA）算法，用于回归树集成（ERT）地标定位的分布式训练。两种算法都不限制模型聚合的位置，并允许自定义模型分发架构。在这项工作中，探索了两种算法的基于池的本地训练和聚合（PBLTA）架构。使用心理学和神经科学领域的范例（婴儿的眨眼条件反射）来检验这两种算法在医学领域的应用，其中模型需要在面部图像上进行训练，同时保护参与者的隐私。使用分布式学习，无需将图像数据发送到其他节点即可训练模型。该定制软件已在 GitHub 上可供公众使用：https://github.com/SLWZwaard/DMT。结果表明，使用MWMA聚合HOG算法的模型不仅保留了模型的准确性，而且允许分布式学习，与传统学习相比，准确性提高了0.9%。此外，WBA 允许 ERT 模型聚合，与单节点模型相比，准确度提高了 8%。 本文提出两种分布式机器学习算法（MWMA和WBA），用于在保护隐私的前提下实现婴儿眼睑条件反射实验中的目标检测与定位。 Stefan Zwaard,Henk-Jan Boele,Hani Alers,Christos Strydis,Casey Lew-Williams,Zaid Al-Ars cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Ali Varamesh,Ali Diba,Tinne Tuytelaars,Luc Van Gool
title: Self-Supervised Ranking for Representation Learning
title_zh: 表征学习的自监督排名
abstract: We present a new framework for self-supervised representation learning by formulating it as a ranking problem in an image retrieval context on a large number of random views (augmentations) obtained from images. Our work is based on two intuitions: first, a good representation of images must yield a high-quality image ranking in a retrieval task; second, we would expect random views of an image to be ranked closer to a reference view of that image than random views of other images. Hence, we model representation learning as a learning to rank problem for image retrieval. We train a representation encoder by maximizing average precision (AP) for ranking, where random views of an image are considered positively related, and that of the other images considered negatives. The new framework, dubbed S2R2, enables computing a global objective on multiple views, compared to the local objective in the popular contrastive learning framework, which is calculated on pairs of views. In principle, by using a ranking criterion, we eliminate reliance on object-centric curated datasets. When trained on STL10 and MS-COCO, S2R2 outperforms SimCLR and the clustering-based contrastive learning model, SwAV, while being much simpler both conceptually and at implementation. On MS-COCO, S2R2 outperforms both SwAV and SimCLR with a larger margin than on STl10. This indicates that S2R2 is more effective on diverse scenes and could eliminate the need for an object-centric large training dataset for self-supervised representation learning.
summary: We present a new framework for self-supervised representation learning by formulating it as a ranking problem in an image retrieval context on a large number of random views (augmentations) obtained from images. Our work is based on two intuitions: first, a good representation of images must yield a high-quality image ranking in a retrieval task; second, we would expect random views of an image to be ranked closer to a reference view of that image than random views of other images. Hence, we model representation learning as a learning to rank problem for image retrieval. We train a representation encoder by maximizing average precision (AP) for ranking, where random views of an image are considered positively related, and that of the other images considered negatives. The new framework, dubbed S2R2, enables computing a global objective on multiple views, compared to the local objective in the popular contrastive learning framework, which is calculated on pairs of views. In principle, by using a ranking criterion, we eliminate reliance on object-centric curated datasets. When trained on STL10 and MS-COCO, S2R2 outperforms SimCLR and the clustering-based contrastive learning model, SwAV, while being much simpler both conceptually and at implementation. On MS-COCO, S2R2 outperforms both SwAV and SimCLR with a larger margin than on STl10. This indicates that S2R2 is more effective on diverse scenes and could eliminate the need for an object-centric large training dataset for self-supervised representation learning.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的自监督表示学习框架，通过将其表述为图像检索上下文中从图像获得的大量随机视图（增强）的排名问题。我们的工作基于两个直觉：首先，良好的图像表示必须在检索任务中产生高质量的图像排名；其次，我们期望图像的随机视图比其他图像的随机视图更接近该图像的参考视图。因此，我们将表示学习建模为图像检索的排序问题的学习。我们通过最大化排名的平均精度（AP）来训练表示编码器，其中图像的随机视图被认为是正相关的，而其他图像的随机视图被认为是负相关的。被称为 S2R2 的新框架能够在多个视图上计算全局目标，而流行的对比学习框架中的局部目标是在视图对上计算的。原则上，通过使用排名标准，我们消除了对以对象为中心的精选数据集的依赖。在 STL10 和 MS-COCO 上进行训练时，S2R2 的性能优于 SimCLR 和基于聚类的对比学习模型 SwAV，同时在概念和实现上都更加简单。在 MS-COCO 上，S2R2 的性能优于 SwAV 和 SimCLR，且比 STl10 上的优势更大。这表明 S2R2 在不同场景上更有效，并且可以消除对用于自监督表示学习的以对象为中心的大型训练数据集的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像检索排名问题的自监督表征学习框架S2R2，通过最大化平均精度（AP）来学习图像表示。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习方法依赖局部视图对的对比目标，而本文认为高质量的图像表征应能生成优质检索排名，且同一图像的随机视图应比其他图像的视图更接近参考视图。
AI.method: 将表征学习建模为图像检索的排序问题，通过最大化平均精度（AP）训练编码器，将同一图像的随机视图视为正样本，其他图像视图视为负样本，形成全局目标。
AI.result: 在STL10和MS-COCO数据集上，S2R2在性能上优于SimCLR和SwAV，尤其在MS-COCO上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: S2R2通过排序准则有效提升了表征学习效果，尤其适用于多样化场景，减少了对对象中心化大规模数据集的依赖。

authors_text: Elliot Creager,Jörn-Henrik Jacobsen,Richard Zemel
title: Environment Inference for Invariant Learning
title_zh: 不变学习的环境推理
abstract: Learning models that gracefully handle distribution shifts is central to research on domain generalization, robust optimization, and fairness. A promising formulation is domain-invariant learning, which identifies the key issue of learning which features are domain-specific versus domain-invariant. An important assumption in this area is that the training examples are partitioned into "domains" or "environments". Our focus is on the more common setting where such partitions are not provided. We propose EIIL, a general framework for domain-invariant learning that incorporates Environment Inference to directly infer partitions that are maximally informative for downstream Invariant Learning. We show that EIIL outperforms invariant learning methods on the CMNIST benchmark without using environment labels, and significantly outperforms ERM on worst-group performance in the Waterbirds and CivilComments datasets. Finally, we establish connections between EIIL and algorithmic fairness, which enables EIIL to improve accuracy and calibration in a fair prediction problem.
summary: Learning models that gracefully handle distribution shifts is central to research on domain generalization, robust optimization, and fairness. A promising formulation is domain-invariant learning, which identifies the key issue of learning which features are domain-specific versus domain-invariant. An important assumption in this area is that the training examples are partitioned into "domains" or "environments". Our focus is on the more common setting where such partitions are not provided. We propose EIIL, a general framework for domain-invariant learning that incorporates Environment Inference to directly infer partitions that are maximally informative for downstream Invariant Learning. We show that EIIL outperforms invariant learning methods on the CMNIST benchmark without using environment labels, and significantly outperforms ERM on worst-group performance in the Waterbirds and CivilComments datasets. Finally, we establish connections between EIIL and algorithmic fairness, which enables EIIL to improve accuracy and calibration in a fair prediction problem.
abstract_zh: 优雅地处理分布变化的学习模型是领域泛化、鲁棒优化和公平性研究的核心。一个有前途的公式是领域不变学习，它确定了学习哪些特征是特定于领域的特征与领域不变的特征的关键问题。该领域的一个重要假设是训练示例被划分为“域”或“环境”。我们的重点是不提供此类分区的更常见设置。我们提出了 EIIL，这是一种领域不变学习的通用框架，它结合了环境推理来直接推断为下游不变学习提供最大信息的分区。我们表明，在不使用环境标签的情况下，EIIL 在 CMNIST 基准测试上优于不变学习方法，并且在 Waterbirds 和 CivilComments 数据集中的最差组表现上显着优于 ERM。最后，我们在 EIIL 和算法公平性之间建立了联系，这使得 EIIL 能够提高公平预测问题的准确性和校准。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需环境标签的领域不变学习框架EIIL，通过环境推断提升模型在分布偏移下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域不变学习方法依赖环境标签划分，但实际场景中此类划分常不可用，限制了方法的适用性与性能。
AI.method: 设计EIIL框架，通过环境推断模块直接学习最大化信息量的环境分区，替代传统依赖人工划分的环境标签。
AI.result: 在CMNIST基准上优于其他不变学习方法，在Waterbirds和CivilComments数据集上显著提升最差群体表现，并改善公平性指标。
AI.conclusion: EIIL通过无监督环境推断有效解决领域不变学习问题，为分布偏移场景下的鲁棒建模与公平性优化提供新思路。

We propose EIIL, a general framework for domain-invariant learning that incorporates Environment Inference to directly infer partitions that are maximally informative for downstream Invariant Learning. We show that EIIL outperforms invariant learning methods on the CMNIST benchmark without using environment labels, and significantly outperforms ERM on worst-group performance in the Waterbirds and CivilComments datasets. Finally, we establish connections between EIIL and algorithmic fairness, which enables EIIL to improve accuracy and calibration in a fair prediction problem. 优雅地处理分布变化的学习模型是领域泛化、鲁棒优化和公平性研究的核心。一个有前途的公式是领域不变学习，它确定了学习哪些特征是特定于领域的特征与领域不变的特征的关键问题。该领域的一个重要假设是训练示例被划分为“域”或“环境”。我们的重点是不提供此类分区的更常见设置。我们提出了 EIIL，这是一种领域不变学习的通用框架，它结合了环境推理来直接推断为下游不变学习提供最大信息的分区。我们表明，在不使用环境标签的情况下，EIIL 在 CMNIST 基准测试上优于不变学习方法，并且在 Waterbirds 和 CivilComments 数据集中的最差组表现上显着优于 ERM。最后，我们在 EIIL 和算法公平性之间建立了联系，这使得 EIIL 能够提高公平预测问题的准确性和校准。 提出一种无需环境标签的领域不变学习框架EIIL，通过环境推断提升模型在分布偏移下的性能。 Elliot Creager,Jörn-Henrik Jacobsen,Richard Zemel cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Marina Pominova,Ekaterina Kondrateva,Maxim Sharaev,Alexander Bernstein,Evgeny Burnaev
title: Fader Networks for domain adaptation on fMRI: ABIDE-II study
title_zh: 用于 fMRI 域适应的 Fader Network：ABIDE-II 研究
comment: ef:ICMV2020
comments: ef:ICMV2020
abstract: ABIDE is the largest open-source autism spectrum disorder database with both fMRI data and full phenotype description. These data were extensively studied based on functional connectivity analysis as well as with deep learning on raw data, with top models accuracy close to 75\% for separate scanning sites. Yet there is still a problem of models transferability between different scanning sites within ABIDE. In the current paper, we for the first time perform domain adaptation for brain pathology classification problem on raw neuroimaging data. We use 3D convolutional autoencoders to build the domain irrelevant latent space image representation and demonstrate this method to outperform existing approaches on ABIDE data.
summary: ABIDE is the largest open-source autism spectrum disorder database with both fMRI data and full phenotype description. These data were extensively studied based on functional connectivity analysis as well as with deep learning on raw data, with top models accuracy close to 75\% for separate scanning sites. Yet there is still a problem of models transferability between different scanning sites within ABIDE. In the current paper, we for the first time perform domain adaptation for brain pathology classification problem on raw neuroimaging data. We use 3D convolutional autoencoders to build the domain irrelevant latent space image representation and demonstrate this method to outperform existing approaches on ABIDE data.
abstract_zh: ABIDE 是最大的开源自闭症谱系障碍数据库，包含功能磁共振成像数据和完整的表型描述。这些数据基于功能连接分析以及对原始数据的深度学习进行了广泛研究，对于单独的扫描站点，顶级模型的准确度接近 75%。然而，ABIDE 内不同扫描站点之间的模型可转移性仍然存在问题。在本文中，我们首次对原始神经影像数据进行脑病理分类问题的领域适应。我们使用 3D 卷积自动编码器来构建与域无关的潜在空间图像表示，并证明该方法在 ABIDE 数据上优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文首次在ABIDE-II数据集上应用Fader Networks进行域适应，通过构建与扫描站点无关的潜在空间表示，解决fMRI数据在不同扫描站点间的模型可迁移性问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有模型在单一扫描站点的fMRI数据分类准确率接近75%，但不同站点间的模型迁移能力较差，亟需提升跨站点的泛化性能。
AI.method: 采用3D卷积自编码器构建域无关的潜在空间表示，并通过域适应技术对齐不同扫描站点的数据分布。
AI.result: 该方法在ABIDE数据集上优于现有方法，显著提升了跨扫描站点的脑病理分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 域适应技术能有效增强基于fMRI的脑疾病分类模型在不同扫描站点间的可迁移性，为多中心研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Ekaterina Kondrateva,Marina Pominova,Elena Popova,Maxim Sharaev,Alexander Bernstein,Evgeny Burnaev
title: Domain Shift in Computer Vision models for MRI data analysis: An Overview
title_zh: 用于 MRI 数据分析的计算机视觉模型的领域转变：概述
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure
comments: 8 pages, 1 figure
abstract: Machine learning and computer vision methods are showing good performance in medical imagery analysis. Yetonly a few applications are now in clinical use and one of the reasons for that is poor transferability of themodels to data from different sources or acquisition domains. Development of new methods and algorithms forthe transfer of training and adaptation of the domain in multi-modal medical imaging data is crucial for thedevelopment of accurate models and their use in clinics. In present work, we overview methods used to tackle thedomain shift problem in machine learning and computer vision. The algorithms discussed in this survey includeadvanced data processing, model architecture enhancing and featured training, as well as predicting in domaininvariant latent space. The application of the autoencoding neural networks and their domain-invariant variationsare heavily discussed in a survey. We observe the latest methods applied to the magnetic resonance imaging(MRI) data analysis and conclude on their performance as well as propose directions for further research.
summary: Machine learning and computer vision methods are showing good performance in medical imagery analysis. Yetonly a few applications are now in clinical use and one of the reasons for that is poor transferability of themodels to data from different sources or acquisition domains. Development of new methods and algorithms forthe transfer of training and adaptation of the domain in multi-modal medical imaging data is crucial for thedevelopment of accurate models and their use in clinics. In present work, we overview methods used to tackle thedomain shift problem in machine learning and computer vision. The algorithms discussed in this survey includeadvanced data processing, model architecture enhancing and featured training, as well as predicting in domaininvariant latent space. The application of the autoencoding neural networks and their domain-invariant variationsare heavily discussed in a survey. We observe the latest methods applied to the magnetic resonance imaging(MRI) data analysis and conclude on their performance as well as propose directions for further research.
abstract_zh: 机器学习和计算机视觉方法在医学图像分析中表现出良好的性能。然而，目前只有少数应用程序投入临床使用，其原因之一是模型对来自不同来源或采集领域的数据的可移植性较差。开发用于多模态医学成像数据中的训练转移和领域适应的新方法和算法对于精确模型的开发及其在临床中的使用至关重要。在目前的工作中，我们概述了用于解决机器学习和计算机视觉中的域转移问题的方法。本次调查讨论的算法包括高级数据处理、模型架构增强和特征训练，以及域不变潜在空间中的预测。一项调查广泛讨论了自动编码神经网络的应用及其域不变变化。我们观察应用于磁共振成像（MRI）数据分析的最新方法，对其性能进行总结，并提出进一步研究的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了计算机视觉模型在MRI数据分析中应对领域偏移问题的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习在医学影像分析中表现良好，但模型在不同数据源间的迁移能力不足，限制了临床应用。
AI.method: 通过回顾先进数据处理、模型架构优化、特征训练及领域不变潜在空间预测等方法，重点讨论自编码神经网络及其领域不变变体。
AI.result: 分析了当前MRI领域偏移方法的性能，指出其在多模态医学影像中的应用现状与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究改进模型迁移能力，以推动更准确的医学影像分析模型在临床中的应用。

authors_text: Nikhil Churamani,Pablo Barros,Hatice Gunes,Stefan Wermter
title: Affect-Driven Modelling of Robot Personality for Collaborative Human-Robot Interactions
title_zh: 用于人机协作交互的机器人个性的情感驱动建模
comment: 12 pages, 9 figures; An updated version of this article accepted at Frontiers in Robotics and AI as Affect-Driven Learning of Robot Behaviour for Collaborative Human-Robot Interactions
comments: 12 pages, 9 figures; An updated version of this article accepted at Frontiers in Robotics and AI as Affect-Driven Learning of Robot Behaviour for Collaborative Human-Robot Interactions
abstract: Collaborative interactions require social robots to adapt to the dynamics of human affective behaviour. Yet, current approaches for affective behaviour generation in robots focus on instantaneous perception to generate a one-to-one mapping between observed human expressions and static robot actions. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for personality-driven behaviour generation in social robots. The framework consists of (i) a hybrid neural model for evaluating facial expressions and speech, forming intrinsic affective representations in the robot, (ii) an Affective Core, that employs self-organising neural models to embed robot personality traits like patience and emotional actuation, and (iii) a Reinforcement Learning model that uses the robot's affective appraisal to learn interaction behaviour. For evaluation, we conduct a user study (n = 31) where the NICO robot acts as a proposer in the Ultimatum Game. The effect of robot personality on its negotiation strategy is witnessed by participants, who rank a patient robot with high emotional actuation higher on persistence, while an inert and impatient robot higher on its generosity and altruistic behaviour.
summary: Collaborative interactions require social robots to adapt to the dynamics of human affective behaviour. Yet, current approaches for affective behaviour generation in robots focus on instantaneous perception to generate a one-to-one mapping between observed human expressions and static robot actions. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for personality-driven behaviour generation in social robots. The framework consists of (i) a hybrid neural model for evaluating facial expressions and speech, forming intrinsic affective representations in the robot, (ii) an Affective Core, that employs self-organising neural models to embed robot personality traits like patience and emotional actuation, and (iii) a Reinforcement Learning model that uses the robot's affective appraisal to learn interaction behaviour. For evaluation, we conduct a user study (n = 31) where the NICO robot acts as a proposer in the Ultimatum Game. The effect of robot personality on its negotiation strategy is witnessed by participants, who rank a patient robot with high emotional actuation higher on persistence, while an inert and impatient robot higher on its generosity and altruistic behaviour.
abstract_zh: 协作互动需要社交机器人适应人类情感行为的动态。然而，当前机器人情感行为生成的方法侧重于瞬时感知，以在观察到的人类表情和静态机器人动作之间生成一对一的映射。在本文中，我们提出了一种社交机器人中个性驱动行为生成的新颖框架。该框架包括（i）一个混合神经模型，用于评估面部表情和语音，在机器人中形成内在情感表征；（ii）一个情感核心，它采用自组织神经模型来嵌入机器人的个性特征，如耐心和情绪驱动；（iii）一个强化学习模型，使用机器人的情感评估来学习交互行为。为了进行评估，我们进行了一项用户研究（n = 31），其中 NICO 机器人在最后通牒游戏中充当提议者。参与者见证了机器人个性对其谈判策略的影响，他们对具有高情绪驱动的耐心机器人的持久性评价较高，而惰性和不耐烦的机器人则对其慷慨和利他行为评价较高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于情感驱动的机器人个性建模框架，用于协作式人机交互中动态适应人类情感行为。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人情感行为生成方法仅依赖即时感知生成静态反应，无法适应人类情感动态变化，需通过个性驱动实现更自然的交互。
AI.method: 框架包含三部分：(i) 混合神经网络模型分析面部表情与语音生成情感表征；(ii) 嵌入耐心、情感驱动等个性特征的自组织神经模型；(iii) 基于情感评估的强化学习模型。通过NICO机器人进行31人 Ultimatum Game 用户研究验证。
AI.result: 实验表明：高情感驱动的耐心机器人被评价为更具坚持性，而惰性且急躁机器人被认为更慷慨利他，验证了个性对交互策略的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过个性驱动的情感行为生成有效提升了人机协作的适应性，证明机器人个性特征可显著影响人类对其交互策略的感知。

search_text: Affect-Driven Modelling of Robot Personality for Collaborative Human-Robot Interactions 用于人机协作交互的机器人个性的情感驱动建模 Collaborative interactions require social robots to adapt to the dynamics of human affective behaviour. Yet, current approaches for affective behaviour generation in robots focus on instantaneous perception to generate a one-to-one mapping between observed human expressions and static robot actions. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for personality-driven behaviour generation in social robots. The framework consists of (i) a hybrid neural model for evaluating facial expressions and speech, forming intrinsic affective representations in the robot, (ii) an Affective Core, that employs self-organising neural models to embed robot personality traits like patience and emotional actuation, and (iii) a Reinforcement Learning model that uses the robot's affective appraisal to learn interaction behaviour. For evaluation, we conduct a user study (n = 31) where the NICO robot acts as a proposer in the Ultimatum Game. The effect of robot personality on its negotiation strategy is witnessed by participants, who rank a patient robot with high emotional actuation higher on persistence, while an inert and impatient robot higher on its generosity and altruistic behaviour. 协作互动需要社交机器人适应人类情感行为的动态。然而，当前机器人情感行为生成的方法侧重于瞬时感知，以在观察到的人类表情和静态机器人动作之间生成一对一的映射。在本文中，我们提出了一种社交机器人中个性驱动行为生成的新颖框架。该框架包括（i）一个混合神经模型，用于评估面部表情和语音，在机器人中形成内在情感表征；（ii）一个情感核心，它采用自组织神经模型来嵌入机器人的个性特征，如耐心和情绪驱动；（iii）一个强化学习模型，使用机器人的情感评估来学习交互行为。为了进行评估，我们进行了一项用户研究（n = 31），其中 NICO 机器人在最后通牒游戏中充当提议者。参与者见证了机器人个性对其谈判策略的影响，他们对具有高情绪驱动的耐心机器人的持久性评价较高，而惰性和不耐烦的机器人则对其慷慨和利他行为评价较高。 本文提出一种基于情感驱动的机器人个性建模框架，用于协作式人机交互中动态适应人类情感行为。 Nikhil Churamani,Pablo Barros,Hatice Gunes,Stefan Wermter cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Vinicius M. de Pinho,Marcello L. R. de Campos,Luis Uzeda Garcia,Dalia Popescu
title: Vision-Aided Radio: User Identity Match in Radio and Video Domains Using Machine Learning
title_zh: 视觉辅助广播：使用机器学习在广播和视频领域进行用户身份匹配
comment: Accepted for publication in the IEEE Access
comments: Accepted for publication in the IEEE Access
abstract: 5G is designed to be an essential enabler and a leading infrastructure provider in the communication technology industry by supporting the demand for the growing data traffic and a variety of services with distinct requirements. The use of deep learning and computer vision tools has the means to increase the environmental awareness of the network with information from visual data. Information extracted via computer vision tools such as user position, movement direction, and speed can be promptly available for the network. However, the network must have a mechanism to match the identity of a user in both visual and radio systems. This mechanism is absent in the present literature. Therefore, we propose a framework to match the information from both visual and radio domains. This is an essential step to practical applications of computer vision tools in communications. We detail the proposed framework training and deployment phases for a presented setup. We carried out practical experiments using data collected in different types of environments. The work compares the use of Deep Neural Network and Random Forest classifiers and shows that the former performed better across all experiments, achieving classification accuracy greater than 99%.
summary: 5G is designed to be an essential enabler and a leading infrastructure provider in the communication technology industry by supporting the demand for the growing data traffic and a variety of services with distinct requirements. The use of deep learning and computer vision tools has the means to increase the environmental awareness of the network with information from visual data. Information extracted via computer vision tools such as user position, movement direction, and speed can be promptly available for the network. However, the network must have a mechanism to match the identity of a user in both visual and radio systems. This mechanism is absent in the present literature. Therefore, we propose a framework to match the information from both visual and radio domains. This is an essential step to practical applications of computer vision tools in communications. We detail the proposed framework training and deployment phases for a presented setup. We carried out practical experiments using data collected in different types of environments. The work compares the use of Deep Neural Network and Random Forest classifiers and shows that the former performed better across all experiments, achieving classification accuracy greater than 99%.
abstract_zh: 5G旨在通过支持不断增长的数据流量和具有不同要求的各种服务的需求，成为通信技术行业的重要推动者和领先的基础设施提供商。深度学习和计算机视觉工具的使用可以通过视觉数据中的信息来提高网络的环境意识。通过计算机视觉工具提取的信息，例如用户位置、移动方向和速度，可以立即供网络使用。然而，网络必须有一种机制来匹配视觉和无线电系统中用户的身份。目前的文献中不存在这种机制。因此，我们提出了一个框架来匹配来自视觉和无线电领域的信息。这是计算机视觉工具在通信领域实际应用的重要一步。我们详细介绍了所提出的设置的框架培训和部署阶段。我们利用在不同类型环境中收集的数据进行了实际实验。该工作比较了深度神经网络和随机森林分类器的使用，并表明前者在所有实验中表现更好，分类准确率高于 99%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的框架，用于在无线电和视频领域中匹配用户身份。
AI.motivation: 5G网络需要支持多样化服务，但现有研究缺乏将视觉数据与无线电系统用户身份匹配的机制，阻碍了计算机视觉在通信中的应用。
AI.method: 设计包含训练和部署阶段的框架，结合深度学习与随机森林分类器，利用视觉数据（如位置、移动方向）与无线电数据进行身份匹配。
AI.result: 实验表明，深度神经网络分类器在不同环境中均实现超过99%的分类准确率，优于随机森林方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了跨领域身份匹配问题，验证了深度学习在通信场景中的优越性，为5G视觉增强应用奠定基础。

authors_text: Xinyu Yang,Majid Mirmehdi,Tilo Burghardt
title: Back to the Future: Cycle Encoding Prediction for Self-supervised Contrastive Video Representation Learning
title_zh: 回到未来：自监督对比视频表示学习的循环编码预测
comment: accepted at BMVC
comments: accepted at BMVC
abstract: In this paper we show that learning video feature spaces in which temporal cycles are maximally predictable benefits action classification. In particular, we propose a novel learning approach termed Cycle Encoding Prediction (CEP) that is able to effectively represent high-level spatio-temporal structure of unlabelled video content. CEP builds a latent space wherein the concept of closed forward-backward as well as backward-forward temporal loops is approximately preserved. As a self-supervision signal, CEP leverages the bi-directional temporal coherence of the video stream and applies loss functions that encourage both temporal cycle closure as well as contrastive feature separation. Architecturally, the underpinning network structure utilises a single feature encoder for all video snippets, adding two predictive modules that learn temporal forward and backward transitions. We apply our framework for pretext training of networks for action recognition tasks. We report significantly improved results for the standard datasets UCF101 and HMDB51. Detailed ablation studies support the effectiveness of the proposed components. We publish source code for the CEP components in full with this paper.
summary: In this paper we show that learning video feature spaces in which temporal cycles are maximally predictable benefits action classification. In particular, we propose a novel learning approach termed Cycle Encoding Prediction (CEP) that is able to effectively represent high-level spatio-temporal structure of unlabelled video content. CEP builds a latent space wherein the concept of closed forward-backward as well as backward-forward temporal loops is approximately preserved. As a self-supervision signal, CEP leverages the bi-directional temporal coherence of the video stream and applies loss functions that encourage both temporal cycle closure as well as contrastive feature separation. Architecturally, the underpinning network structure utilises a single feature encoder for all video snippets, adding two predictive modules that learn temporal forward and backward transitions. We apply our framework for pretext training of networks for action recognition tasks. We report significantly improved results for the standard datasets UCF101 and HMDB51. Detailed ablation studies support the effectiveness of the proposed components. We publish source code for the CEP components in full with this paper.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们表明学习时间周期最大程度可预测的视频特征空间有利于动作分类。特别是，我们提出了一种称为循环编码预测（CEP）的新颖学习方法，它能够有效地表示未标记视频内容的高级时空结构。 CEP 构建了一个潜在空间，其中近似保留了封闭的前向-后向以及后向-前向时间循环的概念。作为一种自我监督信号，CEP 利用视频流的双向时间相干性，并应用损失函数来鼓励时间循环闭合以及对比特征分离。在架构上，基础网络结构对所有视频片段使用单个特征编码器，添加两个学习时间向前和向后转换的预测模块。我们将我们的框架应用于动作识别任务的网络借口训练。我们报告了标准数据集 UCF101 和 HMDB51 的显着改进结果。详细的消融研究支持所提出的组件的有效性。我们随本文发布了 CEP 组件的完整源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Cycle Encoding Prediction（CEP）的自监督对比视频表示学习方法，通过最大化时间循环预测性来提升动作分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频表示学习方法未能充分挖掘时间循环的可预测性，而时间循环结构对理解视频中的动作语义具有重要意义。
AI.method: 构建包含前向-后向和后向-前向时间循环的潜在空间，利用双向时间一致性作为自监督信号，设计包含单特征编码器和两个时序预测模块的网络架构，结合循环闭合损失与对比分离损失进行训练。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上取得显著优于现有方法的性能，消融实验证明各组件有效性，并开源了完整代码实现。
AI.conclusion: CEP通过建模时间循环结构有效提升了视频表示学习效果，为自监督视频理解提供了新思路和可行方案。

Architecturally, the underpinning network structure utilises a single feature encoder for all video snippets, adding two predictive modules that learn temporal forward and backward transitions. We apply our framework for pretext training of networks for action recognition tasks. We report significantly improved results for the standard datasets UCF101 and HMDB51. Detailed ablation studies support the effectiveness of the proposed components. We publish source code for the CEP components in full with this paper. 在本文中，我们表明学习时间周期最大程度可预测的视频特征空间有利于动作分类。特别是，我们提出了一种称为循环编码预测（CEP）的新颖学习方法，它能够有效地表示未标记视频内容的高级时空结构。 CEP 构建了一个潜在空间，其中近似保留了封闭的前向-后向以及后向-前向时间循环的概念。作为一种自我监督信号，CEP 利用视频流的双向时间相干性，并应用损失函数来鼓励时间循环闭合以及对比特征分离。在架构上，基础网络结构对所有视频片段使用单个特征编码器，添加两个学习时间向前和向后转换的预测模块。我们将我们的框架应用于动作识别任务的网络借口训练。我们报告了标准数据集 UCF101 和 HMDB51 的显着改进结果。详细的消融研究支持所提出的组件的有效性。我们随本文发布了 CEP 组件的完整源代码。 本文提出一种名为Cycle Encoding Prediction（CEP）的自监督对比视频表示学习方法，通过最大化时间循环预测性来提升动作分类性能。 Xinyu Yang,Majid Mirmehdi,Tilo Burghardt cs.CV

authors_text: Dinghao Yang,Wei Gao
title: PointManifold: Using Manifold Learning for Point Cloud Classification
title_zh: PointManifold：使用流形学习进行点云分类
abstract: In this paper, we propose a point cloud classification method based on graph neural network and manifold learning. Different from the conventional point cloud analysis methods, this paper uses manifold learning algorithms to embed point cloud features for better considering the geometric continuity on the surface. Then, the nature of point cloud can be acquired in low dimensional space, and after being concatenated with features in the original three-dimensional (3D)space, both the capability of feature representation and the classification network performance can be improved. We pro-pose two manifold learning modules, where one is based on locally linear embedding algorithm, and the other is a non-linear projection method based on neural network architecture. Both of them can obtain better performances than the state-of-the-art baseline. Afterwards, the graph model is constructed by using the k nearest neighbors algorithm, where the edge features are effectively aggregated for the implementation of point cloud classification. Experiments show that the proposed point cloud classification methods obtain the mean class accuracy (mA) of 90.2% and the overall accuracy (oA)of 93.2%, which reach competitive performances compared with the existing state-of-the-art related methods.
summary: In this paper, we propose a point cloud classification method based on graph neural network and manifold learning. Different from the conventional point cloud analysis methods, this paper uses manifold learning algorithms to embed point cloud features for better considering the geometric continuity on the surface. Then, the nature of point cloud can be acquired in low dimensional space, and after being concatenated with features in the original three-dimensional (3D)space, both the capability of feature representation and the classification network performance can be improved. We pro-pose two manifold learning modules, where one is based on locally linear embedding algorithm, and the other is a non-linear projection method based on neural network architecture. Both of them can obtain better performances than the state-of-the-art baseline. Afterwards, the graph model is constructed by using the k nearest neighbors algorithm, where the edge features are effectively aggregated for the implementation of point cloud classification. Experiments show that the proposed point cloud classification methods obtain the mean class accuracy (mA) of 90.2% and the overall accuracy (oA)of 93.2%, which reach competitive performances compared with the existing state-of-the-art related methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于图神经网络和流形学习的点云分类方法。与传统的点云分析方法不同，本文采用流形学习算法嵌入点云特征，以更好地考虑表面的几何连续性。然后，可以在低维空间中获取点云的性质，并与原始三维（3D）空间中的特征连接后，可以提高特征表示能力和分类网络性能。我们提出了两种流形学习模块，其中一种是基于局部线性嵌入算法，另一种是基于神经网络架构的非线性投影方法。它们都可以获得比最先进的基线更好的性能。然后，利用k近邻算法构建图模型，有效聚合边缘特征以实现点云分类。实验表明，所提出的点云分类方法获得了90.2%的平均类精度（mA）和93.2%的总体精度（oA），与现有最先进的相关方法相比，达到了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合图神经网络和流形学习的点云分类方法
AI.motivation: 传统点云分析方法未充分考虑表面几何连续性，通过流形学习可提升特征表示能力与分类性能
AI.method: 设计两种流形学习模块（局部线性嵌入与神经网络非线性投影），结合原始3D特征构建图模型并聚合边特征
AI.result: 在实验中达到90.2%的平均类别准确率和93.2%的总体准确率，优于现有先进方法
AI.conclusion: 流形学习与图神经网络结合有效提升了点云分类性能，验证了方法的竞争力

authors_text: Shazia Afzal,Rajmohan C,Manish Kesarwani,Sameep Mehta,Hima Patel
title: Data Readiness Report
title_zh: 数据准备报告
abstract: Data exploration and quality analysis is an important yet tedious process in the AI pipeline. Current practices of data cleaning and data readiness assessment for machine learning tasks are mostly conducted in an arbitrary manner which limits their reuse and results in loss of productivity. We introduce the concept of a Data Readiness Report as an accompanying documentation to a dataset that allows data consumers to get detailed insights into the quality of input data. Data characteristics and challenges on various quality dimensions are identified and documented keeping in mind the principles of transparency and explainability. The Data Readiness Report also serves as a record of all data assessment operations including applied transformations. This provides a detailed lineage for the purpose of data governance and management. In effect, the report captures and documents the actions taken by various personas in a data readiness and assessment workflow. Overtime this becomes a repository of best practices and can potentially drive a recommendation system for building automated data readiness workflows on the lines of AutoML [8]. We anticipate that together with the Datasheets [9], Dataset Nutrition Label [11], FactSheets [1] and Model Cards [15], the Data Readiness Report makes significant progress towards Data and AI lifecycle documentation.
summary: Data exploration and quality analysis is an important yet tedious process in the AI pipeline. Current practices of data cleaning and data readiness assessment for machine learning tasks are mostly conducted in an arbitrary manner which limits their reuse and results in loss of productivity. We introduce the concept of a Data Readiness Report as an accompanying documentation to a dataset that allows data consumers to get detailed insights into the quality of input data. Data characteristics and challenges on various quality dimensions are identified and documented keeping in mind the principles of transparency and explainability. The Data Readiness Report also serves as a record of all data assessment operations including applied transformations. This provides a detailed lineage for the purpose of data governance and management. In effect, the report captures and documents the actions taken by various personas in a data readiness and assessment workflow. Overtime this becomes a repository of best practices and can potentially drive a recommendation system for building automated data readiness workflows on the lines of AutoML [8]. We anticipate that together with the Datasheets [9], Dataset Nutrition Label [11], FactSheets [1] and Model Cards [15], the Data Readiness Report makes significant progress towards Data and AI lifecycle documentation.
abstract_zh: 数据探索和质量分析是人工智能管道中一个重要但乏味的过程。当前机器学习任务的数据清理和数据就绪评估的实践大多以任意方式进行，这限制了它们的重用并导致生产力损失。我们引入了数据就绪报告的概念，作为数据集的随附文档，使数据消费者能够详细了解输入数据的质量。确定并记录各种质量维度的数据特征和挑战，同时牢记透明度和可解释性原则。数据就绪报告还充当所有数据评估操作（包括应用的转换）的记录。这为数据治理和管理的目的提供了详细的沿袭。实际上，该报告捕获并记录了数据准备和评估工作流程中各种角色所采取的操作。随着时间的推移，这将成为最佳实践的存储库，并有可能推动推荐系统在 AutoML 上构建自动化数据准备工作流程 [8]。我们预计，数据就绪报告与数据表 [9]、数据集营养标签 [11]、情况说明书 [1] 和模型卡 [15] 一起，在数据和人工智能生命周期文档方面取得重大进展。

AI.tldr: 提出数据准备报告，作为数据集的配套文档，评估数据质量并记录处理过程，以提高数据治理和复用性。
AI.motivation: 当前数据清洗和准备方法缺乏系统性，导致数据复用困难和生产力损失，需通过文档化提高透明度和可追溯性。
AI.method: 通过引入数据准备报告，系统记录数据质量分析、处理操作及各角色行动，形成可追溯的数据治理文档。
AI.result: 生成详细的数据质量报告，记录数据处理血缘，为自动化数据准备流程提供基础，并与其他文档共同完善AI生命周期管理。
AI.conclusion: 数据准备报告与现有文档结合，推动数据和AI生命周期的透明化和系统化管理，提升数据治理效率。

authors_text: Paul Brown,Trevor Fenner
title: Fast Generation of Unlabelled Free Trees using Weight Sequences
title_zh: 使用权重序列快速生成未标记的自由树
comment: 21 pages, 1 table and 8 figures
comments: 21 pages, 1 table and 8 figures
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new representation for ordered trees, the weight sequence representation. We then use this to construct new representations for both rooted trees and free trees, namely the canonical weight sequence representation. We construct algorithms for generating the weight sequence representations for all rooted and free trees of order n, and then add a number of modifications to improve the efficiency of the algorithms. Python implementations of the algorithms incorporate further improvements by using generators to avoid having to store the long lists of trees returned by the recursive calls, as well as caching the lists for rooted trees of small order, thereby eliminating many of the recursive calls. We further show how the algorithm can be modifed to generate adjacency list and adjacency matrix representations for free trees. We compared the run-times of our Python implementation for generating free trees with the Python implementation of the well-known WROM algorithm taken from NetworkX. The implementation of our algorithm is over four times as fast as the implementation of the WROM algorithm. The run-times for generating adjacency lists and matrices are somewhat longer than those for weight sequences, but are still over three times as fast as the corresponding implementations of the WROM algorithm.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new representation for ordered trees, the weight sequence representation. We then use this to construct new representations for both rooted trees and free trees, namely the canonical weight sequence representation. We construct algorithms for generating the weight sequence representations for all rooted and free trees of order n, and then add a number of modifications to improve the efficiency of the algorithms. Python implementations of the algorithms incorporate further improvements by using generators to avoid having to store the long lists of trees returned by the recursive calls, as well as caching the lists for rooted trees of small order, thereby eliminating many of the recursive calls. We further show how the algorithm can be modifed to generate adjacency list and adjacency matrix representations for free trees. We compared the run-times of our Python implementation for generating free trees with the Python implementation of the well-known WROM algorithm taken from NetworkX. The implementation of our algorithm is over four times as fast as the implementation of the WROM algorithm. The run-times for generating adjacency lists and matrices are somewhat longer than those for weight sequences, but are still over three times as fast as the corresponding implementations of the WROM algorithm.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们引入了有序树的一种新表示形式，即权重序列表示形式。然后，我们用它来构建有根树和自由树的新表示，即规范权重序列表示。我们构建了生成所有 n 阶有根树和自由树的权重序列表示的算法，然后添加了一些修改以提高算法的效率。该算法的 Python 实现通过使用生成器来进一步改进，以避免存储递归调用返回的长树列表，以及缓存小阶有根树的列表，从而消除许多递归调用。我们进一步展示了如何修改算法来生成自由树的邻接列表和邻接矩阵表示。我们将生成自由树的 Python 实现的运行时间与取自 NetworkX 的著名 WROM 算法的 Python 实现进行了比较。我们的算法的执行速度是 WROM 算法的执行速度的四倍多。生成邻接表和矩阵的运行时间比权重序列的运行时间稍长，但仍然比 WROM 算法的相应实现快三倍以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于权重序列表示法，高效生成无标记自由树的新算法，并优化实现以提升计算速度。
AI.motivation: 传统生成无标记自由树的算法效率较低，难以应对大规模树结构的生成需求，需寻找更高效的表示与生成方法。
AI.method: 引入权重序列表示法构建根树与自由树的规范表示，设计递归算法并优化为生成器形式，结合缓存机制减少重复计算，同时支持转换为邻接矩阵等结构。
AI.result: Python实现的算法生成自由树速度较WROM算法提升4倍，邻接结构生成速度仍保持3倍以上优势。
AI.conclusion: 权重序列表示法显著提升了无标记自由树的生成效率，为大规模树结构分析提供了更优解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于权重序列表示法，高效生成无标记自由树的新算法，并优化实现以提升计算速度。
ai_content.motivation: 传统生成无标记自由树的算法效率较低，难以应对大规模树结构的生成需求，需寻找更高效的表示与生成方法。
ai_content.method: 引入权重序列表示法构建根树与自由树的规范表示，设计递归算法并优化为生成器形式，结合缓存机制减少重复计算，同时支持转换为邻接矩阵等结构。
ai_content.result: Python实现的算法生成自由树速度较WROM算法提升4倍，邻接结构生成速度仍保持3倍以上优势。
ai_content.conclusion: 权重序列表示法显著提升了无标记自由树的生成效率，为大规模树结构分析提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: Fast Generation of Unlabelled Free Trees using Weight Sequences 使用权重序列快速生成未标记的自由树 In this paper, we introduce a new representation for ordered trees, the weight sequence representation. We then use this to construct new representations for both rooted trees and free trees, namely the canonical weight sequence representation. We construct algorithms for generating the weight sequence representations for all rooted and free trees of order n, and then add a number of modifications to improve the efficiency of the algorithms. Python implementations of the algorithms incorporate further improvements by using generators to avoid having to store the long lists of trees returned by the recursive calls, as well as caching the lists for rooted trees of small order, thereby eliminating many of the recursive calls. We further show how the algorithm can be modifed to generate adjacency list and adjacency matrix representations for free trees. We compared the run-times of our Python implementation for generating free trees with the Python implementation of the well-known WROM algorithm taken from NetworkX. The implementation of our algorithm is over four times as fast as the implementation of the WROM algorithm. The run-times for generating adjacency lists and matrices are somewhat longer than those for weight sequences, but are still over three times as fast as the corresponding implementations of the WROM algorithm. 在本文中，我们引入了有序树的一种新表示形式，即权重序列表示形式。然后，我们用它来构建有根树和自由树的新表示，即规范权重序列表示。我们构建了生成所有 n 阶有根树和自由树的权重序列表示的算法，然后添加了一些修改以提高算法的效率。该算法的 Python 实现通过使用生成器来进一步改进，以避免存储递归调用返回的长树列表，以及缓存小阶有根树的列表，从而消除许多递归调用。我们进一步展示了如何修改算法来生成自由树的邻接列表和邻接矩阵表示。我们将生成自由树的 Python 实现的运行时间与取自 NetworkX 的著名 WROM 算法的 Python 实现进行了比较。我们的算法的执行速度是 WROM 算法的执行速度的四倍多。生成邻接表和矩阵的运行时间比权重序列的运行时间稍长，但仍然比 WROM 算法的相应实现快三倍以上。 本文提出基于权重序列表示法，高效生成无标记自由树的新算法，并优化实现以提升计算速度。 Paul Brown,Trevor Fenner cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Yiding Yang,Jiayan Qiu,Mingli Song,Dacheng Tao,Xinchao Wang
title: Learning Propagation Rules for Attribution Map Generation
title_zh: 学习归因图生成的传播规则
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2020
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2020
abstract: Prior gradient-based attribution-map methods rely on handcrafted propagation rules for the non-linear/activation layers during the backward pass, so as to produce gradients of the input and then the attribution map. Despite the promising results achieved, such methods are sensitive to the non-informative high-frequency components and lack adaptability for various models and samples. In this paper, we propose a dedicated method to generate attribution maps that allow us to learn the propagation rules automatically, overcoming the flaws of the handcrafted ones. Specifically, we introduce a learnable plugin module, which enables adaptive propagation rules for each pixel, to the non-linear layers during the backward pass for mask generating. The masked input image is then fed into the model again to obtain new output that can be used as a guidance when combined with the original one. The introduced learnable module can be trained under any auto-grad framework with higher-order differential support. As demonstrated on five datasets and six network architectures, the proposed method yields state-of-the-art results and gives cleaner and more visually plausible attribution maps.
summary: Prior gradient-based attribution-map methods rely on handcrafted propagation rules for the non-linear/activation layers during the backward pass, so as to produce gradients of the input and then the attribution map. Despite the promising results achieved, such methods are sensitive to the non-informative high-frequency components and lack adaptability for various models and samples. In this paper, we propose a dedicated method to generate attribution maps that allow us to learn the propagation rules automatically, overcoming the flaws of the handcrafted ones. Specifically, we introduce a learnable plugin module, which enables adaptive propagation rules for each pixel, to the non-linear layers during the backward pass for mask generating. The masked input image is then fed into the model again to obtain new output that can be used as a guidance when combined with the original one. The introduced learnable module can be trained under any auto-grad framework with higher-order differential support. As demonstrated on five datasets and six network architectures, the proposed method yields state-of-the-art results and gives cleaner and more visually plausible attribution maps.
abstract_zh: 先前基于梯度的归因图方法依赖于向后传递期间非线性/激活层的手工传播规则，以便产生输入的梯度，然后产生归因图。尽管取得了有希望的结果，但此类方法对非信息性高频成分敏感，并且缺乏对各种模型和样本的适应性。在本文中，我们提出了一种生成归因图的专用方法，该方法使我们能够自动学习传播规则，克服了手工绘制的缺陷。具体来说，我们引入了一个可学习的插件模块，它可以在掩码生成的反向传递过程中为每个像素启用自适应传播规则到非线性层。然后，将屏蔽后的输入图像再次输入到模型中，以获得新的输出，该输出可在与原始输出结合时用作指导。引入的可学习模块可以在任何具有高阶差分支持的自动分级框架下进行训练。正如五个数据集和六个网络架构所证明的那样，所提出的方法产生了最先进的结果，并给出了更清晰、更直观的归因图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动学习传播规则的方法，用于生成更准确和清晰的归因图。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的归因图方法依赖手工设计的传播规则，存在对非信息高频成分敏感且缺乏模型与样本适应性的缺陷。
AI.method: 引入可学习的插件模块，在反向传播中为每个像素自适应生成传播规则，结合原始输出与新生成的掩码输入优化归因图。
AI.result: 在五个数据集和六个网络架构上达到SOTA性能，生成更干净且视觉合理的归因图。
AI.conclusion: 通过自动学习传播规则，有效克服手工规则的局限性，显著提升归因图的质量与适应性。

authors_text: Chao Ying Qin,Marios Constantinides,Luca Maria Aiello,Daniele Quercia
title: HeartBees: Visualizing Crowd Affects
title_zh: HeartBees：可视化人群影响
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables
abstract: Affective sharing within groups strengthens coordination and empathy, leads to better health outcomes, and increases productivity and performance. Existing tools for affective sharing face one main challenge: creating a representation of collective emotional states that is relatable and universally accessible. To overcome this challenge, we propose HeartBees, a bio-feedback system for visualizing collective emotional states, which maps a multi-dimensional emotion model into a metaphorical visualization of flocks of birds. Grounded on Affective Computing literature and physiological sensing, we mapped physiological indicators that could be obtained from wearable devices into a multi-dimensional emotion model, which, in turn, our HeartBees can make use of. We evaluated our nature-inspired interactive system with 353 online participants, whose responses showed good consensus in the way they subjectively perceived the visualizations. Last, we discuss practical applications of HeartBees.
summary: Affective sharing within groups strengthens coordination and empathy, leads to better health outcomes, and increases productivity and performance. Existing tools for affective sharing face one main challenge: creating a representation of collective emotional states that is relatable and universally accessible. Grounded on Affective Computing literature and physiological sensing, we mapped physiological indicators that could be obtained from wearable devices into a multi-dimensional emotion model, which, in turn, our HeartBees can make use of. We evaluated our nature-inspired interactive system with 353 online participants, whose responses showed good consensus in the way they subjectively perceived the visualizations. Last, we discuss practical applications of HeartBees.
abstract_zh: 团体内的情感分享可以加强协调和同理心，带来更好的健康结果，并提高生产力和绩效。现有的情感共享工具面临着一个主要挑战：创建一种具有相关性且普遍可访问的集体情感状态的表示。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了 HeartBees，这是一种用于可视化集体情绪状态的生物反馈系统，它将多维情绪模型映射到鸟群的隐喻可视化中。基于情感计算文献和生理传感，我们将可从可穿戴设备获取的生理指标映射到多维情感模型中，而我们的 HeartBees 又可以利用该模型。我们与 353 名在线参与者一起评估了我们的受自然启发的交互系统，他们的回答在他们主观感知可视化的方式上表现出了良好的共识。最后，我们讨论 HeartBees 的实际应用。

AI.tldr: 开发名为HeartBees的生物反馈系统，通过鸟群隐喻可视化群体情感状态。
AI.motivation: 现有情感共享工具难以创建既具关联性又普适的集体情感表示，需创新解决方案增强群体协调与同理心。
AI.method: 基于情感计算与生理传感技术，将可穿戴设备获取的生理指标映射至多维情绪模型，并转化为鸟群动态可视化隐喻。
AI.result: 353名在线参与者评估显示，主观感知对可视化结果具高度共识。
AI.conclusion: HeartBees系统有效呈现集体情感状态，具备提升健康、协作与生产力的实践应用价值。

authors_text: Clément Moulin-Frier,Jules Brochard,Freek Stulp,Pierre-Yves Oudeyer
title: Emergent Jaw Predominance in Vocal Development through Stochastic Optimization
title_zh: 通过随机优化在声音发展中突现下颌优势
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Cognitive and Developmental Systems (Volume: 12 , Issue: 3 , Sept. 2020)
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Cognitive and Developmental Systems (Volume: 12 , Issue: 3 , Sept. 2020)
abstract: Infant vocal babbling strongly relies on jaw oscillations, especially at the stage of canonical babbling, which underlies the syllabic structure of world languages. In this paper, we propose, model and analyze an hypothesis to explain this predominance of the jaw in early babbling. This hypothesis states that general stochastic optimization principles, when applied to learning sensorimotor control, automatically generate ordered babbling stages with a predominant exploration of jaw movements in early stages. The reason is that those movements impact the auditory effects more than other articulators. In previous computational models, such general principles were shown to selectively freeze and free degrees of freedom in a model reproducing the proximo-distal development observed in infant arm reaching. The contribution of this paper is to show how, using the same methods, we are able to explain such patterns in vocal development. We present three experiments. The two first ones show that the recruitment order of articulators emerging from stochastic optimization depends on the target sound to be achieved but that on average the jaw is largely chosen as the first recruited articulator. The third experiment analyses in more detail how the emerging recruitment order is shaped by the dynamics of the optimization process.
summary: Infant vocal babbling strongly relies on jaw oscillations, especially at the stage of canonical babbling, which underlies the syllabic structure of world languages. In this paper, we propose, model and analyze an hypothesis to explain this predominance of the jaw in early babbling. This hypothesis states that general stochastic optimization principles, when applied to learning sensorimotor control, automatically generate ordered babbling stages with a predominant exploration of jaw movements in early stages. The reason is that those movements impact the auditory effects more than other articulators. In previous computational models, such general principles were shown to selectively freeze and free degrees of freedom in a model reproducing the proximo-distal development observed in infant arm reaching. The contribution of this paper is to show how, using the same methods, we are able to explain such patterns in vocal development. We present three experiments. The two first ones show that the recruitment order of articulators emerging from stochastic optimization depends on the target sound to be achieved but that on average the jaw is largely chosen as the first recruited articulator. The third experiment analyses in more detail how the emerging recruitment order is shaped by the dynamics of the optimization process.
abstract_zh: 婴儿的牙牙学语强烈依赖于下巴的振动，尤其是在规范牙牙学语阶段，这是世界语言的音节结构的基础。在本文中，我们提出、建模并分析了一个假设来解释下巴在早期牙牙学中的主导地位。该假设指出，当应用于学习感觉运动控制时，一般随机优化原理会自动生成有序的牙牙学语阶段，并在早期阶段主要探索下巴运动。原因是这些运动比其他咬合架对听觉效果的影响更大。在以前的计算模型中，这种一般原理被证明可以选择性地冻结和释放模型中的自由度，该模型再现了婴儿手臂伸展时观察到的近远端发育。本文的贡献是展示我们如何使用相同的方法来解释声音发展中的此类模式。我们提出三个实验。前两个结果表明，随机优化中出现的咬合架的募集顺序取决于要实现的目标声音，但平均而言，下颌很大程度上被选为第一个募集的咬合架。第三个实验更详细地分析了优化过程的动态如何塑造新出现的招聘顺序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了随机优化原则如何解释婴儿早期发声中下颌的主导性机制。
AI.motivation: 婴儿发声阶段的下颌主导性机制尚未被充分解释，需探究其背后的优化原理。
AI.method: 通过计算模型与三个实验，基于随机优化原则模拟发音器官的招募顺序及动态过程。
AI.result: 实验表明下颌通常是首被招募的发音器官，其顺序受目标声音及优化动态影响。
AI.conclusion: 随机优化原则可解释语音发展阶段模式，下颌主导性源于其对听觉反馈的强影响。

search_text: Emergent Jaw Predominance in Vocal Development through Stochastic Optimization 通过随机优化在声音发展中突现下颌优势 Infant vocal babbling strongly relies on jaw oscillations, especially at the stage of canonical babbling, which underlies the syllabic structure of world languages. In this paper, we propose, model and analyze an hypothesis to explain this predominance of the jaw in early babbling. This hypothesis states that general stochastic optimization principles, when applied to learning sensorimotor control, automatically generate ordered babbling stages with a predominant exploration of jaw movements in early stages. The reason is that those movements impact the auditory effects more than other articulators. In previous computational models, such general principles were shown to selectively freeze and free degrees of freedom in a model reproducing the proximo-distal development observed in infant arm reaching. The contribution of this paper is to show how, using the same methods, we are able to explain such patterns in vocal development. We present three experiments. The two first ones show that the recruitment order of articulators emerging from stochastic optimization depends on the target sound to be achieved but that on average the jaw is largely chosen as the first recruited articulator. The third experiment analyses in more detail how the emerging recruitment order is shaped by the dynamics of the optimization process. 婴儿的牙牙学语强烈依赖于下巴的振动，尤其是在规范牙牙学语阶段，这是世界语言的音节结构的基础。在本文中，我们提出、建模并分析了一个假设来解释下巴在早期牙牙学中的主导地位。该假设指出，当应用于学习感觉运动控制时，一般随机优化原理会自动生成有序的牙牙学语阶段，并在早期阶段主要探索下巴运动。原因是这些运动比其他咬合架对听觉效果的影响更大。在以前的计算模型中，这种一般原理被证明可以选择性地冻结和释放模型中的自由度，该模型再现了婴儿手臂伸展时观察到的近远端发育。本文的贡献是展示我们如何使用相同的方法来解释声音发展中的此类模式。我们提出三个实验。前两个结果表明，随机优化中出现的咬合架的募集顺序取决于要实现的目标声音，但平均而言，下颌很大程度上被选为第一个募集的咬合架。第三个实验更详细地分析了优化过程的动态如何塑造新出现的招聘顺序。 本文提出并验证了随机优化原则如何解释婴儿早期发声中下颌的主导性机制。 Clément Moulin-Frier,Jules Brochard,Freek Stulp,Pierre-Yves Oudeyer cs.SD,eess.AS,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Tom Dörr,Karla Markert,Nicolas M. Müller,Konstantin Böttinger
title: Towards Resistant Audio Adversarial Examples
title_zh: 面向抵抗性音频对抗示例
abstract: Adversarial examples tremendously threaten the availability and integrity of machine learning-based systems. While the feasibility of such attacks has been observed first in the domain of image processing, recent research shows that speech recognition is also susceptible to adversarial attacks. However, reliably bridging the air gap (i.e., making the adversarial examples work when recorded via a microphone) has so far eluded researchers. We find that due to flaws in the generation process, state-of-the-art adversarial example generation methods cause overfitting because of the binning operation in the target speech recognition system (e.g., Mozilla Deepspeech). We devise an approach to mitigate this flaw and find that our method improves generation of adversarial examples with varying offsets. We confirm the significant improvement with our approach by empirical comparison of the edit distance in a realistic over-the-air setting. Our approach states a significant step towards over-the-air attacks. We publish the code and an applicable implementation of our approach.
summary: Adversarial examples tremendously threaten the availability and integrity of machine learning-based systems. While the feasibility of such attacks has been observed first in the domain of image processing, recent research shows that speech recognition is also susceptible to adversarial attacks. However, reliably bridging the air gap (i.e., making the adversarial examples work when recorded via a microphone) has so far eluded researchers. We find that due to flaws in the generation process, state-of-the-art adversarial example generation methods cause overfitting because of the binning operation in the target speech recognition system (e.g., Mozilla Deepspeech). We devise an approach to mitigate this flaw and find that our method improves generation of adversarial examples with varying offsets. We confirm the significant improvement with our approach by empirical comparison of the edit distance in a realistic over-the-air setting. Our approach states a significant step towards over-the-air attacks. We publish the code and an applicable implementation of our approach.
abstract_zh: 对抗性示例极大地威胁了基于机器学习的系统的可用性和完整性。虽然此类攻击的可行性首先在图像处理领域被观察到，但最近的研究表明语音识别也容易受到对抗性攻击。然而，迄今为止，研究人员仍然未能可靠地弥合气隙（即，使对抗性示例在通过麦克风录制时发挥作用）。我们发现，由于生成过程中的缺陷，最先进的对抗性示例生成方法会因目标语音识别系统（例如 Mozilla Deepspeech）中的分箱操作而导致过度拟合。我们设计了一种方法来减轻这个缺陷，并发现我们的方法改进了具有不同偏移量的对抗性示例的生成。通过在现实的无线设置中对编辑距离进行实证比较，我们确认了我们的方法的显着改进。我们的方法向空中攻击迈出了重要一步。我们发布了代码和我们方法的适用实现。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进音频对抗样本生成方法，解决现有技术在跨越空气间隙时的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本生成方法因语音识别系统的分箱操作导致过拟合，无法有效跨越空气间隙。
AI.method: 提出缓解分箱操作过拟合的方法，并通过真实场景下的编辑距离比较验证效果。
AI.result: 改进方法显著提升了对抗样本在真实录制环境中的生成效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实现有效的跨空气间隙对抗攻击提供了重要技术突破。

authors_text: Zhiwen Cao,Zongcheng Chu,Dongfang Liu,Yingjie Chen
title: A Vector-based Representation to Enhance Head Pose Estimation
title_zh: 增强头部姿势估计的基于矢量的表示
comment: Proceeding with IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2021); 10 pages, 8 figures
comments: Proceeding with IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2021); 10 pages, 8 figures
abstract: This paper proposes to use the three vectors in a rotation matrix as the representation in head pose estimation and develops a new neural network based on the characteristic of such representation. We address two potential issues existed in current head pose estimation works: 1. Public datasets for head pose estimation use either Euler angles or quaternions to annotate data samples. However, both of these annotations have the issue of discontinuity and thus could result in some performance issues in neural network training. 2. Most research works report Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of Euler angles as the measurement of performance. We show that MAE may not reflect the actual behavior especially for the cases of profile views. To solve these two problems, we propose a new annotation method which uses three vectors to describe head poses and a new measurement Mean Absolute Error of Vectors (MAEV) to assess the performance. We also train a new neural network to predict the three vectors with the constraints of orthogonality. Our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on both AFLW2000 and BIWI datasets. Experiments show our vector-based annotation method can effectively reduce prediction errors for large pose angles.
summary: This paper proposes to use the three vectors in a rotation matrix as the representation in head pose estimation and develops a new neural network based on the characteristic of such representation. We address two potential issues existed in current head pose estimation works: 1. Public datasets for head pose estimation use either Euler angles or quaternions to annotate data samples. However, both of these annotations have the issue of discontinuity and thus could result in some performance issues in neural network training. 2. Most research works report Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of Euler angles as the measurement of performance. We show that MAE may not reflect the actual behavior especially for the cases of profile views. To solve these two problems, we propose a new annotation method which uses three vectors to describe head poses and a new measurement Mean Absolute Error of Vectors (MAEV) to assess the performance. We also train a new neural network to predict the three vectors with the constraints of orthogonality. Our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on both AFLW2000 and BIWI datasets. Experiments show our vector-based annotation method can effectively reduce prediction errors for large pose angles.
abstract_zh: 本文提出使用旋转矩阵中的三个向量作为头部姿态估计中的表示，并基于这种表示的特点开发了一种新的神经网络。我们解决了当前头部姿势估计工作中存在的两个潜在问题：1.头部姿势估计的公共数据集使用欧拉角或四元数来注释数据样本。然而，这两种注释都存在不连续性的问题，因此可能会导致神经网络训练中的一些性能问题。 2. 大多数研究工作都将欧拉角的平均绝对误差（MAE）作为性能的衡量标准。我们表明，MAE 可能无法反映实际行为，特别是对于个人资料视图的情况。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种新的注释方法，该方法使用三个向量来描述头部姿势，并使用新的测量向量平均绝对误差（MAEV）来评估性能。我们还训练一个新的神经网络来预测具有正交性约束的三个向量。我们提出的方法在 AFLW2000 和 BIWI 数据集上均取得了最先进的结果。实验表明，我们的基于矢量的标注方法可以有效减少大姿态角度的预测误差。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于向量表示的头部姿态估计方法，以解决现有标注和评估指标的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用欧拉角或四元数标注存在不连续性，且MAE评估指标在侧面视图不够准确。
AI.method: 使用旋转矩阵的三个向量作为表示，构建具有正交约束的神经网络，并提出向量平均绝对误差（MAEV）作为评估指标。
AI.result: 在AFLW2000和BIWI数据集上达到最先进水平，显著减少大角度姿态的预测误差。
AI.conclusion: 向量表示方法和MAEV指标有效解决了现有问题，验证了方法在头部姿态估计中的优越性。

To solve these two problems, we propose a new annotation method which uses three vectors to describe head poses and a new measurement Mean Absolute Error of Vectors (MAEV) to assess the performance. We also train a new neural network to predict the three vectors with the constraints of orthogonality. Our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on both AFLW2000 and BIWI datasets. Experiments show our vector-based annotation method can effectively reduce prediction errors for large pose angles. 本文提出使用旋转矩阵中的三个向量作为头部姿态估计中的表示，并基于这种表示的特点开发了一种新的神经网络。我们解决了当前头部姿势估计工作中存在的两个潜在问题：1.头部姿势估计的公共数据集使用欧拉角或四元数来注释数据样本。然而，这两种注释都存在不连续性的问题，因此可能会导致神经网络训练中的一些性能问题。 2. 大多数研究工作都将欧拉角的平均绝对误差（MAE）作为性能的衡量标准。我们表明，MAE 可能无法反映实际行为，特别是对于个人资料视图的情况。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种新的注释方法，该方法使用三个向量来描述头部姿势，并使用新的测量向量平均绝对误差（MAEV）来评估性能。我们还训练一个新的神经网络来预测具有正交性约束的三个向量。我们提出的方法在 AFLW2000 和 BIWI 数据集上均取得了最先进的结果。实验表明，我们的基于矢量的标注方法可以有效减少大姿态角度的预测误差。 提出一种基于向量表示的头部姿态估计方法，以解决现有标注和评估指标的问题。 Zhiwen Cao,Zongcheng Chu,Dongfang Liu,Yingjie Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Jens Müller,Robert Schmier,Lynton Ardizzone,Carsten Rother,Ullrich Köthe
title: Learning Robust Models Using The Principle of Independent Causal Mechanisms
title_zh: 利用独立因果机制原理学习鲁棒模型
abstract: Standard supervised learning breaks down under data distribution shift. However, the principle of independent causal mechanisms (ICM, Peters et al. (2017)) can turn this weakness into an opportunity: one can take advantage of distribution shift between different environments during training in order to obtain more robust models. We propose a new gradient-based learning framework whose objective function is derived from the ICM principle. We show theoretically and experimentally that neural networks trained in this framework focus on relations remaining invariant across environments and ignore unstable ones. Moreover, we prove that the recovered stable relations correspond to the true causal mechanisms under certain conditions. In both regression and classification, the resulting models generalize well to unseen scenarios where traditionally trained models fail.
summary: Standard supervised learning breaks down under data distribution shift. However, the principle of independent causal mechanisms (ICM, Peters et al. (2017)) can turn this weakness into an opportunity: one can take advantage of distribution shift between different environments during training in order to obtain more robust models. We propose a new gradient-based learning framework whose objective function is derived from the ICM principle. We show theoretically and experimentally that neural networks trained in this framework focus on relations remaining invariant across environments and ignore unstable ones. Moreover, we prove that the recovered stable relations correspond to the true causal mechanisms under certain conditions. In both regression and classification, the resulting models generalize well to unseen scenarios where traditionally trained models fail.
abstract_zh: 标准监督学习在数据分布变化下崩溃。然而，独立因果机制的原理（ICM，Peters et al.（2017））可以将这一弱点转化为机会：可以利用训练过程中不同环境之间的分布变化来获得更鲁棒的模型。我们提出了一种新的基于梯度的学习框架，其目标函数源自 ICM 原理。我们从理论上和实验上表明，在此框架中训练的神经网络专注于在环境中保持不变的关系，并忽略不稳定的关系。此外，我们证明了在某些条件下恢复的稳定关系对应于真正的因果机制。在回归和分类中，生成的模型可以很好地推广到传统训练模型失败的未见过的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于独立因果机制（ICM）原则的梯度学习框架，以提升模型在数据分布变化下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习在数据分布变化时表现不佳，而ICM原则可通过利用不同环境间的分布差异来增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计梯度下降框架，通过ICM原则推导目标函数，使神经网络关注跨环境的不变关系并忽略不稳定因素。
AI.result: 理论与实验表明，该方法恢复的稳定关系对应真实因果机制，且在回归和分类任务中均能有效泛化到传统模型失效的场景。
AI.conclusion: 基于ICM的框架能有效学习鲁棒模型，在分布变化环境下显著优于传统方法。

authors_text: Xiangwei Shi,Yunqiang Li,Xin Liu,Jan van Gemert
title: WeightAlign: Normalizing Activations by Weight Alignment
title_zh: WeightAlign：通过权重对齐标准化激活
comment: The first three authors contributed equally; accepted by ICPR 2020
comments: The first three authors contributed equally; accepted by ICPR 2020
abstract: Batch normalization (BN) allows training very deep networks by normalizing activations by mini-batch sample statistics which renders BN unstable for small batch sizes. Current small-batch solutions such as Instance Norm, Layer Norm, and Group Norm use channel statistics which can be computed even for a single sample. Such methods are less stable than BN as they critically depend on the statistics of a single input sample. To address this problem, we propose a normalization of activation without sample statistics. We present WeightAlign: a method that normalizes the weights by the mean and scaled standard derivation computed within a filter, which normalizes activations without computing any sample statistics. Our proposed method is independent of batch size and stable over a wide range of batch sizes. Because weight statistics are orthogonal to sample statistics, we can directly combine WeightAlign with any method for activation normalization. We experimentally demonstrate these benefits for classification on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, for semantic segmentation on PASCAL VOC 2012 and for domain adaptation on Office-31.
summary: Batch normalization (BN) allows training very deep networks by normalizing activations by mini-batch sample statistics which renders BN unstable for small batch sizes. Current small-batch solutions such as Instance Norm, Layer Norm, and Group Norm use channel statistics which can be computed even for a single sample. Such methods are less stable than BN as they critically depend on the statistics of a single input sample. To address this problem, we propose a normalization of activation without sample statistics. We present WeightAlign: a method that normalizes the weights by the mean and scaled standard derivation computed within a filter, which normalizes activations without computing any sample statistics. Our proposed method is independent of batch size and stable over a wide range of batch sizes. Because weight statistics are orthogonal to sample statistics, we can directly combine WeightAlign with any method for activation normalization. We experimentally demonstrate these benefits for classification on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, for semantic segmentation on PASCAL VOC 2012 and for domain adaptation on Office-31.
abstract_zh: 批量归一化 (BN) 允许通过小批量样本统计数据归一化激活来训练非常深的网络，这使得 BN 对于小批量大小不稳定。当前的小批量解决方案（例如实例规范、层规范和组规范）使用通道统计数据，甚至可以针对单个样本进行计算。此类方法不如 BN 稳定，因为它们严重依赖于单个输入样本的统计数据。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种无需样本统计的激活标准化。我们提出了 WeightAlign：一种通过过滤器内计算的均值和缩放标准导数对权重进行归一化的方法，该方法可以在不计算任何样本统计数据的情况下对激活进行归一化。我们提出的方法与批量大小无关，并且在很宽的批量大小范围内稳定。由于权重统计与样本统计正交，因此我们可以直接将 WeightAlign 与任何激活归一化方法结合起来。我们通过实验证明了 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet 上的分类、PASCAL VOC 2012 上的语义分割以及 Office-31 上的域适应的这些优势。

AI.tldr: 提出一种不依赖样本统计的激活归一化方法WeightAlign，解决小批量训练时归一化不稳定的问题。
AI.motivation: 批量归一化（BN）在小批量训练时不稳定，现有替代方法（如Instance Norm）依赖单样本统计信息导致稳定性不足。
AI.method: 通过滤波器内计算权重的均值和缩放标准差进行归一化，完全避免样本统计量计算，且可与其他归一化方法结合使用。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet分类，PASCAL VOC语义分割及Office-31域适应任务中验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: WeightAlign独立于批大小且稳定性高，为小批量训练提供可靠归一化方案，实验验证了其广泛适用性。
