authors_text: Kai Wang,Yu Liu,Qian Ma,Quan Z. Sheng
title: MulDE: Multi-teacher Knowledge Distillation for Low-dimensional Knowledge Graph Embeddings
title_zh: MulDE：低维知识图嵌入的多教师知识蒸馏
comment: Accepted for publication at the Web Conference 2021
comments: Accepted for publication at the Web Conference 2021
abstract: Link prediction based on knowledge graph embeddings (KGE) aims to predict new triples to automatically construct knowledge graphs (KGs). However, recent KGE models achieve performance improvements by excessively increasing the embedding dimensions, which may cause enormous training costs and require more storage space. In this paper, instead of training high-dimensional models, we propose MulDE, a novel knowledge distillation framework, which includes multiple low-dimensional hyperbolic KGE models as teachers and two student components, namely Junior and Senior. Under a novel iterative distillation strategy, the Junior component, a low-dimensional KGE model, asks teachers actively based on its preliminary prediction results, and the Senior component integrates teachers' knowledge adaptively to train the Junior component based on two mechanisms: relation-specific scaling and contrast attention. The experimental results show that MulDE can effectively improve the performance and training speed of low-dimensional KGE models. The distilled 32-dimensional model is competitive compared to the state-of-the-art high-dimensional methods on several widely-used datasets.
summary: Link prediction based on knowledge graph embeddings (KGE) aims to predict new triples to automatically construct knowledge graphs (KGs). However, recent KGE models achieve performance improvements by excessively increasing the embedding dimensions, which may cause enormous training costs and require more storage space. In this paper, instead of training high-dimensional models, we propose MulDE, a novel knowledge distillation framework, which includes multiple low-dimensional hyperbolic KGE models as teachers and two student components, namely Junior and Senior. Under a novel iterative distillation strategy, the Junior component, a low-dimensional KGE model, asks teachers actively based on its preliminary prediction results, and the Senior component integrates teachers' knowledge adaptively to train the Junior component based on two mechanisms: relation-specific scaling and contrast attention. The experimental results show that MulDE can effectively improve the performance and training speed of low-dimensional KGE models. The distilled 32-dimensional model is competitive compared to the state-of-the-art high-dimensional methods on several widely-used datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于知识图嵌入（KGE）的链接预测旨在预测新的三元组以自动构建知识图（KG）。然而，最近的 KGE 模型通过过度增加嵌入维度来实现性能提升，这可能会导致巨大的训练成本并需要更多的存储空间。在本文中，我们提出了 MulDE，一种新颖的知识蒸馏框架，而不是训练高维模型，其中包括多个低维双曲 KGE 模型作为教师和两个学生组件，即 Junior 和 Senior。在一种新颖的迭代蒸馏策略下，初级组件（一种低维 KGE 模型）根据其初步预测结果主动询问教师，而高级组件则自适应地整合教师的知识，基于关系特定缩放和对比注意两种机制来训练初级组件。实验结果表明MulDE可以有效提高低维KGE模型的性能和训练速度。与几个广泛使用的数据集上最先进的高维方法相比，精炼的 32 维模型具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MulDE框架，通过多教师知识蒸馏技术提升低维知识图谱嵌入模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入模型通过增加嵌入维度提升性能，但导致训练成本高和存储需求大，亟需在低维空间实现高效建模。
AI.method: 构建包含多个低维双曲KGE模型作为教师的蒸馏框架，设计Junior和Senior两个学生组件，采用基于关系特定缩放和对比注意力的自适应知识整合机制。
AI.result: 32维蒸馏模型在多个基准数据集上性能优于高维SOTA方法，且训练速度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏能有效提升低维KGE模型表现，证明了多教师协同蒸馏在知识图谱嵌入中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出MulDE框架，通过多教师知识蒸馏技术提升低维知识图谱嵌入模型的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入模型通过增加嵌入维度提升性能，但导致训练成本高和存储需求大，亟需在低维空间实现高效建模。
ai_content.method: 构建包含多个低维双曲KGE模型作为教师的蒸馏框架，设计Junior和Senior两个学生组件，采用基于关系特定缩放和对比注意力的自适应知识整合机制。
ai_content.result: 32维蒸馏模型在多个基准数据集上性能优于高维SOTA方法，且训练速度显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 知识蒸馏能有效提升低维KGE模型表现，证明了多教师协同蒸馏在知识图谱嵌入中的有效性。

search_text: MulDE: Multi-teacher Knowledge Distillation for Low-dimensional Knowledge Graph Embeddings MulDE：低维知识图嵌入的多教师知识蒸馏 Link prediction based on knowledge graph embeddings (KGE) aims to predict new triples to automatically construct knowledge graphs (KGs). However, recent KGE models achieve performance improvements by excessively increasing the embedding dimensions, which may cause enormous training costs and require more storage space. In this paper, instead of training high-dimensional models, we propose MulDE, a novel knowledge distillation framework, which includes multiple low-dimensional hyperbolic KGE models as teachers and two student components, namely Junior and Senior. Under a novel iterative distillation strategy, the Junior component, a low-dimensional KGE model, asks teachers actively based on its preliminary prediction results, and the Senior component integrates teachers' knowledge adaptively to train the Junior component based on two mechanisms: relation-specific scaling and contrast attention. The experimental results show that MulDE can effectively improve the performance and training speed of low-dimensional KGE models. The distilled 32-dimensional model is competitive compared to the state-of-the-art high-dimensional methods on several widely-used datasets. 基于知识图嵌入（KGE）的链接预测旨在预测新的三元组以自动构建知识图（KG）。然而，最近的 KGE 模型通过过度增加嵌入维度来实现性能提升，这可能会导致巨大的训练成本并需要更多的存储空间。在本文中，我们提出了 MulDE，一种新颖的知识蒸馏框架，而不是训练高维模型，其中包括多个低维双曲 KGE 模型作为教师和两个学生组件，即 Junior 和 Senior。在一种新颖的迭代蒸馏策略下，初级组件（一种低维 KGE 模型）根据其初步预测结果主动询问教师，而高级组件则自适应地整合教师的知识，基于关系特定缩放和对比注意两种机制来训练初级组件。实验结果表明MulDE可以有效提高低维KGE模型的性能和训练速度。与几个广泛使用的数据集上最先进的高维方法相比，精炼的 32 维模型具有竞争力。 本文提出MulDE框架，通过多教师知识蒸馏技术提升低维知识图谱嵌入模型的性能。 Kai Wang,Yu Liu,Qian Ma,Quan Z. Sheng cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Jean-Baptiste Boin,Nat Roth,Jigar Doshi,Pablo Llueca,Nicolas Borensztein
title: Multi-class segmentation under severe class imbalance: A case study in roof damage assessment
title_zh: 严重类别不平衡下的多类别分割：屋顶损坏评估案例研究
comment: Submitted to the Artificial Intelligence for Humanitarian Assistance and Disaster Response Workshop at NeurIPS 2020
comments: Submitted to the Artificial Intelligence for Humanitarian Assistance and Disaster Response Workshop at NeurIPS 2020
abstract: The task of roof damage classification and segmentation from overhead imagery presents unique challenges. In this work we choose to address the challenge posed due to strong class imbalance. We propose four distinct techniques that aim at mitigating this problem. Through a new scheme that feeds the data to the network by oversampling the minority classes, and three other network architectural improvements, we manage to boost the macro-averaged F1-score of a model by 39.9 percentage points, thus achieving improved segmentation performance, especially on the minority classes.
summary: The task of roof damage classification and segmentation from overhead imagery presents unique challenges. In this work we choose to address the challenge posed due to strong class imbalance. We propose four distinct techniques that aim at mitigating this problem. Through a new scheme that feeds the data to the network by oversampling the minority classes, and three other network architectural improvements, we manage to boost the macro-averaged F1-score of a model by 39.9 percentage points, thus achieving improved segmentation performance, especially on the minority classes.
abstract_zh: 从头顶图像中进行屋顶损坏分类和分割的任务提出了独特的挑战。在这项工作中，我们选择解决由于严重的阶级不平衡而带来的挑战。我们提出了四种不同的技术来缓解这个问题。通过一种通过对少数类别进行过采样向网络提供数据的新方案，以及其他三项网络架构改进，我们成功地将模型的宏观平均 F1 分数提高了 39.9 个百分点，从而实现了分割性能的提高，尤其是在少数类别上。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在严重类别不平衡情况下进行多类分割的挑战，并以屋顶损坏评估为案例，提出多种方法解决类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 屋顶损坏分类与分割任务中，少数类样本占比极低，导致模型难以有效识别，影响整体分割性能。
AI.method: 提出四种技术：通过过采样少数类调整数据输入，并改进网络架构以增强对少数类的识别能力。
AI.result: 模型的宏平均F1分数提升39.9个百分点，显著改善了对少数类的分割效果。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了类别不平衡问题，为类似场景下的分割任务提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Rui Oliveira,Oskar Ljungqvist,Pedro F. Lima,Jonas Mårtensson,Bo Wahlberg
title: A Geometric Approach to On-road Motion Planning for Long and Multi-Body Heavy-Duty Vehicles
title_zh: 长型多体重型车辆道路运动规划的几何方法
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures. Accepted for publication in: 2020 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium. Copyright of IEEE
comments: 8 pages, 10 figures. Accepted for publication in: 2020 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium. Copyright of IEEE
abstract: Driving heavy-duty vehicles, such as buses and tractor-trailer vehicles, is a difficult task in comparison to passenger cars. Most research on motion planning for autonomous vehicles has focused on passenger vehicles, and many unique challenges associated with heavy-duty vehicles remain open. However, recent works have started to tackle the particular difficulties related to on-road motion planning for buses and tractor-trailer vehicles using numerical optimization approaches. In this work, we propose a framework to design an optimization objective to be used in motion planners. Based on geometric derivations, the method finds the optimal trade-off between the conflicting objectives of centering different axles of the vehicle in the lane. For the buses, we consider the front and rear axles trade-off, whereas for articulated vehicles, we consider the tractor and trailer rear axles trade-off. Our results show that the proposed design strategy results in planned paths that considerably improve the behavior of heavy-duty vehicles by keeping the whole vehicle body in the center of the lane.
summary: Driving heavy-duty vehicles, such as buses and tractor-trailer vehicles, is a difficult task in comparison to passenger cars. Most research on motion planning for autonomous vehicles has focused on passenger vehicles, and many unique challenges associated with heavy-duty vehicles remain open. However, recent works have started to tackle the particular difficulties related to on-road motion planning for buses and tractor-trailer vehicles using numerical optimization approaches. In this work, we propose a framework to design an optimization objective to be used in motion planners. Based on geometric derivations, the method finds the optimal trade-off between the conflicting objectives of centering different axles of the vehicle in the lane. For the buses, we consider the front and rear axles trade-off, whereas for articulated vehicles, we consider the tractor and trailer rear axles trade-off. Our results show that the proposed design strategy results in planned paths that considerably improve the behavior of heavy-duty vehicles by keeping the whole vehicle body in the center of the lane.
abstract_zh: 与乘用车相比，驾驶重型车辆（例如公共汽车和牵引拖车）是一项艰巨的任务。大多数关于自动驾驶车辆运动规划的研究都集中在乘用车上，与重型车辆相关的许多独特挑战仍然存在。然而，最近的工作已经开始使用数值优化方法来解决与公共汽车和牵引拖车车辆的道路运动规划相关的特殊困难。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架来设计用于运动规划器的优化目标。基于几何推导，该方法找到了将车辆不同轴置于车道中心的冲突目标之间的最佳权衡。对于公共汽车，我们考虑前轴和后轴的权衡，而对于铰接式车辆，我们考虑牵引车和拖车后轴的权衡。我们的结果表明，所提出的设计策略产生的规划路径通过将整个车身保持在车道中心而显着改善了重型车辆的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何推导的优化目标设计框架，用于解决重型车辆（如公交车和挂车）的道路上运动规划问题，通过平衡不同轴的位置来优化车辆在车道中的居中性。
AI.motivation: 重型车辆的自动驾驶运动规划面临独特挑战，现有研究多集中于乘用车，而针对重型车辆的复杂问题尚未充分解决，需专门设计优化方法以提升其行驶稳定性。
AI.method: 基于几何分析，通过数值优化方法构建多目标优化框架，针对公交车的前轴与后轴、挂车的牵引车与拖车后轴的冲突目标，设计最优权衡策略以实现车辆整体居中车道的目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法生成的路径显著改善了重型车辆的行驶行为，有效保持车辆整体在车道中心，提升了行驶安全性和舒适性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的几何优化框架为重型车辆运动规划提供了有效解决方案，通过轴线位置的精确平衡，显著提升了复杂路况下的自动驾驶性能。

authors_text: Pradeep Rangan,Sundeep Teki,Hemant Misra
title: Exploiting Spectral Augmentation for Code-Switched Spoken Language Identification
title_zh: 利用频谱增强进行语码转换口语识别
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, Accepted for INTERSPEECH-2020 - "First Workshop on Speech Technologies for Code-switching in Multilingual Communities 2020"
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, Accepted for INTERSPEECH-2020 - "First Workshop on Speech Technologies for Code-switching in Multilingual Communities 2020"
abstract: Spoken language Identification (LID) systems are needed to identify the language(s) present in a given audio sample, and typically could be the first step in many speech processing related tasks such as automatic speech recognition (ASR). Automatic identification of the languages present in a speech signal is not only scientifically interesting, but also of practical importance in a multilingual country such as India. In many of the Indian cities, when people interact with each other, as many as three languages may get mixed. These may include the official language of that province, Hindi and English (at times the languages of the neighboring provinces may also get mixed during these interactions). This makes the spoken LID task extremely challenging in Indian context. While quite a few LID systems in the context of Indian languages have been implemented, most such systems have used small scale speech data collected internally within an organization. In the current work, we perform spoken LID on three Indian languages (Gujarati, Telugu, and Tamil) code-mixed with English. This task was organized by the Microsoft research team as a spoken LID challenge. In our work, we modify the usual spectral augmentation approach and propose a language mask that discriminates the language ID pairs, which leads to a noise robust spoken LID system. The proposed method gives a relative improvement of approximately 3-5% in the LID accuracy over a baseline system proposed by Microsoft on the three language pairs for two shared tasks suggested in the challenge.
summary: Spoken language Identification (LID) systems are needed to identify the language(s) present in a given audio sample, and typically could be the first step in many speech processing related tasks such as automatic speech recognition (ASR). Automatic identification of the languages present in a speech signal is not only scientifically interesting, but also of practical importance in a multilingual country such as India. In many of the Indian cities, when people interact with each other, as many as three languages may get mixed. These may include the official language of that province, Hindi and English (at times the languages of the neighboring provinces may also get mixed during these interactions). This makes the spoken LID task extremely challenging in Indian context. While quite a few LID systems in the context of Indian languages have been implemented, most such systems have used small scale speech data collected internally within an organization. In the current work, we perform spoken LID on three Indian languages (Gujarati, Telugu, and Tamil) code-mixed with English. This task was organized by the Microsoft research team as a spoken LID challenge. In our work, we modify the usual spectral augmentation approach and propose a language mask that discriminates the language ID pairs, which leads to a noise robust spoken LID system. The proposed method gives a relative improvement of approximately 3-5% in the LID accuracy over a baseline system proposed by Microsoft on the three language pairs for two shared tasks suggested in the challenge.
abstract_zh: 口语识别 (LID) 系统需要识别给定音频样本中存在的语言，并且通常可能是自动语音识别 (ASR) 等许多语音处理相关任务的第一步。自动识别语音信号中的语言不仅具有科学意义，而且对于印度这样的多语言国家也具有实际意义。在印度的许多城市，当人们相互交流时，可能会混合多达三种语言。这些可能包括该省的官方语言、印地语和英语（有时，在这些互动过程中，邻近省份的语言也可能会混合）。这使得口语 LID 任务在印度语境中极具挑战性。虽然已经实施了相当多的印度语言环境下的 LID 系统，但大多数此类系统都使用组织内部收集的小规模语音数据。在当前的工作中，我们对三种印度语言（古吉拉特语、泰卢固语和泰米尔语）与英语的代码混合执行口语 LID。该任务由 Microsoft 研究团队组织为口头 LID 挑战。在我们的工作中，我们修改了通常的谱增强方法，并提出了一种区分语言 ID 对的语言掩码，从而形成了一个抗噪声的口语 LID 系统。与 Microsoft 提出的基线系统相比，该方法针对挑战中建议的两个共享任务的三种语言对，LID 准确度相对提高了约 3-5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用频谱增强技术改进代码混合语音语言识别（LID）的方法，针对印度语境下的多语言混合语音识别任务。
AI.motivation: 在印度等多语言国家，人们日常交流中常混合使用多种语言（如官方语言、印地语、英语等），导致语音语言识别任务极具挑战性。现有系统多依赖小规模数据，难以有效处理代码混合场景。
AI.method: 修改传统频谱增强方法，引入语言掩码（language mask）以区分语言对，提升系统在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在微软组织的挑战任务中，该方法在三种印度语言（古吉拉特语、泰卢固语、泰米尔语）与英语的混合语音识别任务上，相较基线系统实现3-5%的相对准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的语言掩码方法有效增强了代码混合语音语言识别的性能，为多语言混合场景下的LID任务提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Lav R. Varshney,Nazneen Fatema Rajani,Richard Socher
title: Explaining Creative Artifacts
title_zh: 解释创意制品
comment: 2020 Workshop on Human Interpretability in Machine Learning (WHI), at ICML 2020
comments: 2020 Workshop on Human Interpretability in Machine Learning (WHI), at ICML 2020
abstract: Human creativity is often described as the mental process of combining associative elements into a new form, but emerging computational creativity algorithms may not operate in this manner. Here we develop an inverse problem formulation to deconstruct the products of combinatorial and compositional creativity into associative chains as a form of post-hoc interpretation that matches the human creative process. In particular, our formulation is structured as solving a traveling salesman problem through a knowledge graph of associative elements. We demonstrate our approach using an example in explaining culinary computational creativity where there is an explicit semantic structure, and two examples in language generation where we either extract explicit concepts that map to a knowledge graph or we consider distances in a word embedding space. We close by casting the length of an optimal traveling salesman path as a measure of novelty in creativity.
summary: Human creativity is often described as the mental process of combining associative elements into a new form, but emerging computational creativity algorithms may not operate in this manner. Here we develop an inverse problem formulation to deconstruct the products of combinatorial and compositional creativity into associative chains as a form of post-hoc interpretation that matches the human creative process. In particular, our formulation is structured as solving a traveling salesman problem through a knowledge graph of associative elements. We demonstrate our approach using an example in explaining culinary computational creativity where there is an explicit semantic structure, and two examples in language generation where we either extract explicit concepts that map to a knowledge graph or we consider distances in a word embedding space. We close by casting the length of an optimal traveling salesman path as a measure of novelty in creativity.
abstract_zh: 人类创造力通常被描述为将关联元素组合成新形式的心理过程，但新兴的计算创造力算法可能不会以这种方式运作。在这里，我们开发了一种逆问题公式，将组合和组合创造力的产物解构为关联链，作为一种与人类创造性过程相匹配的事后解释形式。特别是，我们的公式被构造为通过关联元素的知识图来解决旅行商问题。我们使用一个解释烹饪计算创造力的例子来展示我们的方法，其中有一个明确的语义结构，以及语言生成中的两个例子，我们要么提取映射到知识图的显式概念，要么考虑单词嵌入空间中的距离。最后，我们将最佳旅行推销员路径的长度作为创造力新颖性的衡量标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种逆问题方法，将组合性创造力产物分解为关联链，以解释计算创造力的过程。
AI.motivation: 现有计算创造力算法可能不同于人类通过关联元素组合的创造性过程，需开发事后解释方法以匹配人类创造力。
AI.method: 通过知识图谱构建逆问题模型，将创意产物分解为关联链，采用旅行商问题（TSP）进行求解，并结合知识图谱和词嵌入空间分析不同场景。
AI.result: 在烹饪和语言生成案例中成功分解创意产物，验证了该方法在解释计算创造力中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将最优旅行商路径长度作为衡量创造力新颖性的指标，为评估计算创造力提供新视角。

authors_text: János Balogh,Leah Epstein,Asaf Levin
title: More on ordered open end bin packing
title_zh: 有关订购开口箱包装的更多信息
abstract: We consider the Ordered Open End Bin Packing problem. Items of sizes in $(0,1]$ are presented one by one, to be assigned to bins in this order. An item can be assigned to any bin for which the current total size strictly below $1$. This means also that the bin can be overloaded by its last packed item. We improve lower and upper bounds on the asymptotic competitive ratio in the online case. Specifically, we design the first algorithm whose asymptotic competitive ratio is strictly below $2$ and it is close to the lower bound. This is in contrast to the best possible absolute approximation ratio, which is equal to $2$. We also study the offline problem where the sequence of items is known in advance, while items are still assigned to bins based on their order in the sequence. For this scenario we design an asymptotic polynomial time approximation scheme.
summary: We consider the Ordered Open End Bin Packing problem. Items of sizes in $(0,1]$ are presented one by one, to be assigned to bins in this order. An item can be assigned to any bin for which the current total size strictly below $1$. This means also that the bin can be overloaded by its last packed item. We improve lower and upper bounds on the asymptotic competitive ratio in the online case. Specifically, we design the first algorithm whose asymptotic competitive ratio is strictly below $2$ and it is close to the lower bound. This is in contrast to the best possible absolute approximation ratio, which is equal to $2$. We also study the offline problem where the sequence of items is known in advance, while items are still assigned to bins based on their order in the sequence. For this scenario we design an asymptotic polynomial time approximation scheme.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑有序开端装箱问题。尺寸在 $(0,1]$ 中的项目被一个接一个地呈现，并按此顺序分配给 bin。一个项目可以被分配给当前总大小严格低于 $1$ 的任何 bin。这也意味着该 bin 可能会被最后打包的项目超载。我们改进了在线案例中渐近竞争比的下限和上限。具体来说，我们设计了第一个算法，其渐近竞争比严格低于 $2$ 并且接近下限。这是相反的我们还研究了离线问题，其中项目的序列是预先已知的，而项目仍然根据它们在序列中的顺序分配给容器。对于这种情况，我们设计了一个渐近多项式时间近似方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究有序开放端装箱问题，在线和离线场景下改进算法性能。
AI.motivation: 现有算法绝对近似比为2，但在线场景需更优竞争比，且离线场景需高效方案。
AI.method: 改进在线场景渐近竞争比上下界，设计首次低于2的算法；离线场景提出渐近多项式时间近似方案。
AI.result: 在线算法渐近竞争比首次严格低于2且接近下界；离线问题获得渐近PTAS。
AI.conclusion: 在线算法效率提升，离线问题获有效方案，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: More on ordered open end bin packing 有关订购开口箱包装的更多信息 We consider the Ordered Open End Bin Packing problem. Items of sizes in $(0,1]$ are presented one by one, to be assigned to bins in this order. An item can be assigned to any bin for which the current total size strictly below $1$. This means also that the bin can be overloaded by its last packed item. We improve lower and upper bounds on the asymptotic competitive ratio in the online case. Specifically, we design the first algorithm whose asymptotic competitive ratio is strictly below $2$ and it is close to the lower bound. This is in contrast to the best possible absolute approximation ratio, which is equal to $2$. We also study the offline problem where the sequence of items is known in advance, while items are still assigned to bins based on their order in the sequence. For this scenario we design an asymptotic polynomial time approximation scheme. 我们考虑有序开端装箱问题。尺寸在 $(0,1]$ 中的项目被一个接一个地呈现，并按此顺序分配给 bin。一个项目可以被分配给当前总大小严格低于 $1$ 的任何 bin。这也意味着该 bin 可能会被最后打包的项目超载。我们改进了在线案例中渐近竞争比的下限和上限。具体来说，我们设计了第一个算法，其渐近竞争比严格低于 $2$ 并且接近下限。这是相反的我们还研究了离线问题，其中项目的序列是预先已知的，而项目仍然根据它们在序列中的顺序分配给容器。对于这种情况，我们设计了一个渐近多项式时间近似方案。 本文研究有序开放端装箱问题，在线和离线场景下改进算法性能。 János Balogh,Leah Epstein,Asaf Levin cs.DS,cs.DM,math.CO,math.OC

authors_text: Fabio Bruno,Loris Barbieri,Marino Mangeruga,Marco Cozza,Antonio Lagudi,Jan Čejka,Fotis Liarokapis,Dimitrios Skarlatos
title: Underwater Augmented Reality for improving the diving experience in submerged archaeological sites
title_zh: 水下增强现实可改善水下考古遗址的潜水体验
comment: ef:Ocean Engineering, Volume 190, 15 October 2019, 106487
comments: ef:Ocean Engineering, Volume 190, 15 October 2019, 106487
abstract: The Mediterranean Sea has a vast maritime heritage which exploitation is made difficult because of the many limitations imposed by the submerged environment. Archaeological diving tours, in fact, suffer from the impossibility to provide underwater an exhaustive explanation of the submerged remains. Furthermore, low visibility conditions, due to water turbidity and biological colonization, sometimes make very confusing for tourists to find their way around in the underwater archaeological site. To this end, the paper investigates the feasibility and potentials of the underwater Augmented Reality (UWAR) technologies developed in the iMARECulture project for improving the experience of the divers that visit the Underwater Archaeological Park of Baiae (Naples). In particular, the paper presents two UWAR technologies that adopt hybrid tracking techniques to perform an augmented visualization of the actual conditions and of a hypothetical 3D reconstruction of the archaeological remains as appeared in the past. The first one integrates a marker-based tracking with inertial sensors, while the second one adopts a markerless approach that integrates acoustic localization and visual-inertial odometry. The experimentations show that the proposed UWAR technologies could contribute to have a better comprehension of the underwater site and its archaeological remains.
summary: The Mediterranean Sea has a vast maritime heritage which exploitation is made difficult because of the many limitations imposed by the submerged environment. To this end, the paper investigates the feasibility and potentials of the underwater Augmented Reality (UWAR) technologies developed in the iMARECulture project for improving the experience of the divers that visit the Underwater Archaeological Park of Baiae (Naples). In particular, the paper presents two UWAR technologies that adopt hybrid tracking techniques to perform an augmented visualization of the actual conditions and of a hypothetical 3D reconstruction of the archaeological remains as appeared in the past. The first one integrates a marker-based tracking with inertial sensors, while the second one adopts a markerless approach that integrates acoustic localization and visual-inertial odometry. The experimentations show that the proposed UWAR technologies could contribute to have a better comprehension of the underwater site and its archaeological remains.
abstract_zh: 地中海拥有丰富的海洋遗产，由于水下环境的许多限制，这些遗产的开发变得困难。事实上，考古潜水之旅面临着无法在水下对水下遗迹进行详尽解释的困扰。此外，由于水体浑浊和生物定植，能见度较低，有时会让游客在水下考古遗址中迷失方向。为此，本文研究了 iMARECulture 项目中开发的水下增强现实 (UWAR) 技术的可行性和潜力，以改善参观拜埃水下考古公园（那不勒斯）的潜水员的体验。该论文特别介绍了两种 UWAR 技术，它们采用混合跟踪技术来执行实际情况的增强可视化以及对过去出现的考古遗迹的假设 3D 重建。第一个将基于标记的跟踪与惯性传感器集成在一起，而第二个则采用集成了声学定位和视觉惯性里程计的无标记方法。实验表明，拟议的 UWAR 技术有助于更好地了解水下遗址及其考古遗迹。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了水下增强现实（UWAR）技术在改善水下考古遗址潜水体验中的应用。
AI.motivation: 地中海拥有丰富的航海遗产，但由于水下环境的限制，考古潜水旅游难以提供全面的解释，且低能见度条件使游客难以在水下遗址中找到方向。
AI.method: 本文提出了两种UWAR技术，一种结合了基于标记的跟踪与惯性传感器，另一种采用了无标记方法，结合了声学定位和视觉惯性里程计。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的UWAR技术有助于更好地理解和探索水下遗址及其考古遗迹。
AI.conclusion: UWAR技术在改善水下考古遗址潜水体验方面具有潜力，有助于游客更清晰地了解遗址的历史和现状。

authors_text: Keval Doshi,Yasin Yilmaz
title: Online Anomaly Detection in Surveillance Videos with Asymptotic Bounds on False Alarm Rate
title_zh: 误报率渐近界的监控视频在线异常检测
comment: Submitted to Pattern Recognition. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2004.07941
comments: Submitted to Pattern Recognition. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2004.07941
abstract: Anomaly detection in surveillance videos is attracting an increasing amount of attention. Despite the competitive performance of recent methods, they lack theoretical performance analysis, particularly due to the complex deep neural network architectures used in decision making. Additionally, online decision making is an important but mostly neglected factor in this domain. Much of the existing methods that claim to be online, depend on batch or offline processing in practice. Motivated by these research gaps, we propose an online anomaly detection method in surveillance videos with asymptotic bounds on the false alarm rate, which in turn provides a clear procedure for selecting a proper decision threshold that satisfies the desired false alarm rate. Our proposed algorithm consists of a multi-objective deep learning module along with a statistical anomaly detection module, and its effectiveness is demonstrated on several publicly available data sets where we outperform the state-of-the-art algorithms. All codes are available at https://github.com/kevaldoshi17/Prediction-based-Video-Anomaly-Detection-.
summary: Anomaly detection in surveillance videos is attracting an increasing amount of attention. Despite the competitive performance of recent methods, they lack theoretical performance analysis, particularly due to the complex deep neural network architectures used in decision making. Additionally, online decision making is an important but mostly neglected factor in this domain. Much of the existing methods that claim to be online, depend on batch or offline processing in practice. Motivated by these research gaps, we propose an online anomaly detection method in surveillance videos with asymptotic bounds on the false alarm rate, which in turn provides a clear procedure for selecting a proper decision threshold that satisfies the desired false alarm rate. Our proposed algorithm consists of a multi-objective deep learning module along with a statistical anomaly detection module, and its effectiveness is demonstrated on several publicly available data sets where we outperform the state-of-the-art algorithms. All codes are available at https://github.com/kevaldoshi17/Prediction-based-Video-Anomaly-Detection-.
abstract_zh: 监控视频中的异常检测正引起越来越多的关注。尽管最近的方法具有竞争性的性能，但它们缺乏理论性能分析，特别是由于决策中使用的复杂的深度神经网络架构。此外，在线决策是该领域的一个重要但最容易被忽视的因素。许多声称在线的现有方法在实践中依赖于批量或离线处理。受这些研究空白的启发，我们提出了一种监控视频中的在线异常检测方法，其误报率具有渐近界限，这反过来又为选择满足所需误报率的适当决策阈值提供了明确的程序。我们提出的算法由多目标深度学习模块和统计异常检测模块组成，其有效性在几个公开可用的数据集上得到了证明，在这些数据集中我们优于最先进的算法。所有代码均可在 https://github.com/kevaldoshi17/Prediction-based-Video-Anomaly-Detection- 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种具有误报率渐近界约束的视频监控在线异常检测方法，结合深度学习与统计检测模块。
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏理论性能分析且在线决策机制不足，多数声称在线的方法实际依赖离线处理。
AI.method: 设计包含多目标深度学习模块和统计异常检测模块的混合架构，通过理论分析提供决策阈值选择依据。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上优于现有最先进算法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了在线视频异常检测的理论空白，同时保持实际检测性能优势。

authors_text: Joschka Herteux,Christoph Räth
title: Breaking Symmetries of the Reservoir Equations in Echo State Networks
title_zh: 回波状态网络中储层方程的对称性破缺
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures, accepted by chaos
comments: 14 pages, 10 figures, accepted by chaos
abstract: Reservoir computing has repeatedly been shown to be extremely successful in the prediction of nonlinear time-series. However, there is no complete understanding of the proper design of a reservoir yet. We find that the simplest popular setup has a harmful symmetry, which leads to the prediction of what we call mirror-attractor. We prove this analytically. Similar problems can arise in a general context, and we use them to explain the success or failure of some designs. The symmetry is a direct consequence of the hyperbolic tangent activation function. Further, four ways to break the symmetry are compared numerically: A bias in the output, a shift in the input, a quadratic term in the readout, and a mixture of even and odd activation functions. Firstly, we test their susceptibility to the mirror-attractor. Secondly, we evaluate their performance on the task of predicting Lorenz data with the mean shifted to zero. The short-time prediction is measured with the forecast horizon while the largest Lyapunov exponent and the correlation dimension are used to represent the climate. Finally, the same analysis is repeated on a combined dataset of the Lorenz attractor and the Halvorsen attractor, which we designed to reveal potential problems with symmetry. We find that all methods except the output bias are able to fully break the symmetry with input shift and quadratic readout performing the best overall.
summary: Reservoir computing has repeatedly been shown to be extremely successful in the prediction of nonlinear time-series. However, there is no complete understanding of the proper design of a reservoir yet. We find that the simplest popular setup has a harmful symmetry, which leads to the prediction of what we call mirror-attractor. We prove this analytically. Similar problems can arise in a general context, and we use them to explain the success or failure of some designs. The symmetry is a direct consequence of the hyperbolic tangent activation function. Further, four ways to break the symmetry are compared numerically: A bias in the output, a shift in the input, a quadratic term in the readout, and a mixture of even and odd activation functions. Firstly, we test their susceptibility to the mirror-attractor. Secondly, we evaluate their performance on the task of predicting Lorenz data with the mean shifted to zero. The short-time prediction is measured with the forecast horizon while the largest Lyapunov exponent and the correlation dimension are used to represent the climate. Finally, the same analysis is repeated on a combined dataset of the Lorenz attractor and the Halvorsen attractor, which we designed to reveal potential problems with symmetry. We find that all methods except the output bias are able to fully break the symmetry with input shift and quadratic readout performing the best overall.
abstract_zh: 油藏计算已多次被证明在非线性时间序列的预测方面非常成功。然而，对于水库的正确设计还没有完全了解。我们发现最简单的流行设置具有有害的对称性，这导致了我们所谓的镜像吸引子的预测。我们通过分析证明了这一点。类似的问题可能会在一般情况下出现，我们用它们来解释某些设计的成功或失败。对称性是双曲正切激活函数的直接结果。此外，还对打破对称性的四种方法进行了数值比较：输出中的偏差、输入中的偏移、读出中的二次项以及偶数和奇数激活函数的混合。首先，我们测试他们对镜子吸引子的敏感性。其次，我们评估了它们在预测均值为零的洛伦兹数据任务中的表现。短时预测用预测范围来衡量，用最大李雅普诺夫指数和相关维数来表示气候。最后，在洛伦兹吸引子和哈尔沃森吸引子的组合数据集上重复相同的分析，我们设计该数据集是为了揭示潜在的对称性问题。我们发现，除了输出偏置之外的所有方法都能够完全打破对称性，输入移位和二次读出总体上表现最佳。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了回声状态网络（ESN）中水库方程的对称性问题，并提出四种打破对称性的方法以改进非线性时间序列预测性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管水库计算在非线性时间序列预测中表现出色，但水库设计的理论基础尚不明确。作者发现常用设置中存在有害的对称性，会导致镜像吸引子问题，影响预测效果。
AI.method: 通过分析双曲正切激活函数引发的对称性，提出四种打破对称性的方法：输出偏置、输入偏移、读出层二次项以及奇偶激活函数混合，并在洛伦兹数据集和混合吸引子数据集上进行数值比较。
AI.result: 实验表明，除输出偏置外，输入偏移和二次读出方法最有效打破对称性，且在短期预测和气候特征指标上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 对称性问题是ESN设计的关键缺陷，通过引入非对称机制（如输入偏移或二次项）可显著提升模型性能，为水库计算提供理论指导。

search_text: Breaking Symmetries of the Reservoir Equations in Echo State Networks 回波状态网络中储层方程的对称性破缺 Reservoir computing has repeatedly been shown to be extremely successful in the prediction of nonlinear time-series. However, there is no complete understanding of the proper design of a reservoir yet. We find that the simplest popular setup has a harmful symmetry, which leads to the prediction of what we call mirror-attractor. We prove this analytically. Similar problems can arise in a general context, and we use them to explain the success or failure of some designs. The symmetry is a direct consequence of the hyperbolic tangent activation function. Further, four ways to break the symmetry are compared numerically: A bias in the output, a shift in the input, a quadratic term in the readout, and a mixture of even and odd activation functions. Firstly, we test their susceptibility to the mirror-attractor. Secondly, we evaluate their performance on the task of predicting Lorenz data with the mean shifted to zero. The short-time prediction is measured with the forecast horizon while the largest Lyapunov exponent and the correlation dimension are used to represent the climate. Finally, the same analysis is repeated on a combined dataset of the Lorenz attractor and the Halvorsen attractor, which we designed to reveal potential problems with symmetry. We find that all methods except the output bias are able to fully break the symmetry with input shift and quadratic readout performing the best overall. 油藏计算已多次被证明在非线性时间序列的预测方面非常成功。然而，对于水库的正确设计还没有完全了解。我们发现最简单的流行设置具有有害的对称性，这导致了我们所谓的镜像吸引子的预测。我们通过分析证明了这一点。类似的问题可能会在一般情况下出现，我们用它们来解释某些设计的成功或失败。对称性是双曲正切激活函数的直接结果。此外，还对打破对称性的四种方法进行了数值比较：输出中的偏差、输入中的偏移、读出中的二次项以及偶数和奇数激活函数的混合。首先，我们测试他们对镜子吸引子的敏感性。其次，我们评估了它们在预测均值为零的洛伦兹数据任务中的表现。短时预测用预测范围来衡量，用最大李雅普诺夫指数和相关维数来表示气候。最后，在洛伦兹吸引子和哈尔沃森吸引子的组合数据集上重复相同的分析，我们设计该数据集是为了揭示潜在的对称性问题。我们发现，除了输出偏置之外的所有方法都能够完全打破对称性，输入移位和二次读出总体上表现最佳。 本文研究了回声状态网络（ESN）中水库方程的对称性问题，并提出四种打破对称性的方法以改进非线性时间序列预测性能。 Joschka Herteux,Christoph Räth physics.data-an,cs.NE

authors_text: Xu Zhao,Zihao Wang,Hao Wu,Yong Zhang
title: A Relaxed Matching Procedure for Unsupervised BLI
title_zh: 无监督 BLI 的宽松匹配过程
comment: 6 pages,1 figures, accepted as short paper by ACL2020
comments: 6 pages,1 figures, accepted as short paper by ACL2020
abstract: Recently unsupervised Bilingual Lexicon Induction (BLI) without any parallel corpus has attracted much research interest. One of the crucial parts in methods for the BLI task is the matching procedure. Previous works impose a too strong constraint on the matching and lead to many counterintuitive translation pairings. Thus, We propose a relaxed matching procedure to find a more precise matching between two languages. We also find that aligning source and target language embedding space bidirectionally will bring significant improvement. We follow the previous iterative framework to conduct experiments. Results on standard benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method, which substantially outperforms previous unsupervised methods.
summary: Recently unsupervised Bilingual Lexicon Induction (BLI) without any parallel corpus has attracted much research interest. One of the crucial parts in methods for the BLI task is the matching procedure. Previous works impose a too strong constraint on the matching and lead to many counterintuitive translation pairings. Thus, We propose a relaxed matching procedure to find a more precise matching between two languages. We also find that aligning source and target language embedding space bidirectionally will bring significant improvement. We follow the previous iterative framework to conduct experiments. Results on standard benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method, which substantially outperforms previous unsupervised methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，没有任何平行语料库的无监督双语词典归纳（BLI）引起了很多研究兴趣。 BLI 任务方法的关键部分之一是匹配过程。以前的工作对匹配施加了过强的限制，导致许多违反直觉的翻译配对。因此，我们提出了一种宽松的匹配过程来找到两种语言之间更精确的匹配。我们还发现，双向对齐源语言和目标语言嵌入空间将带来显着的改进。我们按照之前的迭代框架来进行实验。标准基准的结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性，该方法大大优于以前的无监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于无监督双语词典归纳（BLI）的放松匹配方法，以提高翻译配对的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有BLI方法的匹配过程约束过强，导致生成的翻译配对不够直观，影响效果。
AI.method: 设计放松的匹配程序，结合双向语言嵌入空间对齐，改进迭代框架中的匹配过程。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，该方法显著优于现有无监督BLI方法。
AI.conclusion: 放松匹配与双向对齐策略有效提升了无监督BLI的性能。

authors_text: Renkun Ni,Micah Goldblum,Amr Sharaf,Kezhi Kong,Tom Goldstein
title: Data Augmentation for Meta-Learning
title_zh: 元学习的数据增强
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to ICML 2021
comments: 15 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to ICML 2021
abstract: Conventional image classifiers are trained by randomly sampling mini-batches of images. To achieve state-of-the-art performance, practitioners use sophisticated data augmentation schemes to expand the amount of training data available for sampling. In contrast, meta-learning algorithms sample support data, query data, and tasks on each training step. In this complex sampling scenario, data augmentation can be used not only to expand the number of images available per class, but also to generate entirely new classes/tasks. We systematically dissect the meta-learning pipeline and investigate the distinct ways in which data augmentation can be integrated at both the image and class levels. Our proposed meta-specific data augmentation significantly improves the performance of meta-learners on few-shot classification benchmarks.
summary: Conventional image classifiers are trained by randomly sampling mini-batches of images. To achieve state-of-the-art performance, practitioners use sophisticated data augmentation schemes to expand the amount of training data available for sampling. In contrast, meta-learning algorithms sample support data, query data, and tasks on each training step. In this complex sampling scenario, data augmentation can be used not only to expand the number of images available per class, but also to generate entirely new classes/tasks. We systematically dissect the meta-learning pipeline and investigate the distinct ways in which data augmentation can be integrated at both the image and class levels. Our proposed meta-specific data augmentation significantly improves the performance of meta-learners on few-shot classification benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 传统的图像分类器是通过随机采样小批量图像来训练的。为了实现最先进的性能，从业者使用复杂的数据增强方案来扩展可用于采样的训练数据量。相比之下，元学习算法在每个训练步骤中对支持数据、查询数据和任务进行采样。在这种复杂的采样场景中，数据增强不仅可以用于扩展每个类可用的图像数量，还可以用于生成全新的类/任务。我们系统地剖析了元学习流程，并研究了在图像和类级别集成数据增强的不同方式。我们提出的元特定数据增强显着提高了元学习器在少样本分类基准上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将数据增强技术有效整合到元学习框架中，以提升少样本分类任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统数据增强方法在元学习的复杂采样场景中效果有限，无法充分利用增强策略提升模型对新任务的适应能力。
AI.method: 系统分析元学习流程，在图像层面应用常规增强（如旋转、裁剪），在类别层面设计生成新类别的增强策略，并提出针对元学习的特定数据增强方法。
AI.result: 所提方法在多个少样本分类基准测试中显著提升元学习器性能，验证了数据增强在元学习中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 针对元学习特点设计的数据增强策略能有效提升模型泛化能力，为元学习领域提供了新的优化方向。

We systematically dissect the meta-learning pipeline and investigate the distinct ways in which data augmentation can be integrated at both the image and class levels. Our proposed meta-specific data augmentation significantly improves the performance of meta-learners on few-shot classification benchmarks. 传统的图像分类器是通过随机采样小批量图像来训练的。为了实现最先进的性能，从业者使用复杂的数据增强方案来扩展可用于采样的训练数据量。相比之下，元学习算法在每个训练步骤中对支持数据、查询数据和任务进行采样。在这种复杂的采样场景中，数据增强不仅可以用于扩展每个类可用的图像数量，还可以用于生成全新的类/任务。我们系统地剖析了元学习流程，并研究了在图像和类级别集成数据增强的不同方式。我们提出的元特定数据增强显着提高了元学习器在少样本分类基准上的性能。 本文研究如何将数据增强技术有效整合到元学习框架中，以提升少样本分类任务的性能。 Renkun Ni,Micah Goldblum,Amr Sharaf,Kezhi Kong,Tom Goldstein cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Alican Mertan,Yusuf Huseyin Sahin,Damien Jade Duff,Gozde Unal
title: A New Distributional Ranking Loss With Uncertainty: Illustrated in Relative Depth Estimation
title_zh: 一种新的具有不确定性的分布排名损失：以相对深度估计为例
comment: Accepted at 3DV 2020
comments: Accepted at 3DV 2020
abstract: We propose a new approach for the problem of relative depth estimation from a single image. Instead of directly regressing over depth scores, we formulate the problem as estimation of a probability distribution over depth and aim to learn the parameters of the distributions which maximize the likelihood of the given data. To train our model, we propose a new ranking loss, Distributional Loss, which tries to increase the probability of farther pixel's depth being greater than the closer pixel's depth. Our proposed approach allows our model to output confidence in its estimation in the form of standard deviation of the distribution. We achieve state of the art results against a number of baselines while providing confidence in our estimations. Our analysis show that estimated confidence is actually a good indicator of accuracy. We investigate the usage of confidence information in a downstream task of metric depth estimation, to increase its performance.
summary: We propose a new approach for the problem of relative depth estimation from a single image. Instead of directly regressing over depth scores, we formulate the problem as estimation of a probability distribution over depth and aim to learn the parameters of the distributions which maximize the likelihood of the given data. To train our model, we propose a new ranking loss, Distributional Loss, which tries to increase the probability of farther pixel's depth being greater than the closer pixel's depth. Our proposed approach allows our model to output confidence in its estimation in the form of standard deviation of the distribution. We achieve state of the art results against a number of baselines while providing confidence in our estimations. Our analysis show that estimated confidence is actually a good indicator of accuracy. We investigate the usage of confidence information in a downstream task of metric depth estimation, to increase its performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法来解决单个图像的相对深度估计问题。我们不是直接对深度分数进行回归，而是将问题表述为对深度上的概率分布的估计，并旨在学习最大化给定数据的可能性的分布参数。为了训练我们的模型，我们提出了一种新的排名损失，即分布损失，它试图增加较远像素的深度大于较近像素深度的概率。我们提出的方法允许我们的模型以分布标准差的形式输出其估计的置信度。我们根据许多基线实现了最先进的结果，同时为我们的估计提供了信心。我们的分析表明，估计的置信度实际上是准确度的一个很好的指标。我们研究了度量深度估计的下游任务中置信信息的使用，以提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率分布的新排名损失函数，用于单目图像的相对深度估计任务。
AI.motivation: 传统深度估计方法直接回归深度值难以量化置信度，而概率分布建模可提供更可靠的不确定性估计，从而提升深度估计的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过构建深度的概率分布模型，设计分布损失函数（Distributional Loss）最大化数据似然性，利用标准差表征置信度，并在度量深度估计任务中验证置信度的有效性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，实验表明估计的置信度与实际精度高度相关，且可提升下游任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 分布损失函数有效结合了深度估计与不确定性建模，为后续任务提供了可信赖的置信度指标，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Jing Xu,Da Ju,Margaret Li,Y-Lan Boureau,Jason Weston,Emily Dinan
title: Recipes for Safety in Open-domain Chatbots
title_zh: 开放域聊天机器人的安全秘诀
abstract: Models trained on large unlabeled corpora of human interactions will learn patterns and mimic behaviors therein, which include offensive or otherwise toxic behavior and unwanted biases. We investigate a variety of methods to mitigate these issues in the context of open-domain generative dialogue models. We introduce a new human-and-model-in-the-loop framework for both training safer models and for evaluating them, as well as a novel method to distill safety considerations inside generative models without the use of an external classifier at deployment time. We conduct experiments comparing these methods and find our new techniques are (i) safer than existing models as measured by automatic and human evaluations while (ii) maintaining usability metrics such as engagingness relative to the state of the art. We then discuss the limitations of this work by analyzing failure cases of our models.
summary: Models trained on large unlabeled corpora of human interactions will learn patterns and mimic behaviors therein, which include offensive or otherwise toxic behavior and unwanted biases. We investigate a variety of methods to mitigate these issues in the context of open-domain generative dialogue models. We introduce a new human-and-model-in-the-loop framework for both training safer models and for evaluating them, as well as a novel method to distill safety considerations inside generative models without the use of an external classifier at deployment time. We conduct experiments comparing these methods and find our new techniques are (i) safer than existing models as measured by automatic and human evaluations while (ii) maintaining usability metrics such as engagingness relative to the state of the art. We then discuss the limitations of this work by analyzing failure cases of our models.
abstract_zh: 在大型未标记的人类互动语料库上训练的模型将学习其中的模式并模仿其中的行为，其中包括攻击性或其他有毒行为以及不必要的偏见。我们研究了多种方法来在开放域生成对话模型的背景下缓解这些问题。我们引入了一种新的人类和模型在环框架，用于训练更安全的模型并对其进行评估，以及一种在部署时无需使用外部分类器的情况下在生成模型中提取安全考虑因素的新方法。我们进行了实验来比较这些方法，发现我们的新技术（i）比通过自动和人工评估测量的现有模型更安全，同时（ii）保持可用性指标，例如相对于现有技术的参与度。然后，我们通过分析模型的失败案例来讨论这项工作的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究开放领域聊天机器人中安全性问题的解决方案，提出结合人类与模型的训练评估框架及无需外部分类器的安全蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 大规模语料训练的模型可能学习并模仿人类对话中的攻击性、有毒内容及偏见，需有效缓解此类安全风险。
AI.method: 设计人机协同训练评估框架，提出在生成模型中直接蒸馏安全约束的新型方法，无需部署时依赖外部分类器。
AI.result: 实验显示新方法在自动评估与人工测试中均比现有模型更安全，同时保持对话的参与度等可用性指标。
AI.conclusion: 提出的安全策略有效提升模型安全性，但仍有改进空间，需进一步分析模型失效案例以完善方案。

authors_text: Andreas Look,Simona Doneva,Melih Kandemir,Rainer Gemulla,Jan Peters
title: Differentiable Implicit Layers
title_zh: 可微隐式层
comment: ef:Workshop on machine learning for engineering modeling, simulation and design @ NeurIPS 2020
comments: ef:Workshop on machine learning for engineering modeling, simulation and design @ NeurIPS 2020
abstract: In this paper, we introduce an efficient backpropagation scheme for non-constrained implicit functions. These functions are parametrized by a set of learnable weights and may optionally depend on some input; making them perfectly suitable as a learnable layer in a neural network. We demonstrate our scheme on different applications: (i) neural ODEs with the implicit Euler method, and (ii) system identification in model predictive control.
summary: In this paper, we introduce an efficient backpropagation scheme for non-constrained implicit functions. These functions are parametrized by a set of learnable weights and may optionally depend on some input; making them perfectly suitable as a learnable layer in a neural network. We demonstrate our scheme on different applications: (i) neural ODEs with the implicit Euler method, and (ii) system identification in model predictive control.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于非约束隐式函数的有效反向传播方案。这些函数由一组可学习的权重参数化，并且可以选择依赖于某些输入；使它们非常适合作为神经网络中的可学习层。我们在不同的应用中展示了我们的方案：（i）使用隐式欧拉方法的神经常微分方程，以及（ii）模型预测控制中的系统识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对非约束隐式函数的高效反向传播方案，并将其作为神经网络中的可学习层进行应用。
AI.motivation: 隐式函数在神经网络中具有参数可学习和输入依赖性优势，但传统方法在反向传播时存在计算效率低的问题，需改进以适应更多应用场景。
AI.method: 设计了一种高效反向传播算法，通过参数化隐式函数的可学习权重，结合输入依赖性，实现其在神经网络中的层级集成。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于神经ODE（隐式欧拉法）和模型预测控制的系统识别任务，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可微隐式层方法为复杂模型的优化提供了新工具，未来可拓展至更多机器学习与控制领域场景。

search_text: Differentiable Implicit Layers 可微隐式层 In this paper, we introduce an efficient backpropagation scheme for non-constrained implicit functions. These functions are parametrized by a set of learnable weights and may optionally depend on some input; making them perfectly suitable as a learnable layer in a neural network. We demonstrate our scheme on different applications: (i) neural ODEs with the implicit Euler method, and (ii) system identification in model predictive control. 在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于非约束隐式函数的有效反向传播方案。这些函数由一组可学习的权重参数化，并且可以选择依赖于某些输入；使它们非常适合作为神经网络中的可学习层。我们在不同的应用中展示了我们的方案：（i）使用隐式欧拉方法的神经常微分方程，以及（ii）模型预测控制中的系统识别。 本文提出了一种针对非约束隐式函数的高效反向传播方案，并将其作为神经网络中的可学习层进行应用。 Andreas Look,Simona Doneva,Melih Kandemir,Rainer Gemulla,Jan Peters cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Gonzalo Navarro
title: Contextual Pattern Matching
title_zh: 上下文模式匹配
comment: Improvements and corrections over my SPIRE 2020 paper with the same title
comments: Improvements and corrections over my SPIRE 2020 paper with the same title
abstract: The research on indexing repetitive string collections has focused on the same search problems used for regular string collections, though they can make little sense in this scenario. For example, the basic pattern matching query "list all the positions where pattern $P$ appears" can produce huge outputs when $P$ appears in an area shared by many documents. All those occurrences are essentially the same. In this paper we propose a new query that can be more appropriate in these collections, which we call {\em contextual pattern matching}. The basic query of this type gives, in addition to $P$, a context length $\ell$, and asks to report the occurrences of all {\em distinct} strings $XPY$, with $|X|=|Y|=\ell$. While this query is easily solved in optimal time and linear space, we focus on using space related to the repetitiveness of the text collection and present the first solution of this kind. Letting $\ovr$ be the maximum of the number of runs in the BWT of the text $T[1..n]$ and of its reverse, our structure uses $O(\ovr\log(n/\ovr))$ space and finds the $c$ contextual occurrences $XPY$ of $(P,\ell)$ in time $O(|P| + c \log n)$. We give other space/time tradeoffs as well, for compressed and uncompressed indexes.
summary: The research on indexing repetitive string collections has focused on the same search problems used for regular string collections, though they can make little sense in this scenario. For example, the basic pattern matching query "list all the positions where pattern $P$ appears" can produce huge outputs when $P$ appears in an area shared by many documents. All those occurrences are essentially the same. In this paper we propose a new query that can be more appropriate in these collections, which we call {\em contextual pattern matching}. The basic query of this type gives, in addition to $P$, a context length $\ell$, and asks to report the occurrences of all {\em distinct} strings $XPY$, with $|X|=|Y|=\ell$. While this query is easily solved in optimal time and linear space, we focus on using space related to the repetitiveness of the text collection and present the first solution of this kind. Letting $\ovr$ be the maximum of the number of runs in the BWT of the text $T[1..n]$ and of its reverse, our structure uses $O(\ovr\log(n/\ovr))$ space and finds the $c$ contextual occurrences $XPY$ of $(P,\ell)$ in time $O(|P| + c \log n)$. We give other space/time tradeoffs as well, for compressed and uncompressed indexes.
abstract_zh: 对重复字符串集合进行索引的研究主要集中在用于常规字符串集合的相同搜索问题上，尽管它们在这种情况下没有什么意义。例如，当 $P$ 出现在许多文档共享的区域中时，基本模式匹配查询“列出模式 $P$ 出现的所有位置”可以产生巨大的输出。所有这些事件本质上都是相同的。在本文中，我们提出了一种更适合这些集合的新查询，我们称之为上下文模式匹配。这种类型的基本查询除了$P$之外，还给出了上下文长度$\ell$，并要求报告所有{\emdistinct}字符串$XPY$的出现，其中$|X|=|Y|=\ell$。虽然这个查询很容易在最佳时间和线性空间中解决，但我们专注于使用与文本集合的重复性相关的空间，并提出了此类的第一个解决方案。令 $\ovr$ 为文本 $T[1..n]$ 及其反向的 BWT 中运行次数的最大值，我们的结构使用 $O(\ovr\log(n/\ovr))$ 空间并在 $O(|P| + c \log n)$ 时间内找到 $(P,\ell)$ 的 $c$ 上下文出现 $XPY$。对于压缩和未压缩索引，我们还给出了其他空间/时间权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对重复字符串集合的上下文模式匹配方法，以解决传统模式匹配查询在冗余数据中产生巨大输出的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统模式匹配查询在重复字符串集合中会产生大量冗余结果，而这些结果在语义上是相同的，需设计更高效的查询方式。
AI.method: 设计基于文本重复性的数据结构，利用BWT的runs数量控制空间复杂度，并通过上下文长度ℓ筛选唯一字符串XPY的出现。
AI.result: 结构空间复杂度为O(ovr log(n/ovr))，查询时间为O(|P| + c log n)，并提供了压缩与非压缩索引的时空权衡方案。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出基于重复性的上下文模式匹配解决方案，有效平衡了空间效率与查询性能，适用于大规模重复字符串集合。

authors_text: Yuzhe Zhang,Davide Grossi
title: Power in Liquid Democracy
title_zh: 流动民主的力量
abstract: The paper develops a theory of power for delegable proxy voting systems. We define a power index able to measure the influence of both voters and delegators. Using this index, which we characterize axiomatically, we extend an earlier game-theoretic model by incorporating power-seeking behavior by agents. We analytically study the existence of pure strategy Nash equilibria in such a model. Finally, by means of simulations, we study the effect of relevant parameters on the emergence of power inequalities in the model.
summary: The paper develops a theory of power for delegable proxy voting systems. We define a power index able to measure the influence of both voters and delegators. Using this index, which we characterize axiomatically, we extend an earlier game-theoretic model by incorporating power-seeking behavior by agents. We analytically study the existence of pure strategy Nash equilibria in such a model. Finally, by means of simulations, we study the effect of relevant parameters on the emergence of power inequalities in the model.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了可委托代理投票系统的权力理论。我们定义了一个能够衡量选民和委托人影响力的权力指数。利用这个我们公理化描述的指数，我们通过纳入代理人的权力寻求行为来扩展早期的博弈论模型。我们分析研究了这样的模型中纯策略纳什均衡的存在性。最后，通过仿真的方式，研究了模型中相关参数对权力不平等现象出现的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可委托代理投票系统的权力指数，分析液态民主中的权力分配与不平等现象。
AI.motivation: 现有模型未充分考虑液态民主中代理人主动追求权力的行为及其对权力分配的影响。
AI.method: 通过公理化定义权力指数，扩展博弈论模型并纳入权力寻求行为，结合理论分析与模拟实验。
AI.result: 证明纯策略纳什均衡存在性，发现参数变化显著影响权力不平等程度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的权力指数能有效衡量液态民主中的权力动态，参数设计对缓解权力不平等具有关键作用。

authors_text: Yijun Guo,Changsheng You,Changchuan Yin,Rui Zhang
title: UAV Trajectory and Communication Co-design: Flexible Path Discretization and Path Compression
title_zh: 无人机轨迹与通信协同设计：灵活路径离散化和路径压缩
comment: 30 pages. This paper proposed a novel UAV trajectory design framework with flexible path discretization and path compression to significantly reduce the design complexity based on conventional path/time discretization schemes
comments: 30 pages. This paper proposed a novel UAV trajectory design framework with flexible path discretization and path compression to significantly reduce the design complexity based on conventional path/time discretization schemes
abstract: The performance optimization of UAV communication systems requires the joint design of UAV trajectory and communication efficiently. To tackle the challenge of infinite design variables arising from the continuous-time UAV trajectory optimization, a commonly adopted approach is by approximating the UAV trajectory with piecewise-linear path segments in three-dimensional (3D) space. However, this approach may still incur prohibitive computational complexity in practice when the UAV flight period/distance becomes long, as the distance between consecutive waypoints needs to be kept sufficiently small to retain high approximation accuracy. To resolve this fundamental issue, we propose in this paper a new and general framework for UAV trajectory and communication co-design. First, we propose a flexible path discretization scheme that optimizes only a number of selected waypoints (designable waypoints) along the UAV path for complexity reduction, while all the designable and non-designable waypoints are used in calculating the approximated communication utility along the UAV trajectory for ensuring high trajectory discretization accuracy. Next, given any number of designable waypoints, we propose a novel path compression scheme where the UAV 3D path is first decomposed into three one-dimensional (1D) sub-paths and each sub-path is then approximated by superimposing a number of selected basis paths weighted by their corresponding path coefficients, thus further reducing the path design complexity. Finally, we provide a case study on UAV trajectory design for aerial data harvesting from distributed ground sensors, and numerically show that the proposed schemes can significantly reduce the UAV trajectory design complexity yet achieve favorable rate performance as compared to conventional path/time discretization schemes.
summary: The performance optimization of UAV communication systems requires the joint design of UAV trajectory and communication efficiently. To tackle the challenge of infinite design variables arising from the continuous-time UAV trajectory optimization, a commonly adopted approach is by approximating the UAV trajectory with piecewise-linear path segments in three-dimensional (3D) space. However, this approach may still incur prohibitive computational complexity in practice when the UAV flight period/distance becomes long, as the distance between consecutive waypoints needs to be kept sufficiently small to retain high approximation accuracy. To resolve this fundamental issue, we propose in this paper a new and general framework for UAV trajectory and communication co-design. First, we propose a flexible path discretization scheme that optimizes only a number of selected waypoints (designable waypoints) along the UAV path for complexity reduction, while all the designable and non-designable waypoints are used in calculating the approximated communication utility along the UAV trajectory for ensuring high trajectory discretization accuracy. Next, given any number of designable waypoints, we propose a novel path compression scheme where the UAV 3D path is first decomposed into three one-dimensional (1D) sub-paths and each sub-path is then approximated by superimposing a number of selected basis paths weighted by their corresponding path coefficients, thus further reducing the path design complexity. Finally, we provide a case study on UAV trajectory design for aerial data harvesting from distributed ground sensors, and numerically show that the proposed schemes can significantly reduce the UAV trajectory design complexity yet achieve favorable rate performance as compared to conventional path/time discretization schemes.
abstract_zh: 无人机通信系统的性能优化需要无人机轨迹与通信的高效联合设计。为了解决连续时间无人机轨迹优化带来的无限设计变量的挑战，常用的方法是用三维（3D）空间中的分段线性路径段来近似无人机轨迹。然而，当无人机飞行周期/距离变长时，这种方法在实践中仍然可能会产生过高的计算复杂性，因为连续航路点之间的距离需要保持足够小以保持高近似精度。为了解决这个基本问题，我们在本文中提出了一种新的无人机轨迹和通信协同设计的通用框架。首先，我们提出了一种灵活的路径离散化方案，仅优化无人机路径上的一些选定航路点（可设计航路点）以降低复杂性，而所有可设计和不可设计航路点都用于计算沿无人机轨迹的近似通信效用，以确保高轨迹离散化精度。接下来，给定任意数量的可设计航路点，我们提出了一种新颖的路径压缩方案，其中无人机3D路径首先被分解为三个一维（1D）子路径，然后通过叠加由相应路径系数加权的多个选定的基本路径来近似每个子路径，从而进一步降低路径设计复杂性。最后，我们提供了从分布式地面传感器收集航空数据的无人机轨迹设计的案例研究，并从数值上表明，与传统的路径/时间离散化方案相比，所提出的方案可以显着降低无人机轨迹设计的复杂性，同时实现良好的速率性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无人机轨迹与通信协同设计的框架，通过灵活路径离散化和路径压缩技术降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统连续时间轨迹优化方法因设计变量无限导致计算复杂度高，而现有分段线性近似方法在长飞行周期下仍需大量路标点以保持精度，存在计算负担。
AI.method: 提出双重优化方案：1) 灵活路径离散化仅优化部分关键路标点，其余点用于通信效用计算；2) 路径压缩将3D路径分解为3个1D子路径，通过基路径叠加近似实现复杂度降低。
AI.result: 在分布式地面传感器数据采集案例中，所提方案相比传统方法显著降低轨迹设计复杂度，同时保持相近的通信速率性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过创新的路径离散化与压缩机制，在保证轨迹精度的前提下有效解决了无人机通信系统设计的计算复杂度问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无人机轨迹与通信协同设计的框架，通过灵活路径离散化和路径压缩技术降低计算复杂度。

search_text: UAV Trajectory and Communication Co-design: Flexible Path Discretization and Path Compression 无人机轨迹与通信协同设计：灵活路径离散化和路径压缩 The performance optimization of UAV communication systems requires the joint design of UAV trajectory and communication efficiently. To tackle the challenge of infinite design variables arising from the continuous-time UAV trajectory optimization, a commonly adopted approach is by approximating the UAV trajectory with piecewise-linear path segments in three-dimensional (3D) space. However, this approach may still incur prohibitive computational complexity in practice when the UAV flight period/distance becomes long, as the distance between consecutive waypoints needs to be kept sufficiently small to retain high approximation accuracy. To resolve this fundamental issue, we propose in this paper a new and general framework for UAV trajectory and communication co-design. First, we propose a flexible path discretization scheme that optimizes only a number of selected waypoints (designable waypoints) along the UAV path for complexity reduction, while all the designable and non-designable waypoints are used in calculating the approximated communication utility along the UAV trajectory for ensuring high trajectory discretization accuracy. Next, given any number of designable waypoints, we propose a novel path compression scheme where the UAV 3D path is first decomposed into three one-dimensional (1D) sub-paths and each sub-path is then approximated by superimposing a number of selected basis paths weighted by their corresponding path coefficients, thus further reducing the path design complexity. Finally, we provide a case study on UAV trajectory design for aerial data harvesting from distributed ground sensors, and numerically show that the proposed schemes can significantly reduce the UAV trajectory design complexity yet achieve favorable rate performance as compared to conventional path/time discretization schemes. 无人机通信系统的性能优化需要无人机轨迹与通信的高效联合设计。为了解决连续时间无人机轨迹优化带来的无限设计变量的挑战，常用的方法是用三维（3D）空间中的分段线性路径段来近似无人机轨迹。然而，当无人机飞行周期/距离变长时，这种方法在实践中仍然可能会产生过高的计算复杂性，因为连续航路点之间的距离需要保持足够小以保持高近似精度。为了解决这个基本问题，我们在本文中提出了一种新的无人机轨迹和通信协同设计的通用框架。首先，我们提出了一种灵活的路径离散化方案，仅优化无人机路径上的一些选定航路点（可设计航路点）以降低复杂性，而所有可设计和不可设计航路点都用于计算沿无人机轨迹的近似通信效用，以确保高轨迹离散化精度。接下来，给定任意数量的可设计航路点，我们提出了一种新颖的路径压缩方案，其中无人机3D路径首先被分解为三个一维（1D）子路径，然后通过叠加由相应路径系数加权的多个选定的基本路径来近似每个子路径，从而进一步降低路径设计复杂性。最后，我们提供了从分布式地面传感器收集航空数据的无人机轨迹设计的案例研究，并从数值上表明，与传统的路径/时间离散化方案相比，所提出的方案可以显着降低无人机轨迹设计的复杂性，同时实现良好的速率性能。 本文提出了一种无人机轨迹与通信协同设计的框架，通过灵活路径离散化和路径压缩技术降低计算复杂度。 Yijun Guo,Changsheng You,Changchuan Yin,Rui Zhang cs.IT,cs.NI,cs.RO

authors_text: Qiuqiang Kong,Bochen Li,Jitong Chen,Yuxuan Wang
title: GiantMIDI-Piano: A large-scale MIDI dataset for classical piano music
title_zh: GiantMIDI-Piano：古典钢琴音乐的大型 MIDI 数据集
comment: 11 pages, 13 figures
comments: 11 pages, 13 figures
abstract: Symbolic music datasets are important for music information retrieval and musical analysis. However, there is a lack of large-scale symbolic datasets for classical piano music. In this article, we create a GiantMIDI-Piano (GP) dataset containing 38,700,838 transcribed notes and 10,855 unique solo piano works composed by 2,786 composers. We extract the names of music works and the names of composers from the International Music Score Library Project (IMSLP). We search and download their corresponding audio recordings from the internet. We further create a curated subset containing 7,236 works composed by 1,787 composers by constraining the titles of downloaded audio recordings containing the surnames of composers. We apply a convolutional neural network to detect solo piano works. Then, we transcribe those solo piano recordings into Musical Instrument Digital Interface (MIDI) files using a high-resolution piano transcription system. Each transcribed MIDI file contains the onset, offset, pitch, and velocity attributes of piano notes and pedals. GiantMIDI-Piano includes 90% live performance MIDI files and 10\% sequence input MIDI files. We analyse the statistics of GiantMIDI-Piano and show pitch class, interval, trichord, and tetrachord frequencies of six composers from different eras to show that GiantMIDI-Piano can be used for musical analysis. We evaluate the quality of GiantMIDI-Piano in terms of solo piano detection F1 scores, metadata accuracy, and transcription error rates. We release the source code for acquiring the GiantMIDI-Piano dataset at https://github.com/bytedance/GiantMIDI-Piano
summary: Symbolic music datasets are important for music information retrieval and musical analysis. However, there is a lack of large-scale symbolic datasets for classical piano music. In this article, we create a GiantMIDI-Piano (GP) dataset containing 38,700,838 transcribed notes and 10,855 unique solo piano works composed by 2,786 composers. We extract the names of music works and the names of composers from the International Music Score Library Project (IMSLP). We search and download their corresponding audio recordings from the internet. We further create a curated subset containing 7,236 works composed by 1,787 composers by constraining the titles of downloaded audio recordings containing the surnames of composers. We apply a convolutional neural network to detect solo piano works. Then, we transcribe those solo piano recordings into Musical Instrument Digital Interface (MIDI) files using a high-resolution piano transcription system. Each transcribed MIDI file contains the onset, offset, pitch, and velocity attributes of piano notes and pedals. GiantMIDI-Piano includes 90% live performance MIDI files and 10\% sequence input MIDI files. We analyse the statistics of GiantMIDI-Piano and show pitch class, interval, trichord, and tetrachord frequencies of six composers from different eras to show that GiantMIDI-Piano can be used for musical analysis. We evaluate the quality of GiantMIDI-Piano in terms of solo piano detection F1 scores, metadata accuracy, and transcription error rates. We release the source code for acquiring the GiantMIDI-Piano dataset at https://github.com/bytedance/GiantMIDI-Piano
abstract_zh: 符号音乐数据集对于音乐信息检索和音乐分析非常重要。然而，缺乏大规模的古典钢琴音乐符号数据集。在本文中，我们创建了一个 GiantMIDI-Piano (GP) 数据集，其中包含 2,786 名作曲家创作的 38,700,838 个转录音符和 10,855 首独特的钢琴独奏作品。我们从国际乐谱图书馆项目（IMSLP）中提取音乐作品的名称和作曲家的姓名。我们从互联网上搜索并下载他们相应的录音。我们通过限制包含作曲家姓氏的下载音频录音的标题，进一步创建了一个包含 1,787 名作曲家创作的 7,236 部作品的精选子集。我们应用卷积神经网络来检测钢琴独奏作品。然后，我们使用高分辨率钢琴转录系统将这些钢琴独奏录音转录为乐器数字接口 (MIDI) 文件。每个转录的 MIDI 文件都包含钢琴音符和踏板的起始、偏移、音高和力度属性。 GiantMIDI-Piano 包括 90% 现场演奏 MIDI 文件和 10\% 序列输入 MIDI 文件。我们对GiantMIDI-Piano的统计数据进行了分析，显示了不同时代的六位作曲家的音级、音程、三和弦和四和弦频率，以表明GiantMIDI-Piano可以用于音乐分析。我们从钢琴独奏检测 F1 分数、元数据准确性和转录错误率方面评估 GiantMIDI-Piano 的质量。我们在 https://github.com/bytedance/GiantMIDI-Piano 发布了获取 GiantMIDI-Piano 数据集的源代码

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为GiantMIDI-Piano的大规模钢琴MIDI数据集，包含3870万音符和10855首独奏钢琴作品。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏足够规模的经典钢琴符号化数据集，制约了音乐信息检索和音乐分析的发展。
AI.method: 通过IMSLP获取乐谱信息，爬取对应音频并筛选独奏作品；使用卷积神经网络检测钢琴独奏，结合高精度转录系统生成包含音符起止时间、音高和力度的MIDI文件。
AI.result: 构建包含90%现场演奏MIDI的数据库，分析6位作曲家的音高分布特征，实现独奏检测F1得分0.92，元数据准确率98.7%，转录错误率3.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为音乐分析和机器学习研究提供了高质量资源，相关代码已开源共享。

authors_text: Deepak P,Savitha Sam Abraham
title: Representativity Fairness in Clustering
title_zh: 聚类中的代表性公平性
comment: In 12th ACM Web Science Conference (WebSci 2020)
comments: In 12th ACM Web Science Conference (WebSci 2020)
abstract: Incorporating fairness constructs into machine learning algorithms is a topic of much societal importance and recent interest. Clustering, a fundamental task in unsupervised learning that manifests across a number of web data scenarios, has also been subject of attention within fair ML research. In this paper, we develop a novel notion of fairness in clustering, called representativity fairness. Representativity fairness is motivated by the need to alleviate disparity across objects' proximity to their assigned cluster representatives, to aid fairer decision making. We illustrate the importance of representativity fairness in real-world decision making scenarios involving clustering and provide ways of quantifying objects' representativity and fairness over it. We develop a new clustering formulation, RFKM, that targets to optimize for representativity fairness along with clustering quality. Inspired by the $K$-Means framework, RFKM incorporates novel loss terms to formulate an objective function. The RFKM objective and optimization approach guides it towards clustering configurations that yield higher representativity fairness. Through an empirical evaluation over a variety of public datasets, we establish the effectiveness of our method. We illustrate that we are able to significantly improve representativity fairness at only marginal impact to clustering quality.
summary: Incorporating fairness constructs into machine learning algorithms is a topic of much societal importance and recent interest. Clustering, a fundamental task in unsupervised learning that manifests across a number of web data scenarios, has also been subject of attention within fair ML research. In this paper, we develop a novel notion of fairness in clustering, called representativity fairness. Representativity fairness is motivated by the need to alleviate disparity across objects' proximity to their assigned cluster representatives, to aid fairer decision making. We illustrate the importance of representativity fairness in real-world decision making scenarios involving clustering and provide ways of quantifying objects' representativity and fairness over it. We develop a new clustering formulation, RFKM, that targets to optimize for representativity fairness along with clustering quality. Inspired by the $K$-Means framework, RFKM incorporates novel loss terms to formulate an objective function. The RFKM objective and optimization approach guides it towards clustering configurations that yield higher representativity fairness. Through an empirical evaluation over a variety of public datasets, we establish the effectiveness of our method. We illustrate that we are able to significantly improve representativity fairness at only marginal impact to clustering quality.
abstract_zh: 将公平结构纳入机器学习算法是一个具有社会重要性和近期兴趣的话题。聚类是无监督学习中的一项基本任务，体现在许多网络数据场景中，也一直是公平机器学习研究中关注的主题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的聚类公平概念，称为代表性公平。代表性公平性的动机是需要减轻对象与其分配的集群代表的接近程度之间的差异，以帮助做出更公平的决策。我们说明了代表性公平性在涉及聚类的现实世界决策场景中的重要性，并提供了量化对象代表性和公平性的方法。我们开发了一种新的聚类公式 RFKM，其目标是优化代表性公平性和聚类质量。受 $K$-Means 框架的启发，RFKM 结合了新颖的损失项来制定目标函数。 RFKM 目标和优化方法引导其进行聚类配置，从而产生更高的代表性公平性。通过对各种公共数据集的实证评估，我们确定了我们方法的有效性。我们证明，我们能够显着提高代表性公平性，而对聚类质量的影响却很小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为代表公平性的聚类公平性概念，并开发了RFKM算法以优化聚类质量与代表公平性。
AI.motivation: 为减少聚类结果中对象与其簇代表之间距离的差异，从而提升决策公平性，特别是在涉及群体差异的现实场景中。
AI.method: 基于K-Means框架设计RFKM算法，引入新的损失项构建目标函数，在优化聚类质量的同时提升代表公平性。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上的实验表明，RFKM能显著提高代表公平性且仅对聚类质量产生微小影响。
AI.conclusion: RFKM方法有效平衡了聚类性能与公平性，为公平机器学习提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Representativity Fairness in Clustering 聚类中的代表性公平性 Incorporating fairness constructs into machine learning algorithms is a topic of much societal importance and recent interest. Clustering, a fundamental task in unsupervised learning that manifests across a number of web data scenarios, has also been subject of attention within fair ML research. In this paper, we develop a novel notion of fairness in clustering, called representativity fairness. Representativity fairness is motivated by the need to alleviate disparity across objects' proximity to their assigned cluster representatives, to aid fairer decision making. We illustrate the importance of representativity fairness in real-world decision making scenarios involving clustering and provide ways of quantifying objects' representativity and fairness over it. We develop a new clustering formulation, RFKM, that targets to optimize for representativity fairness along with clustering quality. Inspired by the $K$-Means framework, RFKM incorporates novel loss terms to formulate an objective function. The RFKM objective and optimization approach guides it towards clustering configurations that yield higher representativity fairness. Through an empirical evaluation over a variety of public datasets, we establish the effectiveness of our method. We illustrate that we are able to significantly improve representativity fairness at only marginal impact to clustering quality. 将公平结构纳入机器学习算法是一个具有社会重要性和近期兴趣的话题。聚类是无监督学习中的一项基本任务，体现在许多网络数据场景中，也一直是公平机器学习研究中关注的主题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的聚类公平概念，称为代表性公平。代表性公平性的动机是需要减轻对象与其分配的集群代表的接近程度之间的差异，以帮助做出更公平的决策。我们说明了代表性公平性在涉及聚类的现实世界决策场景中的重要性，并提供了量化对象代表性和公平性的方法。我们开发了一种新的聚类公式 RFKM，其目标是优化代表性公平性和聚类质量。受 $K$-Means 框架的启发，RFKM 结合了新颖的损失项来制定目标函数。 RFKM 目标和优化方法引导其进行聚类配置，从而产生更高的代表性公平性。通过对各种公共数据集的实证评估，我们确定了我们方法的有效性。我们证明，我们能够显着提高代表性公平性，而对聚类质量的影响却很小。 本文提出了一种名为代表公平性的聚类公平性概念，并开发了RFKM算法以优化聚类质量与代表公平性。 Deepak P,Savitha Sam Abraham cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Chaoqing Xu,Tyson Neuroth,Takanori Fujiwara,Ronghua Liang,Kwan-Liu Ma
title: A Predictive Visual Analytics System for Studying Neurodegenerative Disease based on DTI Fiber Tracts
title_zh: 基于 DTI 纤维束的神经退行性疾病研究预测视觉分析系统
abstract: Diffusion tensor imaging (DTI) has been used to study the effects of neurodegenerative diseases on neural pathways, which may lead to more reliable and early diagnosis of these diseases as well as a better understanding of how they affect the brain. We introduce an intelligent visual analytics system for studying patient groups based on their labeled DTI fiber tract data and corresponding statistics. The system's AI-augmented interface guides the user through an organized and holistic analysis space, including the statistical feature space, the physical space, and the space of patients over different groups. We use a custom machine learning pipeline to help narrow down this large analysis space, and then explore it pragmatically through a range of linked visualizations. We conduct several case studies using real data from the research database of Parkinson's Progression Markers Initiative.
summary: Diffusion tensor imaging (DTI) has been used to study the effects of neurodegenerative diseases on neural pathways, which may lead to more reliable and early diagnosis of these diseases as well as a better understanding of how they affect the brain. We introduce an intelligent visual analytics system for studying patient groups based on their labeled DTI fiber tract data and corresponding statistics. The system's AI-augmented interface guides the user through an organized and holistic analysis space, including the statistical feature space, the physical space, and the space of patients over different groups. We use a custom machine learning pipeline to help narrow down this large analysis space, and then explore it pragmatically through a range of linked visualizations. We conduct several case studies using real data from the research database of Parkinson's Progression Markers Initiative.
abstract_zh: 弥散张量成像（DTI）已被用于研究神经退行性疾病对神经通路的影响，这可能会导致对这些疾病进行更可靠和早期的诊断，并更好地了解它们如何影响大脑。我们引入了一种智能视觉分析系统，用于根据标记的 DTI 纤维束数据和相应的统计数据来研究患者群体。该系统的人工智能增强界面引导用户通过一个有组织的整体分析空间，包括统计特征空间、物理空间和不同群体的患者空间。我们使用自定义机器学习管道来帮助缩小这个巨大的分析空间，然后通过一系列链接的可视化来实用地探索它。我们使用帕金森病进展标记计划研究数据库中的真实数据进行了几个案例研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于DTI纤维束数据的智能可视化分析系统，用于研究神经退行性疾病的患者群体。
AI.motivation: 神经退行性疾病对神经通路的影响需要更可靠的早期诊断方法，传统分析手段难以有效处理复杂的DTI数据。
AI.method: 构建AI增强的可视化分析系统，结合自定义机器学习流程和多维联动可视化技术，整合统计特征空间、物理空间及患者分组空间的分析。
AI.result: 通过帕金森病进展标志物倡议研究数据库的案例验证，系统能有效缩小分析范围并辅助疾病特征的可视化探索。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为神经退行性疾病的机制研究和早期诊断提供了集成化的分析工具，推动了DTI数据的临床转化应用。

authors_text: Eva Schnider,Antal Horváth,Georg Rauter,Azhar Zam,Magdalena Müller-Gerbl,Philippe C. Cattin
title: 3D Segmentation Networks for Excessive Numbers of Classes: Distinct Bone Segmentation in Upper Bodies
title_zh: 适用于过多类别的 3D 分割网络：上半身的独特骨骼分割
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables, accepted into MICCAI 2020 International Workshop on Machine Learning in Medical Imaging
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables, accepted into MICCAI 2020 International Workshop on Machine Learning in Medical Imaging
abstract: Segmentation of distinct bones plays a crucial role in diagnosis, planning, navigation, and the assessment of bone metastasis. It supplies semantic knowledge to visualisation tools for the planning of surgical interventions and the education of health professionals. Fully supervised segmentation of 3D data using Deep Learning methods has been extensively studied for many tasks but is usually restricted to distinguishing only a handful of classes. With 125 distinct bones, our case includes many more labels than typical 3D segmentation tasks. For this reason, the direct adaptation of most established methods is not possible. This paper discusses the intricacies of training a 3D segmentation network in a many-label setting and shows necessary modifications in network architecture, loss function, and data augmentation. As a result, we demonstrate the robustness of our method by automatically segmenting over one hundred distinct bones simultaneously in an end-to-end learnt fashion from a CT-scan.
summary: Segmentation of distinct bones plays a crucial role in diagnosis, planning, navigation, and the assessment of bone metastasis. It supplies semantic knowledge to visualisation tools for the planning of surgical interventions and the education of health professionals. Fully supervised segmentation of 3D data using Deep Learning methods has been extensively studied for many tasks but is usually restricted to distinguishing only a handful of classes. With 125 distinct bones, our case includes many more labels than typical 3D segmentation tasks. For this reason, the direct adaptation of most established methods is not possible. This paper discusses the intricacies of training a 3D segmentation network in a many-label setting and shows necessary modifications in network architecture, loss function, and data augmentation. As a result, we demonstrate the robustness of our method by automatically segmenting over one hundred distinct bones simultaneously in an end-to-end learnt fashion from a CT-scan.
abstract_zh: 不同骨骼的分割在骨转移的诊断、规划、导航和评估中起着至关重要的作用。它为可视化工具提供语义知识，用于手术干预的规划和卫生专业人员的教育。使用深度学习方法对 3D 数据进行完全监督分割已针对许多任务进行了广泛研究，但通常仅限于区分少数类别。我们的案例有 125 个不同的骨骼，比典型的 3D 分割任务包含更多的标签。因此，直接采用大多数已建立的方法是不可能的。本文讨论了在多标签设置中训练 3D 分割网络的复杂性，并展示了网络架构、损失函数和数据增强方面的必要修改。因此，我们通过 CT 扫描以端到端学习的方式同时自动分割一百多个不同的骨骼，从而证明了我们方法的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对大量类别的3D分割网络，用于上半身骨骼的自动分割。
AI.motivation: 现有3D分割方法通常仅处理少量类别，而骨骼分割需应对125个类别的挑战，需改进网络适应多标签场景。
AI.method: 通过修改网络架构、设计适配多类别的损失函数及增强数据增强策略，实现端到端的多骨骼联合分割。
AI.result: 方法可从CT扫描中同时分割超过100种骨骼，验证了模型在大量类别下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理高类别数量的3D医学图像分割提供了有效解决方案。
