authors_text: Oren Barkan,Yonatan Fuchs,Avi Caciularu,Noam Koenigstein
title: Explainable Recommendations via Attentive Multi-Persona Collaborative Filtering
title_zh: 通过细心的多角色协作过滤提供可解释的建议
comment: Accepted to RecSys 2020
comments: Accepted to RecSys 2020
abstract: Two main challenges in recommender systems are modeling users with heterogeneous taste, and providing explainable recommendations. In this paper, we propose the neural Attentive Multi-Persona Collaborative Filtering (AMP-CF) model as a unified solution for both problems. AMP-CF breaks down the user to several latent 'personas' (profiles) that identify and discern the different tastes and inclinations of the user. Then, the revealed personas are used to generate and explain the final recommendation list for the user. AMP-CF models users as an attentive mixture of personas, enabling a dynamic user representation that changes based on the item under consideration. We demonstrate AMP-CF on five collaborative filtering datasets from the domains of movies, music, video games and social networks. As an additional contribution, we propose a novel evaluation scheme for comparing the different items in a recommendation list based on the distance from the underlying distribution of "tastes" in the user's historical items. Experimental results show that AMP-CF is competitive with other state-of-the-art models. Finally, we provide qualitative results to showcase the ability of AMP-CF to explain its recommendations.
summary: Two main challenges in recommender systems are modeling users with heterogeneous taste, and providing explainable recommendations. In this paper, we propose the neural Attentive Multi-Persona Collaborative Filtering (AMP-CF) model as a unified solution for both problems. AMP-CF breaks down the user to several latent 'personas' (profiles) that identify and discern the different tastes and inclinations of the user. Then, the revealed personas are used to generate and explain the final recommendation list for the user. AMP-CF models users as an attentive mixture of personas, enabling a dynamic user representation that changes based on the item under consideration. We demonstrate AMP-CF on five collaborative filtering datasets from the domains of movies, music, video games and social networks. As an additional contribution, we propose a novel evaluation scheme for comparing the different items in a recommendation list based on the distance from the underlying distribution of "tastes" in the user's historical items. Experimental results show that AMP-CF is competitive with other state-of-the-art models. Finally, we provide qualitative results to showcase the ability of AMP-CF to explain its recommendations.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统的两个主要挑战是对具有不同品味的用户进行建模，并提供可解释的推荐。在本文中，我们提出神经注意力多角色协同过滤（AMP-CF）模型作为这两个问题的统一解决方案。 AMP-CF 将用户分解为几个潜在的“角色”（配置文件），用于识别和辨别用户的不同品味和倾向。然后，使用揭示的人物角色为用户生成并解释最终的推荐列表。 AMP-CF 将用户建模为角色的精心组合，从而实现根据所考虑的项目而变化的动态用户表示。我们在电影、音乐、视频游戏和社交网络领域的五个协同过滤数据集上演示了 AMP-CF。作为额外的贡献，我们提出了一种新颖的评估方案，用于根据与用户历史项目中“品味”的基本分布的距离来比较推荐列表中的不同项目。实验结果表明 AMP-CF 与其他最先进的模型相比具有竞争力。最后，我们提供定性结果来展示 AMP-CF 解释其建议的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AMP-CF的神经网络模型，通过分解用户为多个潜在'personas'来解决推荐系统中用户异质品味建模与可解释性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统难以同时处理用户多样化品味建模和推荐结果的可解释性需求，需设计统一解决方案以提升推荐透明度与用户信任度。
AI.method: 构建Attentive Multi-Persona Collaborative Filtering模型，将用户表示为动态混合的多个personas，通过注意力机制关联不同persona，并设计基于历史项目分布距离的评估方案。
AI.result: 在电影、音乐等五个数据集上验证，AMP-CF在推荐性能上与先进模型相当，且能生成有效解释推荐结果的persona组合依据。
AI.conclusion: AMP-CF通过多persona分解与注意力机制实现了推荐可解释性与性能的平衡，为可解释推荐系统提供了新方法论与评估框架。

authors_text: David Higgins
title: OnRAMP for Regulating AI in Medical Products
title_zh: OnRAMP 用于监管医疗产品中的人工智能
comment: 46 pages, 3 tables, 1 figure. Published in Advanced Intelligent Systems, July 2021. (See DOI link)
comments: 46 pages, 3 tables, 1 figure. Published in Advanced Intelligent Systems, July 2021. (See DOI link)
abstract: Medical Artificial Intelligence (AI) involves the application of machine learning algorithms to biomedical datasets in order to improve medical practices. Products incorporating medical AI require certification before deployment in most jurisdictions. To date, clear pathways for regulating medical AI are still under development. Below the level of formal pathways lies the actual practice of developing a medical AI solution. This Perspective proposes best practice guidelines for development compatible with the production of a regulatory package which, regardless of the formal regulatory path, will form a core component of a certification process. The approach is predicated on a statistical risk perspective, typical of medical device regulators, and a deep understanding of machine learning methodologies. These guidelines will allow all parties to communicate more clearly in the development of a common Good Machine Learning Practice (GMLP), and thus lead to the enhanced development of both medical AI products and regulations.
summary: Medical Artificial Intelligence (AI) involves the application of machine learning algorithms to biomedical datasets in order to improve medical practices. Products incorporating medical AI require certification before deployment in most jurisdictions. To date, clear pathways for regulating medical AI are still under development. Below the level of formal pathways lies the actual practice of developing a medical AI solution. This Perspective proposes best practice guidelines for development compatible with the production of a regulatory package which, regardless of the formal regulatory path, will form a core component of a certification process. The approach is predicated on a statistical risk perspective, typical of medical device regulators, and a deep understanding of machine learning methodologies. These guidelines will allow all parties to communicate more clearly in the development of a common Good Machine Learning Practice (GMLP), and thus lead to the enhanced development of both medical AI products and regulations.
abstract_zh: 医疗人工智能 (AI) 涉及将机器学习算法应用于生物医学数据集，以改善医疗实践。纳入医疗人工智能的产品在大多数司法管辖区部署之前都需要经过认证。迄今为止，监管医疗人工智能的明确途径仍在制定中。在正式途径的层面之下是开发医疗人工智能解决方案的实际实践。本视角提出了与监管包的生产兼容的开发最佳实践指南，无论正式监管路径如何，该指南都将构成认证过程的核心组成部分。该方法基于医疗器械监管机构典型的统计风险视角以及对机器学习方法的深刻理解。这些指南将使各方在制定共同的良好机器学习实践（GMLP）时能够更清晰地沟通，从而促进医疗人工智能产品和法规的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一套医疗AI产品监管的最佳实践指南，旨在促进监管文件的生成并提升产品开发与监管的兼容性。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗AI监管路径不明确，实际开发中缺乏统一标准，导致监管沟通效率低且产品合规性难以保障。
AI.method: 基于医疗设备监管的统计风险视角与机器学习方法论，制定可兼容不同监管路径的通用良好机器学习实践（GMLP）框架。
AI.result: 形成可指导医疗AI开发与监管的标准化指南，推动产品开发方与监管机构间的高效协作。
AI.conclusion: 通过建立GMLP框架，可同步提升医疗AI产品的质量与监管体系的适应性，加速合规化进程。

authors_text: Marlesson R. O. Santana,Luckeciano C. Melo,Fernando H. F. Camargo,Bruno Brandão,Anderson Soares,Renan M. Oliveira,Sandor Caetano
title: MARS-Gym: A Gym framework to model, train, and evaluate Recommender Systems for Marketplaces
title_zh: MARS-Gym：用于建模、训练和评估市场推荐系统的 Gym 框架
comment: 15 pages, 14 figures, see https://github.com/deeplearningbrasil/mars-gym
comments: 15 pages, 14 figures, see https://github.com/deeplearningbrasil/mars-gym
abstract: Recommender Systems are especially challenging for marketplaces since they must maximize user satisfaction while maintaining the healthiness and fairness of such ecosystems. In this context, we observed a lack of resources to design, train, and evaluate agents that learn by interacting within these environments. For this matter, we propose MARS-Gym, an open-source framework to empower researchers and engineers to quickly build and evaluate Reinforcement Learning agents for recommendations in marketplaces. MARS-Gym addresses the whole development pipeline: data processing, model design and optimization, and multi-sided evaluation. We also provide the implementation of a diverse set of baseline agents, with a metrics-driven analysis of them in the Trivago marketplace dataset, to illustrate how to conduct a holistic assessment using the available metrics of recommendation, off-policy estimation, and fairness. With MARS-Gym, we expect to bridge the gap between academic research and production systems, as well as to facilitate the design of new algorithms and applications.
summary: Recommender Systems are especially challenging for marketplaces since they must maximize user satisfaction while maintaining the healthiness and fairness of such ecosystems. In this context, we observed a lack of resources to design, train, and evaluate agents that learn by interacting within these environments. For this matter, we propose MARS-Gym, an open-source framework to empower researchers and engineers to quickly build and evaluate Reinforcement Learning agents for recommendations in marketplaces. MARS-Gym addresses the whole development pipeline: data processing, model design and optimization, and multi-sided evaluation. We also provide the implementation of a diverse set of baseline agents, with a metrics-driven analysis of them in the Trivago marketplace dataset, to illustrate how to conduct a holistic assessment using the available metrics of recommendation, off-policy estimation, and fairness. With MARS-Gym, we expect to bridge the gap between academic research and production systems, as well as to facilitate the design of new algorithms and applications.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统对于市场来说尤其具有挑战性，因为它们必须最大限度地提高用户满意度，同时保持此类生态系统的健康和公平。在这种情况下，我们发现缺乏设计、训练和评估通过在这些环境中交互进行学习的代理的资源。为此，我们提出了 MARS-Gym，这是一个开源框架，使研究人员和工程师能够快速构建和评估强化学习代理，以在市场中进行推荐。 MARS-Gym 解决整个开发流程：数据处理、模型设计和优化以及多边评估。我们还提供了一组不同的基线代理的实现，并在 Trivago 市场数据集中对它们进行了指标驱动的分析，以说明如何使用可用的推荐指标、离策略估计和公平性进行整体评估。通过 MARS-Gym，我们希望弥合学术研究和生产系统之间的差距，并促进新算法和应用程序的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MARS-Gym框架，用于快速构建和评估市场推荐系统的强化学习代理。
AI.motivation: 市场推荐系统需平衡用户满意度与生态公平性，但缺乏相关工具支持算法设计与评估。
AI.method: 开发开源框架MARS-Gym，涵盖数据处理、模型优化、多维度评估，并提供基线代理及Trivago数据集的指标分析。
AI.result: 通过Trivago数据集验证了框架有效性，展示了推荐、离线估计和公平性指标的综合评估方法。
AI.conclusion: MARS-Gym弥合了学术研究与工业应用的差距，促进推荐算法创新与实际部署。

ai_content.result: 通过Trivago数据集验证了框架有效性，展示了推荐、离线估计和公平性指标的综合评估方法。

tldr: 本文提出MARS-Gym框架，用于快速构建和评估市场推荐系统的强化学习代理。
motivation: 市场推荐系统需平衡用户满意度与生态公平性，但缺乏相关工具支持算法设计与评估。
method: 开发开源框架MARS-Gym，涵盖数据处理、模型优化、多维度评估，并提供基线代理及Trivago数据集的指标分析。
result: 通过Trivago数据集验证了框架有效性，展示了推荐、离线估计和公平性指标的综合评估方法。
conclusion: MARS-Gym弥合了学术研究与工业应用的差距，促进推荐算法创新与实际部署。
search_text: MARS-Gym: A Gym framework to model, train, and evaluate Recommender Systems for Marketplaces MARS-Gym：用于建模、训练和评估市场推荐系统的 Gym 框架 Recommender Systems are especially challenging for marketplaces since they must maximize user satisfaction while maintaining the healthiness and fairness of such ecosystems. In this context, we observed a lack of resources to design, train, and evaluate agents that learn by interacting within these environments. For this matter, we propose MARS-Gym, an open-source framework to empower researchers and engineers to quickly build and evaluate Reinforcement Learning agents for recommendations in marketplaces. MARS-Gym addresses the whole development pipeline: data processing, model design and optimization, and multi-sided evaluation. We also provide the implementation of a diverse set of baseline agents, with a metrics-driven analysis of them in the Trivago marketplace dataset, to illustrate how to conduct a holistic assessment using the available metrics of recommendation, off-policy estimation, and fairness. With MARS-Gym, we expect to bridge the gap between academic research and production systems, as well as to facilitate the design of new algorithms and applications. 推荐系统对于市场来说尤其具有挑战性，因为它们必须最大限度地提高用户满意度，同时保持此类生态系统的健康和公平。在这种情况下，我们发现缺乏设计、训练和评估通过在这些环境中交互进行学习的代理的资源。为此，我们提出了 MARS-Gym，这是一个开源框架，使研究人员和工程师能够快速构建和评估强化学习代理，以在市场中进行推荐。 MARS-Gym 解决整个开发流程：数据处理、模型设计和优化以及多边评估。我们还提供了一组不同的基线代理的实现，并在 Trivago 市场数据集中对它们进行了指标驱动的分析，以说明如何使用可用的推荐指标、离策略估计和公平性进行整体评估。通过 MARS-Gym，我们希望弥合学术研究和生产系统之间的差距，并促进新算法和应用程序的设计。 本文提出MARS-Gym框架，用于快速构建和评估市场推荐系统的强化学习代理。 Marlesson R. O. Santana,Luckeciano C. Melo,Fernando H. F. Camargo,Bruno Brandão,Anderson Soares,Renan M. Oliveira,Sandor Caetano cs.IR,cs.HC,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: David Leslie
title: Understanding bias in facial recognition technologies
title_zh: 了解面部识别技术中的偏见
comment: 49 pages
comments: 49 pages
abstract: Over the past couple of years, the growing debate around automated facial recognition has reached a boiling point. As developers have continued to swiftly expand the scope of these kinds of technologies into an almost unbounded range of applications, an increasingly strident chorus of critical voices has sounded concerns about the injurious effects of the proliferation of such systems. Opponents argue that the irresponsible design and use of facial detection and recognition technologies (FDRTs) threatens to violate civil liberties, infringe on basic human rights and further entrench structural racism and systemic marginalisation. They also caution that the gradual creep of face surveillance infrastructures into every domain of lived experience may eventually eradicate the modern democratic forms of life that have long provided cherished means to individual flourishing, social solidarity and human self-creation. Defenders, by contrast, emphasise the gains in public safety, security and efficiency that digitally streamlined capacities for facial identification, identity verification and trait characterisation may bring. In this explainer, I focus on one central aspect of this debate: the role that dynamics of bias and discrimination play in the development and deployment of FDRTs. I examine how historical patterns of discrimination have made inroads into the design and implementation of FDRTs from their very earliest moments. And, I explain the ways in which the use of biased FDRTs can lead distributional and recognitional injustices. The explainer concludes with an exploration of broader ethical questions around the potential proliferation of pervasive face-based surveillance infrastructures and makes some recommendations for cultivating more responsible approaches to the development and governance of these technologies.

Defenders, by contrast, emphasise the gains in public safety, security and efficiency that digitally streamlined capacities for facial identification, identity verification and trait characterisation may bring. In this explainer, I focus on one central aspect of this debate: the role that dynamics of bias and discrimination play in the development and deployment of FDRTs. I examine how historical patterns of discrimination have made inroads into the design and implementation of FDRTs from their very earliest moments. And, I explain the ways in which the use of biased FDRTs can lead distributional and recognitional injustices. The explainer concludes with an exploration of broader ethical questions around the potential proliferation of pervasive face-based surveillance infrastructures and makes some recommendations for cultivating more responsible approaches to the development and governance of these technologies.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，围绕自动面部识别的争论日益激烈，已经达到了沸点。随着开发人员继续迅速将此类技术的范围扩展到几乎无限的应用范围，越来越尖锐的批评声音引起了人们对此类系统扩散的有害影响的担忧。反对者认为，面部检测和识别技术（FDRT）的不负责任的设计和使用有可能侵犯公民自由，侵犯基本人权，并进一步加剧结构性种族主义和系统性边缘化。他们还警告说，面部监控基础设施逐渐渗透到生活体验的各个领域，可能最终会消除现代民主的生活方式，而这种生活方式长期以来一直为个人繁荣、社会团结和人类自我创造提供了宝贵的手段。相比之下，捍卫者强调，数字化简化的面部识别、身份验证和特征表征能力可能会带来公共安全、安保和效率方面的收益。在这篇解释中，我重点关注这场辩论的一个核心方面：偏见和歧视动态在 FDRT 的制定和部署中所发挥的作用。我研究了历史上的歧视模式是如何从最早的时刻就影响到 FDRT 的设计和实施的。我还解释了使用有偏见的 FDRT 可能导致分配和认可不公正的方式。解释者最后探讨了围绕普遍的基于面部的监控基础设施的潜在扩散的更广泛的道德问题，并提出了一些建议，以培养更负责任的方法来开发和治理这些技术。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨面部识别技术（FDRTs）开发与应用中的偏见和歧视问题，分析其如何导致分配和识别不公，并提出伦理治理建议。
AI.motivation: 随着面部识别技术的广泛应用，其潜在的偏见和歧视问题引发对公民自由、人权及结构性种族主义的担忧，需系统分析其社会影响。
AI.method: 通过批判性分析历史歧视模式对FDRTs设计的影响，结合技术应用案例，阐释偏见如何导致不公，并探讨伦理治理框架。
AI.result: 揭示历史歧视如何嵌入技术开发过程，导致对特定群体的识别错误与系统性不公，同时提出技术治理与伦理规范的改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 需通过伦理审查、算法透明化及多方参与治理，减少FDRTs的偏见影响，平衡安全效率与社会公平，防止监控技术对民主社会的侵蚀。

authors_text: Alexis Morris,Hallie Siegel,Jonathan Kelly
title: Towards a Policy-as-a-Service Framework to Enable Compliant, Trustworthy AI and HRI Systems in the Wild
title_zh: 建立政策即服务框架，以实现合规、值得信赖的人工智能和 HRI 系统
comment: In Proceedings of the AAAI Fall Symposium on Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction: Trust & Explainability in Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction (AI-HRI'20)
comments: In Proceedings of the AAAI Fall Symposium on Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction: Trust & Explainability in Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction (AI-HRI'20)
abstract: Building trustworthy autonomous systems is challenging for many reasons beyond simply trying to engineer agents that 'always do the right thing.' There is a broader context that is often not considered within AI and HRI: that the problem of trustworthiness is inherently socio-technical and ultimately involves a broad set of complex human factors and multidimensional relationships that can arise between agents, humans, organizations, and even governments and legal institutions, each with their own understanding and definitions of trust. This complexity presents a significant barrier to the development of trustworthy AI and HRI systems---while systems developers may desire to have their systems 'always do the right thing,' they generally lack the practical tools and expertise in law, regulation, policy and ethics to ensure this outcome. In this paper, we emphasize the "fuzzy" socio-technical aspects of trustworthiness and the need for their careful consideration during both design and deployment. We hope to contribute to the discussion of trustworthy engineering in AI and HRI by i) describing the policy landscape that must be considered when addressing trustworthy computing and the need for usable trust models, ii) highlighting an opportunity for trustworthy-by-design intervention within the systems engineering process, and iii) introducing the concept of a "policy-as-a-service" (PaaS) framework that can be readily applied by AI systems engineers to address the fuzzy problem of trust during the development and (eventually) runtime process. We envision that the PaaS approach, which offloads the development of policy design parameters and maintenance of policy standards to policy experts, will enable runtime trust capabilities intelligent systems in the wild.

There is a broader context that is often not considered within AI and HRI: that the problem of trustworthiness is inherently socio-technical and ultimately involves a broad set of complex human factors and multidimensional relationships that can arise between agents, humans, organizations, and even governments and legal institutions, each with their own understanding and definitions of trust. This complexity presents a significant barrier to the development of trustworthy AI and HRI systems---while systems developers may desire to have their systems 'always do the right thing,' they generally lack the practical tools and expertise in law, regulation, policy and ethics to ensure this outcome. In this paper, we emphasize the "fuzzy" socio-technical aspects of trustworthiness and the need for their careful consideration during both design and deployment. We hope to contribute to the discussion of trustworthy engineering in AI and HRI by i) describing the policy landscape that must be considered when addressing trustworthy computing and the need for usable trust models, ii) highlighting an opportunity for trustworthy-by-design intervention within the systems engineering process, and iii) introducing the concept of a "policy-as-a-service" (PaaS) framework that can be readily applied by AI systems engineers to address the fuzzy problem of trust during the development and (eventually) runtime process. We envision that the PaaS approach, which offloads the development of policy design parameters and maintenance of policy standards to policy experts, will enable runtime trust capabilities intelligent systems in the wild.
abstract_zh: 构建值得信赖的自主系统具有挑战性，原因有很多，而不仅仅是试图设计“总是做正确的事情”的代理。人工智能和人机交互中往往没有考虑到更广泛的背景：可信度问题本质上是社会技术问题，最终涉及一系列复杂的人为因素和多维关系，这些关系可能出现在代理人、人类、组织、甚至政府和法律机构之间，每个人都有自己对信任的理解和定义。这种复杂性对可信人工智能和人机交互系统的开发构成了重大障碍——虽然系统开发人员可能希望他们的系统“始终做正确的事”，但他们通常缺乏法律、法规、政策和道德方面的实用工具和专业知识来确保这一结果。在本文中，我们强调可信度的“模糊”社会技术方面以及在设计和部署过程中仔细考虑的必要性。我们希望通过i）描述在解决可信计算和可用信任模型的需求时必须考虑的政策环境，ii）强调在系统工程过程中进行可信设计干预的机会，以及iii）引入“策略即服务”（PaaS）框架的概念，人工智能系统工程师可以很容易地应用该框架来解决开发过程中的模糊信任问题，并（最终）为人工智能和HRI中可信工程的讨论做出贡献。运行时进程。我们设想，PaaS 方法将政策设计参数的开发和政策标准的维护工作交给政策专家，将在野外实现智能系统的运行时信任功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'策略即服务'(PaaS)的框架，旨在解决人工智能与人机交互系统在实际应用中的可信度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI和HRI系统开发缺乏处理复杂社会技术因素的实用工具，开发者难以将法律、伦理等多维信任要求融入系统设计。
AI.method: 通过分析政策环境需求，提出可信设计干预机制，并构建由政策专家维护的PaaS框架，将策略参数设计与标准维护从开发流程中分离。
AI.result: 形成了可应用于系统开发全周期的PaaS概念模型，使智能系统能够在运行时动态调用专业政策标准实现信任保障。
AI.conclusion: PaaS框架通过专业化分工有效应对了AI系统在真实场景中的信任难题，为可信系统工程提供了新的实现路径。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为'策略即服务'(PaaS)的框架，旨在解决人工智能与人机交互系统在实际应用中的可信度问题。
motivation: 现有AI和HRI系统开发缺乏处理复杂社会技术因素的实用工具，开发者难以将法律、伦理等多维信任要求融入系统设计。
method: 通过分析政策环境需求，提出可信设计干预机制，并构建由政策专家维护的PaaS框架，将策略参数设计与标准维护从开发流程中分离。
result: 形成了可应用于系统开发全周期的PaaS概念模型，使智能系统能够在运行时动态调用专业政策标准实现信任保障。
conclusion: PaaS框架通过专业化分工有效应对了AI系统在真实场景中的信任难题，为可信系统工程提供了新的实现路径。
search_text: Towards a Policy-as-a-Service Framework to Enable Compliant, Trustworthy AI and HRI Systems in the Wild 建立政策即服务框架，以实现合规、值得信赖的人工智能和 HRI 系统 Building trustworthy autonomous systems is challenging for many reasons beyond simply trying to engineer agents that 'always do the right thing.' There is a broader context that is often not considered within AI and HRI: that the problem of trustworthiness is inherently socio-technical and ultimately involves a broad set of complex human factors and multidimensional relationships that can arise between agents, humans, organizations, and even governments and legal institutions, each with their own understanding and definitions of trust. This complexity presents a significant barrier to the development of trustworthy AI and HRI systems---while systems developers may desire to have their systems 'always do the right thing,' they generally lack the practical tools and expertise in law, regulation, policy and ethics to ensure this outcome. In this paper, we emphasize the "fuzzy" socio-technical aspects of trustworthiness and the need for their careful consideration during both design and deployment. We hope to contribute to the discussion of trustworthy engineering in AI and HRI by i) describing the policy landscape that must be considered when addressing trustworthy computing and the need for usable trust models, ii) highlighting an opportunity for trustworthy-by-design intervention within the systems engineering process, and iii) introducing the concept of a "policy-as-a-service" (PaaS) framework that can be readily applied by AI systems engineers to address the fuzzy problem of trust during the development and (eventually) runtime process. We envision that the PaaS approach, which offloads the development of policy design parameters and maintenance of policy standards to policy experts, will enable runtime trust capabilities intelligent systems in the wild. 构建值得信赖的自主系统具有挑战性，原因有很多，而不仅仅是试图设计“总是做正确的事情”的代理。人工智能和人机交互中往往没有考虑到更广泛的背景：可信度问题本质上是社会技术问题，最终涉及一系列复杂的人为因素和多维关系，这些关系可能出现在代理人、人类、组织、甚至政府和法律机构之间，每个人都有自己对信任的理解和定义。这种复杂性对可信人工智能和人机交互系统的开发构成了重大障碍——虽然系统开发人员可能希望他们的系统“始终做正确的事”，但他们通常缺乏法律、法规、政策和道德方面的实用工具和专业知识来确保这一结果。在本文中，我们强调可信度的“模糊”社会技术方面以及在设计和部署过程中仔细考虑的必要性。我们希望通过i）描述在解决可信计算和可用信任模型的需求时必须考虑的政策环境，ii）强调在系统工程过程中进行可信设计干预的机会，以及iii）引入“策略即服务”（PaaS）框架的概念，人工智能系统工程师可以很容易地应用该框架来解决开发过程中的模糊信任问题，并（最终）为人工智能和HRI中可信工程的讨论做出贡献。运行时进程。我们设想，PaaS 方法将政策设计参数的开发和政策标准的维护工作交给政策专家，将在野外实现智能系统的运行时信任功能。 本文提出一种名为'策略即服务'(PaaS)的框架，旨在解决人工智能与人机交互系统在实际应用中的可信度问题。 Alexis Morris,Hallie Siegel,Jonathan Kelly cs.CY,cs.HC,cs.RO,cs.SE

authors_text: Zhantao Deng,Jan Bednařík,Mathieu Salzmann,Pascal Fua
title: Better Patch Stitching for Parametric Surface Reconstruction
title_zh: 更好的补丁缝合参数化表面重建
comment: Accepted to 3DV 2020
comments: Accepted to 3DV 2020
abstract: Recently, parametric mappings have emerged as highly effective surface representations, yielding low reconstruction error. In particular, the latest works represent the target shape as an atlas of multiple mappings, which can closely encode object parts. Atlas representations, however, suffer from one major drawback: The individual mappings are not guaranteed to be consistent, which results in holes in the reconstructed shape or in jagged surface areas. We introduce an approach that explicitly encourages global consistency of the local mappings. To this end, we introduce two novel loss terms. The first term exploits the surface normals and requires that they remain locally consistent when estimated within and across the individual mappings. The second term further encourages better spatial configuration of the mappings by minimizing novel stitching error. We show on standard benchmarks that the use of normal consistency requirement outperforms the baselines quantitatively while enforcing better stitching leads to much better visual quality of the reconstructed objects as compared to the state-of-the-art.
summary: Recently, parametric mappings have emerged as highly effective surface representations, yielding low reconstruction error. In particular, the latest works represent the target shape as an atlas of multiple mappings, which can closely encode object parts. Atlas representations, however, suffer from one major drawback: The individual mappings are not guaranteed to be consistent, which results in holes in the reconstructed shape or in jagged surface areas. We introduce an approach that explicitly encourages global consistency of the local mappings. To this end, we introduce two novel loss terms. The first term exploits the surface normals and requires that they remain locally consistent when estimated within and across the individual mappings. The second term further encourages better spatial configuration of the mappings by minimizing novel stitching error. We show on standard benchmarks that the use of normal consistency requirement outperforms the baselines quantitatively while enforcing better stitching leads to much better visual quality of the reconstructed objects as compared to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 最近，参数化映射已成为高效的表面表示，可产生较低的重建误差。特别是，最新的作品将目标形状表示为多个映射的图集，可以紧密地编码对象部分。然而，图集表示存在一个主要缺点：不能保证各个映射的一致性，这会导致重建形状中出现孔洞或锯齿状表面区域。我们引入了一种明确鼓励局部映射的全局一致性的方法。为此，我们引入了两个新颖的损失项。第一项利用表面法线，并要求它们在各个映射内部和之间进行估计时保持局部一致。第二项通过最小化新的拼接误差进一步鼓励更好的映射空间配置。我们在标准基准测试中表明，与最先进的技术相比，使用正态一致性要求在数量上优于基线，同时实施更好的拼接可以使重建对象的视觉质量好得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的补丁拼接方法，通过引入两个新损失项解决参数化表面重建中局部映射不一致导致的孔洞和锯齿问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多映射图集的表面重建方法存在局部映射不一致问题，导致重建形状出现孔洞或锯齿状表面，影响重建质量。
AI.method: 设计两个新型损失项：1）通过表面法向量保持局部一致性；2）通过最小化新型拼接误差优化映射空间配置。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，法向量一致性约束使定量指标优于基线，拼接优化显著提升重建物体的视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过显式保证局部映射全局一致性，在重建精度和视觉效果上均优于现有最先进方法。

authors_text: David Bouget,André Pedersen,Sayied Abdol Mohieb Hosainey,Johanna Vanel,Ole Solheim,Ingerid Reinertsen
title: Fast meningioma segmentation in T1-weighted MRI volumes using a lightweight 3D deep learning architecture
title_zh: 使用轻量级 3D 深度学习架构在 T1 加权 MRI 体积中快速分割脑膜瘤
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, submitted to SPIE journal of Medical Imaging
comments: 15 pages, 7 figures, submitted to SPIE journal of Medical Imaging
abstract: Automatic and consistent meningioma segmentation in T1-weighted MRI volumes and corresponding volumetric assessment is of use for diagnosis, treatment planning, and tumor growth evaluation. In this paper, we optimized the segmentation and processing speed performances using a large number of both surgically treated meningiomas and untreated meningiomas followed at the outpatient clinic. We studied two different 3D neural network architectures: (i) a simple encoder-decoder similar to a 3D U-Net, and (ii) a lightweight multi-scale architecture (PLS-Net). In addition, we studied the impact of different training schemes. For the validation studies, we used 698 T1-weighted MR volumes from St. Olav University Hospital, Trondheim, Norway. The models were evaluated in terms of detection accuracy, segmentation accuracy and training/inference speed. While both architectures reached a similar Dice score of 70% on average, the PLS-Net was more accurate with an F1-score of up to 88%. The highest accuracy was achieved for the largest meningiomas. Speed-wise, the PLS-Net architecture tended to converge in about 50 hours while 130 hours were necessary for U-Net. Inference with PLS-Net takes less than a second on GPU and about 15 seconds on CPU. Overall, with the use of mixed precision training, it was possible to train competitive segmentation models in a relatively short amount of time using the lightweight PLS-Net architecture. In the future, the focus should be brought toward the segmentation of small meningiomas (less than 2ml) to improve clinical relevance for automatic and early diagnosis as well as speed of growth estimates.
summary: Automatic and consistent meningioma segmentation in T1-weighted MRI volumes and corresponding volumetric assessment is of use for diagnosis, treatment planning, and tumor growth evaluation. In this paper, we optimized the segmentation and processing speed performances using a large number of both surgically treated meningiomas and untreated meningiomas followed at the outpatient clinic. We studied two different 3D neural network architectures: (i) a simple encoder-decoder similar to a 3D U-Net, and (ii) a lightweight multi-scale architecture (PLS-Net). In addition, we studied the impact of different training schemes. For the validation studies, we used 698 T1-weighted MR volumes from St. Olav University Hospital, Trondheim, Norway. The models were evaluated in terms of detection accuracy, segmentation accuracy and training/inference speed. While both architectures reached a similar Dice score of 70% on average, the PLS-Net was more accurate with an F1-score of up to 88%. The highest accuracy was achieved for the largest meningiomas. Speed-wise, the PLS-Net architecture tended to converge in about 50 hours while 130 hours were necessary for U-Net. Inference with PLS-Net takes less than a second on GPU and about 15 seconds on CPU. Overall, with the use of mixed precision training, it was possible to train competitive segmentation models in a relatively short amount of time using the lightweight PLS-Net architecture. In the future, the focus should be brought toward the segmentation of small meningiomas (less than 2ml) to improve clinical relevance for automatic and early diagnosis as well as speed of growth estimates.
abstract_zh: T1 加权 MRI 体积中自动且一致的脑膜瘤分割和相应的体积评估可用于诊断、治疗计划和肿瘤生长评估。在本文中，我们使用大量经过手术治疗的脑膜瘤和门诊中未经治疗的脑膜瘤来优化分割和处理速度性能。我们研究了两种不同的 3D 神经网络架构：(i) 类似于 3D U-Net 的简单编码器-解码器，以及 (ii) 轻量级多尺度架构 (PLS-Net)。此外，我们还研究了不同培训计划的影响。对于验证研究，我们使用了来自挪威特隆赫姆圣奥拉夫大学医院的 698 个 T1 加权 MR 体积。从检测精度、分割精度和训练/推理速度方面评估模型。虽然两种架构的 Dice 分数平均为 70%，但 PLS-Net 的准确度更高，F1 分数高达 88%。最大的脑膜瘤达到了最高的准确度。从速度来看，PLS-Net 架构倾向于在大约 50 小时内收敛，而 U-Net 需要 130 小时。使用 PLS-Net 进行推理在 GPU 上花费不到一秒，在 CPU 上花费大约 15 秒。总体而言，通过使用混合精度训练，可以使用轻量级 PLS-Net 架构在相对较短的时间内训练有竞争力的分割模型。未来，重点应放在小脑膜瘤（小于2ml）的分割上，以提高自动和早期诊断以及生长速度估计的临床相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级3D深度学习架构（PLS-Net），用于加速T1加权MRI体积中的脑膜瘤分割。
AI.motivation: 自动且一致的脑膜瘤分割对临床诊断和治疗评估至关重要，但现有方法在速度和精度上存在不足，需优化分割效率并提升小肿瘤检测能力。
AI.method: 对比两种3D网络架构（3D U-Net类似结构与轻量级多尺度PLS-Net），结合混合精度训练，使用698例MRI数据验证检测精度、分割准确率及训练/推理速度。
AI.result: PLS-Net在F1分数达88%（优于U-Net的Dice 70%），训练时间缩短至50小时（U-Net需130小时），GPU推理仅需1秒，CPU约15秒。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级PLS-Net在速度与精度间取得平衡，未来需进一步优化小体积脑膜瘤（<2ml）分割以增强临床实用性。

In addition, we studied the impact of different training schemes. For the validation studies, we used 698 T1-weighted MR volumes from St. Olav University Hospital, Trondheim, Norway. While both architectures reached a similar Dice score of 70% on average, the PLS-Net was more accurate with an F1-score of up to 88%. The highest accuracy was achieved for the largest meningiomas. Speed-wise, the PLS-Net architecture tended to converge in about 50 hours while 130 hours were necessary for U-Net. Inference with PLS-Net takes less than a second on GPU and about 15 seconds on CPU. Overall, with the use of mixed precision training, it was possible to train competitive segmentation models in a relatively short amount of time using the lightweight PLS-Net architecture. In the future, the focus should be brought toward the segmentation of small meningiomas (less than 2ml) to improve clinical relevance for automatic and early diagnosis as well as speed of growth estimates. T1 加权 MRI 体积中自动且一致的脑膜瘤分割和相应的体积评估可用于诊断、治疗计划和肿瘤生长评估。在本文中，我们使用大量经过手术治疗的脑膜瘤和门诊中未经治疗的脑膜瘤来优化分割和处理速度性能。我们研究了两种不同的 3D 神经网络架构：(i) 类似于 3D U-Net 的简单编码器-解码器，以及 (ii) 轻量级多尺度架构 (PLS-Net)。此外，我们还研究了不同培训计划的影响。对于验证研究，我们使用了来自挪威特隆赫姆圣奥拉夫大学医院的 698 个 T1 加权 MR 体积。从检测精度、分割精度和训练/推理速度方面评估模型。虽然两种架构的 Dice 分数平均为 70%，但 PLS-Net 的准确度更高，F1 分数高达 88%。最大的脑膜瘤达到了最高的准确度。从速度来看，PLS-Net 架构倾向于在大约 50 小时内收敛，而 U-Net 需要 130 小时。使用 PLS-Net 进行推理在 GPU 上花费不到一秒，在 CPU 上花费大约 15 秒。总体而言，通过使用混合精度训练，可以使用轻量级 PLS-Net 架构在相对较短的时间内训练有竞争力的分割模型。未来，重点应放在小脑膜瘤（小于2ml）的分割上，以提高自动和早期诊断以及生长速度估计的临床相关性。 本文提出一种轻量级3D深度学习架构（PLS-Net），用于加速T1加权MRI体积中的脑膜瘤分割。 David Bouget,André Pedersen,Sayied Abdol Mohieb Hosainey,Johanna Vanel,Ole Solheim,Ingerid Reinertsen eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ştefan Postăvaru,Anton Tsitsulin,Filipe Miguel Gonçalves de Almeida,Yingtao Tian,Silvio Lattanzi,Bryan Perozzi
title: InstantEmbedding: Efficient Local Node Representations
title_zh: InstantEmbedding：高效的本地节点表示
comment: 23 pages, 9 figures
comments: 23 pages, 9 figures
abstract: In this paper, we introduce InstantEmbedding, an efficient method for generating single-node representations using local PageRank computations. We theoretically prove that our approach produces globally consistent representations in sublinear time. We demonstrate this empirically by conducting extensive experiments on real-world datasets with over a billion edges. Our experiments confirm that InstantEmbedding requires drastically less computation time (over 9,000 times faster) and less memory (by over 8,000 times) to produce a single node's embedding than traditional methods including DeepWalk, node2vec, VERSE, and FastRP. We also show that our method produces high quality representations, demonstrating results that meet or exceed the state of the art for unsupervised representation learning on tasks like node classification and link prediction.
summary: In this paper, we introduce InstantEmbedding, an efficient method for generating single-node representations using local PageRank computations. We theoretically prove that our approach produces globally consistent representations in sublinear time. We demonstrate this empirically by conducting extensive experiments on real-world datasets with over a billion edges. Our experiments confirm that InstantEmbedding requires drastically less computation time (over 9,000 times faster) and less memory (by over 8,000 times) to produce a single node's embedding than traditional methods including DeepWalk, node2vec, VERSE, and FastRP. We also show that our method produces high quality representations, demonstrating results that meet or exceed the state of the art for unsupervised representation learning on tasks like node classification and link prediction.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 InstantEmbedding，这是一种使用本地 PageRank 计算生成单节点表示的有效方法。我们从理论上证明，我们的方法可以在亚线性时间内产生全局一致的表示。我们通过对具有超过十亿条边的现实数据集进行广泛的实验来实证证明这一点。我们的实验证实，与 DeepWalk、node2vec、VERSE 和 FastRP 等传统方法相比，InstantEmbedding 生成单个节点嵌入所需的计算时间（快 9,000 倍以上）和内存（快 8,000 倍以上）所需的计算时间大大减少。我们还表明，我们的方法可以产生高质量的表示，展示出满足或超过节点分类和链接预测等任务的无监督表示学习的最新技术水平的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于局部PageRank计算的高效单节点表示方法，用于图数据中的节点嵌入生成。
AI.motivation: 传统节点嵌入方法在计算时间和内存消耗上存在显著瓶颈，难以处理大规模图数据。
AI.method: 通过局部PageRank计算生成单节点表示，理论证明其能在子线性时间内实现全局一致的表示。
AI.result: 在超十亿边的真实数据集上，计算速度比DeepWalk等方法快9000倍以上，内存消耗低8000倍，且效果达到或超越现有最优。
AI.conclusion: InstantEmbedding在保持表示质量的同时实现了图嵌入的高效计算，适用于大规模图数据场景。

authors_text: Marshall Burke,Anne Driscoll,David B. Lobell,Stefano Ermon
title: Using satellite imagery to understand and promote sustainable development
title_zh: 利用卫星图像了解和促进可持续发展
abstract: Accurate and comprehensive measurements of a range of sustainable development outcomes are fundamental inputs into both research and policy. We synthesize the growing literature that uses satellite imagery to understand these outcomes, with a focus on approaches that combine imagery with machine learning. We quantify the paucity of ground data on key human-related outcomes and the growing abundance and resolution (spatial, temporal, and spectral) of satellite imagery. We then review recent machine learning approaches to model-building in the context of scarce and noisy training data, highlighting how this noise often leads to incorrect assessment of models' predictive performance. We quantify recent model performance across multiple sustainable development domains, discuss research and policy applications, explore constraints to future progress, and highlight key research directions for the field.
summary: Accurate and comprehensive measurements of a range of sustainable development outcomes are fundamental inputs into both research and policy. We synthesize the growing literature that uses satellite imagery to understand these outcomes, with a focus on approaches that combine imagery with machine learning. We quantify the paucity of ground data on key human-related outcomes and the growing abundance and resolution (spatial, temporal, and spectral) of satellite imagery. We then review recent machine learning approaches to model-building in the context of scarce and noisy training data, highlighting how this noise often leads to incorrect assessment of models' predictive performance. We quantify recent model performance across multiple sustainable development domains, discuss research and policy applications, explore constraints to future progress, and highlight key research directions for the field.
abstract_zh: 对一系列可持续发展成果的准确和全面的衡量是研究和政策的基本投入。我们综合了越来越多的文献，这些文献使用卫星图像来理解这些结果，重点关注将图像与机器学习相结合的方法。我们量化了与人类相关的关键结果的地面数据的匮乏以及卫星图像日益丰富和分辨率（空间、时间和光谱）。然后，我们回顾了在稀缺且嘈杂的训练数据背景下构建模型的最新机器学习方法，强调了这种噪音通常如何导致对模型预测性能的错误评估。我们量化多个可持续发展领域的最新模型表现，讨论研究和政策应用，探索未来进展的限制，并强调该领域的关键研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述利用卫星图像结合机器学习方法测量可持续发展目标的现状与挑战。
AI.motivation: 地面数据不足制约可持续发展研究，而卫星图像在分辨率和覆盖范围上持续进步，需探索其与机器学习的结合潜力。
AI.method: 综合分析卫星图像技术发展与机器学习模型构建方法，评估模型在稀疏噪声数据下的性能表现。
AI.result: 量化多领域模型性能，揭示数据噪声对评估的影响，提出跨学科协作等未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 卫星图像与机器学习结合可提升可持续发展监测能力，但需解决数据质量与模型可靠性问题。

authors_text: Sruthi Gorantla,Amit Deshpande,Anand Louis
title: On the Problem of Underranking in Group-Fair Ranking
title_zh: 论团体公平排名中排名靠后的问题
comment: 27 pages
comments: 27 pages
abstract: Search and recommendation systems, such as search engines, recruiting tools, online marketplaces, news, and social media, output ranked lists of content, products, and sometimes, people. Credit ratings, standardized tests, risk assessments output only a score, but are also used implicitly for ranking. Bias in such ranking systems, especially among the top ranks, can worsen social and economic inequalities, polarize opinions, and reinforce stereotypes. On the other hand, a bias correction for minority groups can cause more harm if perceived as favoring group-fair outcomes over meritocracy. In this paper, we formulate the problem of underranking in group-fair rankings, which was not addressed in previous work. Most group-fair ranking algorithms post-process a given ranking and output a group-fair ranking. We define underranking based on how close the group-fair rank of each item is to its original rank, and prove a lower bound on the trade-off achievable for simultaneous underranking and group fairness in ranking. We give a fair ranking algorithm that takes any given ranking and outputs another ranking with simultaneous underranking and group fairness guarantees comparable to the lower bound we prove. Our algorithm works with group fairness constraints for any number of groups. Our experimental results confirm the theoretical trade-off between underranking and group fairness, and also show that our algorithm achieves the best of both when compared to the state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Search and recommendation systems, such as search engines, recruiting tools, online marketplaces, news, and social media, output ranked lists of content, products, and sometimes, people. Credit ratings, standardized tests, risk assessments output only a score, but are also used implicitly for ranking. Bias in such ranking systems, especially among the top ranks, can worsen social and economic inequalities, polarize opinions, and reinforce stereotypes. On the other hand, a bias correction for minority groups can cause more harm if perceived as favoring group-fair outcomes over meritocracy. In this paper, we formulate the problem of underranking in group-fair rankings, which was not addressed in previous work. Most group-fair ranking algorithms post-process a given ranking and output a group-fair ranking. We define underranking based on how close the group-fair rank of each item is to its original rank, and prove a lower bound on the trade-off achievable for simultaneous underranking and group fairness in ranking. We give a fair ranking algorithm that takes any given ranking and outputs another ranking with simultaneous underranking and group fairness guarantees comparable to the lower bound we prove. Our algorithm works with group fairness constraints for any number of groups. Our experimental results confirm the theoretical trade-off between underranking and group fairness, and also show that our algorithm achieves the best of both when compared to the state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 搜索和推荐系统，例如搜索引擎、招聘工具、在线市场、新闻和社交媒体，输出内容、产品（有时还包括人员）的排名列表。信用评级、标准化测试、风险评估仅输出分数，但也隐式用于排名。这种排名系统中的偏见，尤其是高层排名中的偏见，可能会加剧社会和经济不平等、意见两极分化并强化刻板印象。另一方面，如果对少数群体的偏见纠正被认为有利于群体公平而不是精英管理，那么可能会造成更大的伤害。在本文中，我们提出了团体公平排名中排名不足的问题，这在之前的工作中没有得到解决。大多数团体公平排名算法都会对给定的排名进行后处理并输出团体公平排名。我们根据每个项目的群体公平排名与其原始排名的接近程度来定义排名不足，并证明了同时排名不足和排名中的群体公平性可实现的权衡下限。我们给出了一个公平的排名算法，该算法采用任何给定的排名并输出另一个排名，同时具有与我们证明的下限相当的排名不足和群体公平性保证。我们的算法适用于任意数量的组的组公平约束。我们的实验结果证实了排名不足和群体公平之间的理论权衡，并且还表明，与最先进的基线相比，我们的算法实现了两者的最佳效果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了群体公平排序中的欠排序问题，提出了一种同时满足欠排序和群体公平性的排序算法。
AI.motivation: 现有排序系统可能存在对少数群体的偏见，而修正偏见可能损害公平性与择优原则的平衡，需解决欠排序与群体公平性的权衡问题。
AI.method: 定义欠排序为群体公平排序与原始排序的接近程度，证明其与群体公平性的理论下界，并设计满足该下界的多群体公平排序算法。
AI.result: 实验验证了欠排序与群体公平性的理论权衡关系，且所提算法在效果上优于现有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法能有效平衡欠排序与群体公平性，为公平排序系统设计提供了理论支持与实践方案。

search_text: On the Problem of Underranking in Group-Fair Ranking 论团体公平排名中排名靠后的问题 Search and recommendation systems, such as search engines, recruiting tools, online marketplaces, news, and social media, output ranked lists of content, products, and sometimes, people. Credit ratings, standardized tests, risk assessments output only a score, but are also used implicitly for ranking. Bias in such ranking systems, especially among the top ranks, can worsen social and economic inequalities, polarize opinions, and reinforce stereotypes. On the other hand, a bias correction for minority groups can cause more harm if perceived as favoring group-fair outcomes over meritocracy. In this paper, we formulate the problem of underranking in group-fair rankings, which was not addressed in previous work. Most group-fair ranking algorithms post-process a given ranking and output a group-fair ranking. We define underranking based on how close the group-fair rank of each item is to its original rank, and prove a lower bound on the trade-off achievable for simultaneous underranking and group fairness in ranking. We give a fair ranking algorithm that takes any given ranking and outputs another ranking with simultaneous underranking and group fairness guarantees comparable to the lower bound we prove. Our algorithm works with group fairness constraints for any number of groups. Our experimental results confirm the theoretical trade-off between underranking and group fairness, and also show that our algorithm achieves the best of both when compared to the state-of-the-art baselines. 搜索和推荐系统，例如搜索引擎、招聘工具、在线市场、新闻和社交媒体，输出内容、产品（有时还包括人员）的排名列表。信用评级、标准化测试、风险评估仅输出分数，但也隐式用于排名。这种排名系统中的偏见，尤其是高层排名中的偏见，可能会加剧社会和经济不平等、意见两极分化并强化刻板印象。另一方面，如果对少数群体的偏见纠正被认为有利于群体公平而不是精英管理，那么可能会造成更大的伤害。在本文中，我们提出了团体公平排名中排名不足的问题，这在之前的工作中没有得到解决。大多数团体公平排名算法都会对给定的排名进行后处理并输出团体公平排名。我们根据每个项目的群体公平排名与其原始排名的接近程度来定义排名不足，并证明了同时排名不足和排名中的群体公平性可实现的权衡下限。我们给出了一个公平的排名算法，该算法采用任何给定的排名并输出另一个排名，同时具有与我们证明的下限相当的排名不足和群体公平性保证。我们的算法适用于任意数量的组的组公平约束。我们的实验结果证实了排名不足和群体公平之间的理论权衡，并且还表明，与最先进的基线相比，我们的算法实现了两者的最佳效果。 本文研究了群体公平排序中的欠排序问题，提出了一种同时满足欠排序和群体公平性的排序算法。 Sruthi Gorantla,Amit Deshpande,Anand Louis cs.IR,cs.CY,cs.DS,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Radek Janostik,Jan Konecny,Petr Krajča
title: LCM from FCA Point of View: A CbO-style Algorithm with Speed-up Features
title_zh: FCA 视角下的 LCM：具有加速特性的 CbO 式算法
comment: full version of a conference paper to be published in IJAR
comments: full version of a conference paper to be published in IJAR
abstract: LCM is an algorithm for enumeration of frequent closed itemsets in transaction databases. It is well known that when we ignore the required frequency, the closed itemsets are exactly intents of formal concepts in Formal Concept Analysis (FCA). We describe LCM in terms of FCA and show that LCM is basically the Close-by-One algorithm with multiple speed-up features for processing sparse data. We analyze the speed-up features and compare them with those of similar FCA algorithms, like FCbO and algorithms from the In-Close family.
summary: LCM is an algorithm for enumeration of frequent closed itemsets in transaction databases. It is well known that when we ignore the required frequency, the closed itemsets are exactly intents of formal concepts in Formal Concept Analysis (FCA). We describe LCM in terms of FCA and show that LCM is basically the Close-by-One algorithm with multiple speed-up features for processing sparse data. We analyze the speed-up features and compare them with those of similar FCA algorithms, like FCbO and algorithms from the In-Close family.
abstract_zh: LCM 是一种枚举事务数据库中频繁闭项集的算法。众所周知，当我们忽略所需频率时，闭项集正是形式概念分析（FCA）中形式概念的意图。我们用 FCA 来描述 LCM，并表明 LCM 基本上是具有多个加速特征的 Close-by-One 算法，用于处理稀疏数据。我们分析了加速特性，并将其与类似的 FCA 算法（例如 FCbO 和 In-Close 系列算法）进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文从形式概念分析（FCA）视角重新诠释LCM算法，揭示其本质为CbO算法并具备处理稀疏数据的加速特性。
AI.motivation: 现有FCA算法在处理稀疏数据时效率不足，需通过分析LCM的加速机制优化计算性能。
AI.method: 将LCM算法映射到FCA框架，对比其与FCbO及In-Close算法的加速特性差异，解析稀疏数据优化策略。
AI.result: 证实LCM的加速特性可有效提升稀疏数据处理效率，并明确其与传统FCA算法在实现机制上的异同。
AI.conclusion: LCM作为CbO风格算法在FCA领域具有显著优势，其加速特性为大规模稀疏数据挖掘提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhixin Chen,Mengxiang Lin
title: Self-Imitation Learning for Robot Tasks with Sparse and Delayed Rewards
title_zh: 具有稀疏和延迟奖励的机器人任务的自模仿学习
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures
abstract: The application of reinforcement learning (RL) in robotic control is still limited in the environments with sparse and delayed rewards. In this paper, we propose a practical self-imitation learning method named Self-Imitation Learning with Constant Reward (SILCR). Instead of requiring hand-defined immediate rewards from environments, our method assigns the immediate rewards at each timestep with constant values according to their final episodic rewards. In this way, even if the dense rewards from environments are unavailable, every action taken by the agents would be guided properly. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in some challenging continuous robotics control tasks in MuJoCo simulation and the results show that our method significantly outperforms the alternative methods in tasks with sparse and delayed rewards. Even compared with alternatives with dense rewards available, our method achieves competitive performance. The ablation experiments also show the stability and reproducibility of our method.
summary: The application of reinforcement learning (RL) in robotic control is still limited in the environments with sparse and delayed rewards. In this paper, we propose a practical self-imitation learning method named Self-Imitation Learning with Constant Reward (SILCR). Instead of requiring hand-defined immediate rewards from environments, our method assigns the immediate rewards at each timestep with constant values according to their final episodic rewards. In this way, even if the dense rewards from environments are unavailable, every action taken by the agents would be guided properly. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in some challenging continuous robotics control tasks in MuJoCo simulation and the results show that our method significantly outperforms the alternative methods in tasks with sparse and delayed rewards. Even compared with alternatives with dense rewards available, our method achieves competitive performance. The ablation experiments also show the stability and reproducibility of our method.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）在机器人控制中的应用在奖励稀疏和延迟的环境中仍然受到限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种实用的自模仿学习方法，称为恒定奖励自模仿学习（SILCR）。我们的方法不需要从环境中手动定义即时奖励，而是根据最终的情景奖励在每个时间步分配恒定值的即时奖励。这样，即使无法获得来自环境的密集奖励，智能体采取的每一个行动也会得到正确的指导。我们在 MuJoCo 模拟中证明了我们的方法在一些具有挑战性的连续机器人控制任务中的有效性，结果表明我们的方法在奖励稀疏和延迟的任务中显着优于替代方法。即使与具有密集奖励的替代方案相比，我们的方法也实现了具有竞争力的性能。消融实验还表明了我们方法的稳定性和重现性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SILCR的自模仿学习方法，用于解决机器人任务中稀疏和延迟奖励环境下强化学习的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在稀疏和延迟奖励的机器人控制环境中效果有限，且依赖人工设计的即时奖励，难以适应复杂任务。
AI.method: SILCR通过根据最终回合奖励为每个时间步分配固定值的即时奖励，无需环境提供密集奖励，从而引导智能体学习。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo模拟的连续控制任务中，SILCR在稀疏/延迟奖励任务中显著优于其他方法，且在有密集奖励的对比中表现竞争力，实验验证了其稳定性和可复现性。
AI.conclusion: SILCR为机器人任务提供了无需密集奖励的高效学习框架，在稀疏奖励场景下具有显著优势和实用价值。

authors_text: Dominik Hirner,Friedrich Fraundorfer
title: FC-DCNN: A densely connected neural network for stereo estimation
title_zh: FC-DCNN：用于立体估计的密集连接神经网络
comment: This paper has been accepted to the ICPR 2020 conference in Milan which will be held on the 10-15 January 2021. Therefore this work has not yet been presented
comments: This paper has been accepted to the ICPR 2020 conference in Milan which will be held on the 10-15 January 2021. Therefore this work has not yet been presented
abstract: We propose a novel lightweight network for stereo estimation. Our network consists of a fully-convolutional densely connected neural network (FC-DCNN) that computes matching costs between rectified image pairs. Our FC-DCNN method learns expressive features and performs some simple but effective post-processing steps. The densely connected layer structure connects the output of each layer to the input of each subsequent layer. This network structure and the fact that we do not use any fully-connected layers or 3D convolutions leads to a very lightweight network. The output of this network is used in order to calculate matching costs and create a cost-volume. Instead of using time and memory-inefficient cost-aggregation methods such as semi-global matching or conditional random fields in order to improve the result, we rely on filtering techniques, namely median filter and guided filter. By computing a left-right consistency check we get rid of inconsistent values. Afterwards we use a watershed foreground-background segmentation on the disparity image with removed inconsistencies. This mask is then used to refine the final prediction. We show that our method works well for both challenging indoor and outdoor scenes by evaluating it on the Middlebury, KITTI and ETH3D benchmarks respectively. Our full framework is available at https://github.com/thedodo/FC-DCNN
summary: We propose a novel lightweight network for stereo estimation. Our network consists of a fully-convolutional densely connected neural network (FC-DCNN) that computes matching costs between rectified image pairs. Our FC-DCNN method learns expressive features and performs some simple but effective post-processing steps. The densely connected layer structure connects the output of each layer to the input of each subsequent layer. This network structure and the fact that we do not use any fully-connected layers or 3D convolutions leads to a very lightweight network. The output of this network is used in order to calculate matching costs and create a cost-volume. Instead of using time and memory-inefficient cost-aggregation methods such as semi-global matching or conditional random fields in order to improve the result, we rely on filtering techniques, namely median filter and guided filter. By computing a left-right consistency check we get rid of inconsistent values. Afterwards we use a watershed foreground-background segmentation on the disparity image with removed inconsistencies. This mask is then used to refine the final prediction. We show that our method works well for both challenging indoor and outdoor scenes by evaluating it on the Middlebury, KITTI and ETH3D benchmarks respectively. Our full framework is available at https://github.com/thedodo/FC-DCNN
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于立体估计的新型轻量级网络。我们的网络由全卷积密集连接神经网络（FC-DCNN）组成，用于计算校正图像对之间的匹配成本。我们的 FC-DCNN 方法学习表达特征并执行一些简单但有效的后处理步骤。密集连接的层结构将每个层的输出连接到每个后续层的输入。这种网络结构以及我们不使用任何全连接层或 3D 卷积的事实导致了一个非常轻量级的网络。该网络的输出用于计算匹配成本并创建成本量。我们不使用时间和内存效率低的成本聚合方法（例如半全局匹配或条件随机场）来改进结果，而是依靠过滤技术，即中值滤波器和引导滤波器。通过计算左右一致性检查，我们消除了不一致的值。然后，我们对视差图像使用分水岭前景-背景分割，消除不一致。然后使用该掩模来细化最终预测。通过分别在 Middlebury、KITTI 和 ETH3D 基准上进行评估，我们表明我们的方法适用于具有挑战性的室内和室外场景。我们的完整框架位于 https://github.com/thedodo/FC-DCNN

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的全卷积密集连接神经网络（FC-DCNN），用于立体视觉中的视差估计任务。
AI.motivation: 传统立体匹配方法计算复杂且内存消耗大，而现有深度学习方法常依赖全连接层或3D卷积导致模型臃肿，因此需要一种更高效且轻量的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计全卷积密集连接网络结构，通过逐层特征复用提升表达能力；采用中值滤波和导向滤波替代耗时的代价聚合方法，并结合左右一致性校验与分水岭分割优化最终视差预测。
AI.result: 在Middlebury、KITTI和ETH3D基准测试中，该方法在室内和室外场景均表现出色，验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FC-DCNN通过轻量化网络设计和高效后处理策略，在保证精度的同时显著降低了计算开销，适用于实时立体视觉应用。

search_text: FC-DCNN: A densely connected neural network for stereo estimation FC-DCNN：用于立体估计的密集连接神经网络 We propose a novel lightweight network for stereo estimation. Our network consists of a fully-convolutional densely connected neural network (FC-DCNN) that computes matching costs between rectified image pairs. Our FC-DCNN method learns expressive features and performs some simple but effective post-processing steps. The densely connected layer structure connects the output of each layer to the input of each subsequent layer. This network structure and the fact that we do not use any fully-connected layers or 3D convolutions leads to a very lightweight network. The output of this network is used in order to calculate matching costs and create a cost-volume. Instead of using time and memory-inefficient cost-aggregation methods such as semi-global matching or conditional random fields in order to improve the result, we rely on filtering techniques, namely median filter and guided filter. By computing a left-right consistency check we get rid of inconsistent values. Afterwards we use a watershed foreground-background segmentation on the disparity image with removed inconsistencies. This mask is then used to refine the final prediction. We show that our method works well for both challenging indoor and outdoor scenes by evaluating it on the Middlebury, KITTI and ETH3D benchmarks respectively. Our full framework is available at https://github.com/thedodo/FC-DCNN 我们提出了一种用于立体估计的新型轻量级网络。我们的网络由全卷积密集连接神经网络（FC-DCNN）组成，用于计算校正图像对之间的匹配成本。我们的 FC-DCNN 方法学习表达特征并执行一些简单但有效的后处理步骤。密集连接的层结构将每个层的输出连接到每个后续层的输入。这种网络结构以及我们不使用任何全连接层或 3D 卷积的事实导致了一个非常轻量级的网络。该网络的输出用于计算匹配成本并创建成本量。我们不使用时间和内存效率低的成本聚合方法（例如半全局匹配或条件随机场）来改进结果，而是依靠过滤技术，即中值滤波器和引导滤波器。通过计算左右一致性检查，我们消除了不一致的值。然后，我们对视差图像使用分水岭前景-背景分割，消除不一致。然后使用该掩模来细化最终预测。通过分别在 Middlebury、KITTI 和 ETH3D 基准上进行评估，我们表明我们的方法适用于具有挑战性的室内和室外场景。我们的完整框架位于 https://github.com/thedodo/FC-DCNN 本文提出了一种轻量级的全卷积密集连接神经网络（FC-DCNN），用于立体视觉中的视差估计任务。 Dominik Hirner,Friedrich Fraundorfer cs.CV

authors_text: Alican Mertan,Damien Jade Duff,Gozde Unal
title: Relative Depth Estimation as a Ranking Problem
title_zh: 作为排名问题的相对深度估计
comment: Accepted at SIU 2020
comments: Accepted at SIU 2020
abstract: We present a formulation of the relative depth estimation from a single image problem, as a ranking problem. By reformulating the problem this way, we were able to utilize literature on the ranking problem, and apply the existing knowledge to achieve better results. To this end, we have introduced a listwise ranking loss borrowed from ranking literature, weighted ListMLE, to the relative depth estimation problem. We have also brought a new metric which considers pixel depth ranking accuracy, on which our method is stronger.
summary: We present a formulation of the relative depth estimation from a single image problem, as a ranking problem. By reformulating the problem this way, we were able to utilize literature on the ranking problem, and apply the existing knowledge to achieve better results. To this end, we have introduced a listwise ranking loss borrowed from ranking literature, weighted ListMLE, to the relative depth estimation problem. We have also brought a new metric which considers pixel depth ranking accuracy, on which our method is stronger.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了单个图像问题的相对深度估计的公式，作为排序问题。通过以这种方式重新表述问题，我们能够利用有关排名问题的文献，并应用现有的知识来取得更好的结果。为此，我们引入了从排名文献中借用的列表排名损失（加权 ListMLE）来解决相对深度估计问题。我们还带来了一个考虑像素深度排名准确性的新指标，我们的方法在此基础上更强大。

AI.tldr: 本文将单图像的相对深度估计问题重新表述为排序问题。
AI.motivation: 通过将相对深度估计问题转化为排序问题，可以利用排序领域的已有知识，从而获得更好的结果。
AI.method: 本文引入了来自排序文献的列表排序损失函数（加权ListMLE），并提出了一种新的考虑像素深度排序准确性的度量方法。
AI.result: 该方法在新的度量标准下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过将相对深度估计问题转化为排序问题，可以有效提升模型性能。

authors_text: Görkem Algan,Ilkay Ulusoy,Şaban Gönül,Banu Turgut,Berker Bakbak
title: Deep Learning from Small Amount of Medical Data with Noisy Labels: A Meta-Learning Approach
title_zh: 从带有噪声标签的少量医疗数据中进行深度学习：一种元学习方法
comment: Accepted by ICRPOA 2021: International Conference on Retinopathy of Prematurity Ophthalmologic Approach
comments: Accepted by ICRPOA 2021: International Conference on Retinopathy of Prematurity Ophthalmologic Approach
abstract: Computer vision systems recently made a big leap thanks to deep neural networks. However, these systems require correctly labeled large datasets in order to be trained properly, which is very difficult to obtain for medical applications. Two main reasons for label noise in medical applications are the high complexity of the data and conflicting opinions of experts. Moreover, medical imaging datasets are commonly tiny, which makes each data very important in learning. As a result, if not handled properly, label noise significantly degrades the performance. Therefore, a label-noise-robust learning algorithm that makes use of the meta-learning paradigm is proposed in this article. The proposed solution is tested on retinopathy of prematurity (ROP) dataset with a very high label noise of 68%. Results show that the proposed algorithm significantly improves the classification algorithm's performance in the presence of noisy labels.
summary: Computer vision systems recently made a big leap thanks to deep neural networks. However, these systems require correctly labeled large datasets in order to be trained properly, which is very difficult to obtain for medical applications. Two main reasons for label noise in medical applications are the high complexity of the data and conflicting opinions of experts. Moreover, medical imaging datasets are commonly tiny, which makes each data very important in learning. As a result, if not handled properly, label noise significantly degrades the performance. Therefore, a label-noise-robust learning algorithm that makes use of the meta-learning paradigm is proposed in this article. The proposed solution is tested on retinopathy of prematurity (ROP) dataset with a very high label noise of 68%. Results show that the proposed algorithm significantly improves the classification algorithm's performance in the presence of noisy labels.
abstract_zh: 由于深度神经网络，计算机视觉系统最近取得了巨大飞跃。然而，这些系统需要正确标记的大型数据集才能进行正确的训练，这对于医疗应用来说很难获得。医疗应用中标签噪声的两个主要原因是数据的高度复杂性和专家的相互矛盾的意见。此外，医学成像数据集通常很小，这使得每个数据在学习中都非常重要。因此，如果处理不当，标签噪声会显着降低性能。因此，本文提出了一种利用元学习范式的标签噪声鲁棒学习算法。所提出的解决方案在早产儿视网膜病变 (ROP) 数据集上进行了测试，标签噪声非常高，高达 68%。结果表明，所提出的算法显着提高了存在噪声标签时分类算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的算法，用于在少量且存在高噪声标签的医学数据上提升深度学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据通常数量少且标签噪声高，导致传统深度学习方法性能下降，需开发鲁棒的噪声标签处理算法。
AI.method: 采用元学习范式设计噪声鲁棒的标签学习算法，通过利用小样本学习和噪声对抗机制提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在68%标签噪声的ROP数据集上测试，该算法显著优于现有方法，分类性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 元学习方法能有效应对医学数据的高噪声和小样本挑战，为医疗AI开发提供新思路。

authors_text: Yuzhi Wang,Haibin Huang,Qin Xu,Jiaming Liu,Yiqun Liu,Jue Wang
title: Practical Deep Raw Image Denoising on Mobile Devices
title_zh: 移动设备上实用的深度原始图像去噪
abstract: Deep learning-based image denoising approaches have been extensively studied in recent years, prevailing in many public benchmark datasets. However, the stat-of-the-art networks are computationally too expensive to be directly applied on mobile devices. In this work, we propose a light-weight, efficient neural network-based raw image denoiser that runs smoothly on mainstream mobile devices, and produces high quality denoising results. Our key insights are twofold: (1) by measuring and estimating sensor noise level, a smaller network trained on synthetic sensor-specific data can out-perform larger ones trained on general data; (2) the large noise level variation under different ISO settings can be removed by a novel k-Sigma Transform, allowing a small network to efficiently handle a wide range of noise levels. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate the efficiency and accuracy of our approach. Our proposed mobile-friendly denoising model runs at ~70 milliseconds per megapixel on Qualcomm Snapdragon 855 chipset, and it is the basis of the night shot feature of several flagship smartphones released in 2019.
summary: Deep learning-based image denoising approaches have been extensively studied in recent years, prevailing in many public benchmark datasets. However, the stat-of-the-art networks are computationally too expensive to be directly applied on mobile devices. In this work, we propose a light-weight, efficient neural network-based raw image denoiser that runs smoothly on mainstream mobile devices, and produces high quality denoising results. Our key insights are twofold: (1) by measuring and estimating sensor noise level, a smaller network trained on synthetic sensor-specific data can out-perform larger ones trained on general data; (2) the large noise level variation under different ISO settings can be removed by a novel k-Sigma Transform, allowing a small network to efficiently handle a wide range of noise levels. We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate the efficiency and accuracy of our approach. Our proposed mobile-friendly denoising model runs at ~70 milliseconds per megapixel on Qualcomm Snapdragon 855 chipset, and it is the basis of the night shot feature of several flagship smartphones released in 2019.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习的图像去噪方法得到了广泛的研究，并在许多公共基准数据集中盛行。然而，最先进的网络计算成本太高，无法直接应用于移动设备。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种轻量级、高效的基于神经网络的原始图像降噪器，它可以在主流移动设备上流畅运行，并产生高质量的降噪结果。我们的主要见解有两个：（1）通过测量和估计传感器噪声水平，在合成传感器特定数据上训练的较小网络可以胜过在一般数据上训练的较大网络； (2) 不同 ISO 设置下的大噪声水平变化可以通过新颖的 k-Sigma 变换消除，从而允许小型网络有效地处理各种噪声水平。我们进行了大量的实验来证明我们方法的效率和准确性。我们提出的适合移动设备的去噪模型在高通 Snapdragon 855 芯片组上的运行速度约为每百万像素 70 毫秒，它是 2019 年发布的几款旗舰智能手机的夜间拍摄功能的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级深度学习模型，用于在移动设备上高效完成原始图像去噪任务。
AI.motivation: 现有先进去噪网络计算量过大，难以直接部署在移动设备上，需在保证效果的同时提升运行效率。
AI.method: 通过传感器噪声水平估计与合成数据训练小型网络，并结合新型k-Sigma变换处理不同ISO下的噪声变化。
AI.result: 该模型在骁龙855芯片上实现每百万像素约70毫秒的实时处理速度，成为2019年多款旗舰手机夜景模式的基础。
AI.conclusion: 轻量化设计与噪声自适应技术有效平衡了移动设备的计算限制与去噪质量需求。

We conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate the efficiency and accuracy of our approach. authors_text: An Tran,Ali Zonoozi,Jagannadan Varadarajan,Hannes Kruppa
title: PP-LinkNet: Improving Semantic Segmentation of High Resolution Satellite Imagery with Multi-stage Training
title_zh: PP-LinkNet：通过多阶段训练改进高分辨率卫星图像的语义分割
abstract: Road network and building footprint extraction is essential for many applications such as updating maps, traffic regulations, city planning, ride-hailing, disaster response \textit{etc}. Mapping road networks is currently both expensive and labor-intensive. Recently, improvements in image segmentation through the application of deep neural networks has shown promising results in extracting road segments from large scale, high resolution satellite imagery. However, significant challenges remain due to lack of enough labeled training data needed to build models for industry grade applications. In this paper, we propose a two-stage transfer learning technique to improve robustness of semantic segmentation for satellite images that leverages noisy pseudo ground truth masks obtained automatically (without human labor) from crowd-sourced OpenStreetMap (OSM) data. We further propose Pyramid Pooling-LinkNet (PP-LinkNet), an improved deep neural network for segmentation that uses focal loss, poly learning rate, and context module. We demonstrate the strengths of our approach through evaluations done on three popular datasets over two tasks, namely, road extraction and building foot-print detection. Specifically, we obtain 78.19\% meanIoU on SpaceNet building footprint dataset, 67.03\% and 77.11\% on the road topology metric on SpaceNet and DeepGlobe road extraction dataset, respectively.
summary: Road network and building footprint extraction is essential for many applications such as updating maps, traffic regulations, city planning, ride-hailing, disaster response \textit{etc}. Mapping road networks is currently both expensive and labor-intensive. Recently, improvements in image segmentation through the application of deep neural networks has shown promising results in extracting road segments from large scale, high resolution satellite imagery. However, significant challenges remain due to lack of enough labeled training data needed to build models for industry grade applications. In this paper, we propose a two-stage transfer learning technique to improve robustness of semantic segmentation for satellite images that leverages noisy pseudo ground truth masks obtained automatically (without human labor) from crowd-sourced OpenStreetMap (OSM) data. We further propose Pyramid Pooling-LinkNet (PP-LinkNet), an improved deep neural network for segmentation that uses focal loss, poly learning rate, and context module. We demonstrate the strengths of our approach through evaluations done on three popular datasets over two tasks, namely, road extraction and building foot-print detection. Specifically, we obtain 78.19\% meanIoU on SpaceNet building footprint dataset, 67.03\% and 77.11\% on the road topology metric on SpaceNet and DeepGlobe road extraction dataset, respectively.
abstract_zh: 道路网络和建筑足迹提取对于许多应用至关重要，例如更新地图、交通法规、城市规划、叫车、灾难响应\textit{等}。目前绘制道路网络既昂贵又费力。最近，通过应用深度神经网络对图像分割的改进在从大规模、高分辨率卫星图像中提取路段方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，由于缺乏足够的标记培训数据来构建工业级应用程序模型，因此仍然存在重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种两阶段迁移学习技术，以提高卫星图像语义分割的鲁棒性，该技术利用从众包 OpenStreetMap (OSM) 数据自动（无需人工）获得的噪声伪地面真实掩模。我们进一步提出 Pyramid Pooling-LinkNet (PP-LinkNet)，这是一种改进的深度神经网络，用于使用焦点损失、多元学习率和上下文模块进行分割。我们通过对三个流行数据集的两项任务（即道路提取和建筑物足迹检测）进行评估来展示我们方法的优势。具体来说，我们在 SpaceNet 建筑足迹数据集上获得了 78.19% 的平均 IoU，在 SpaceNet 和 DeepGlobe 道路提取数据集上的道路拓扑指标上分别获得了 67.03% 和 77.11%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PP-LinkNet模型及多阶段训练方法，以提升高分辨率卫星图像的语义分割效果，特别是在道路和建筑物提取任务中。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率卫星图像的语义分割因缺乏足够的标注数据而面临挑战，传统方法成本高且效率低，需利用现有数据提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段迁移学习框架，结合OpenStreetMap生成的伪标注数据；设计PP-LinkNet网络，集成焦点损失、多项式学习率策略及上下文模块。
AI.result: 在SpaceNet和DeepGlobe数据集上，建筑提取达到78.19% meanIoU，道路拓扑指标分别达67.03%和77.11%。
AI.conclusion: 通过伪标注数据与改进网络结构，有效提升了高分辨率卫星图像分割性能，验证了方法在实际应用中的可行性。

authors_text: Stefan B. Ploner,Martin F. Kraus,Eric M. Moult,Lennart Husvogt,Julia Schottenhamml,A. Yasin Alibhai,Nadia K. Waheed,Jay S. Duker,James G. Fujimoto,Andreas K. Maier
title: Efficient and high accuracy 3-D OCT angiography motion correction in pathology
title_zh: 病理学中高效、高精度的 3D OCT 血管造影运动校正
comment: 22 pages, 11 figures, 4 tables
comments: 22 pages, 11 figures, 4 tables
abstract: We propose a novel method for non-rigid 3-D motion correction of orthogonally raster-scanned optical coherence tomography angiography volumes. This is the first approach that aligns predominantly axial structural features like retinal layers and transverse angiographic vascular features in a joint optimization. Combined with the use of orthogonal scans and favorization of kinematically more plausible displacements, the approach allows subpixel alignment and micrometer-scale distortion correction in all 3 dimensions. As no specific structures or layers are segmented, the approach is by design robust to pathologic changes. It is furthermore designed for highly parallel implementation and brief runtime, allowing its integration in clinical routine even for high density or wide-field scans. We evaluated the algorithm with metrics related to clinically relevant features in a large-scale quantitative evaluation based on 204 volumetric scans of 17 subjects including both a wide range of pathologies and healthy controls. Using this method, we achieve state-of-the-art axial performance and show significant advances in both transverse co-alignment and distortion correction, especially in the pathologic subgroup.
summary: We propose a novel method for non-rigid 3-D motion correction of orthogonally raster-scanned optical coherence tomography angiography volumes. This is the first approach that aligns predominantly axial structural features like retinal layers and transverse angiographic vascular features in a joint optimization. Combined with the use of orthogonal scans and favorization of kinematically more plausible displacements, the approach allows subpixel alignment and micrometer-scale distortion correction in all 3 dimensions. As no specific structures or layers are segmented, the approach is by design robust to pathologic changes. It is furthermore designed for highly parallel implementation and brief runtime, allowing its integration in clinical routine even for high density or wide-field scans. We evaluated the algorithm with metrics related to clinically relevant features in a large-scale quantitative evaluation based on 204 volumetric scans of 17 subjects including both a wide range of pathologies and healthy controls. Using this method, we achieve state-of-the-art axial performance and show significant advances in both transverse co-alignment and distortion correction, especially in the pathologic subgroup.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种对正交光栅扫描光学相干断层扫描血管造影体积进行非刚性 3D 运动校正的新方法。这是第一种在联合优化中对齐主要轴向结构特征（如视网膜层和横向血管造影血管特征）的方法。结合正交扫描的使用和运动学上更合理的位移的支持，该方法允许在所有 3 个维度上进行子像素对齐和微米级失真校正。由于没有分割特定的结构或层，因此该方法在设计上对病理变化具有鲁棒性。此外，它还专为高度并行实施和短暂的运行时间而设计，即使对于高密度或宽视野扫描，也可以将其集成到临床常规中。我们在大规模定量评估中使用与临床相关特征相关的指标来评估该算法，该评估基于 17 名受试者（包括各种病理和健康对照）的 204 次体积扫描。使用这种方法，我们实现了最先进的轴向性能，并在横向对准和畸变校正方面取得了显着进步，特别是在病理亚组中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的3D光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）运动校正方法，特别针对病理情况下的非刚性变形校正。
AI.motivation: 现有OCTA运动校正方法在处理3D体积数据时存在精度不足、难以适应病理结构变化的问题，需开发更鲁棒且适用于临床的校正方案。
AI.method: 联合优化轴向结构特征（如视网膜层）与横向血管特征，结合正交扫描策略及运动学合理位移约束，实现亚像素级三维畸变校正，无需依赖特定结构分割。
AI.result: 在204个体积扫描数据（含17名受试者）中验证，轴向性能达到国际领先水平，病理子组的横向对齐与畸变校正效果显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法兼具高精度与临床可行性，为病理OCTA成像提供了可靠运动校正方案，推动了高密度/广视野扫描的临床应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的3D光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）运动校正方法，特别针对病理情况下的非刚性变形校正。

search_text: Efficient and high accuracy 3-D OCT angiography motion correction in pathology 病理学中高效、高精度的 3D OCT 血管造影运动校正 We propose a novel method for non-rigid 3-D motion correction of orthogonally raster-scanned optical coherence tomography angiography volumes. This is the first approach that aligns predominantly axial structural features like retinal layers and transverse angiographic vascular features in a joint optimization. Combined with the use of orthogonal scans and favorization of kinematically more plausible displacements, the approach allows subpixel alignment and micrometer-scale distortion correction in all 3 dimensions. As no specific structures or layers are segmented, the approach is by design robust to pathologic changes. It is furthermore designed for highly parallel implementation and brief runtime, allowing its integration in clinical routine even for high density or wide-field scans. We evaluated the algorithm with metrics related to clinically relevant features in a large-scale quantitative evaluation based on 204 volumetric scans of 17 subjects including both a wide range of pathologies and healthy controls. Using this method, we achieve state-of-the-art axial performance and show significant advances in both transverse co-alignment and distortion correction, especially in the pathologic subgroup. 我们提出了一种对正交光栅扫描光学相干断层扫描血管造影体积进行非刚性 3D 运动校正的新方法。这是第一种在联合优化中对齐主要轴向结构特征（如视网膜层和横向血管造影血管特征）的方法。结合正交扫描的使用和运动学上更合理的位移的支持，该方法允许在所有 3 个维度上进行子像素对齐和微米级失真校正。由于没有分割特定的结构或层，因此该方法在设计上对病理变化具有鲁棒性。此外，它还专为高度并行实施和短暂的运行时间而设计，即使对于高密度或宽视野扫描，也可以将其集成到临床常规中。我们在大规模定量评估中使用与临床相关特征相关的指标来评估该算法，该评估基于 17 名受试者（包括各种病理和健康对照）的 204 次体积扫描。使用这种方法，我们实现了最先进的轴向性能，并在横向对准和畸变校正方面取得了显着进步，特别是在病理亚组中。 本文提出一种高效的3D光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）运动校正方法，特别针对病理情况下的非刚性变形校正。 Stefan B. Ploner,Martin F. Kraus,Eric M. Moult,Lennart Husvogt,Julia Schottenhamml,A. Yasin Alibhai,Nadia K. Waheed,Jay S. Duker,James G. Fujimoto,Andreas K. Maier eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Mirco Theile,Harald Bayerlein,Richard Nai,David Gesbert,Marco Caccamo
title: UAV Path Planning using Global and Local Map Information with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 利用深度强化学习的全局和局部地图信息进行无人机路径规划
comment: ICAR 2021, code available at https://github.com/theilem/uavSim
comments: ICAR 2021, code available at https://github.com/theilem/uavSim
abstract: Path planning methods for autonomous unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are typically designed for one specific type of mission. This work presents a method for autonomous UAV path planning based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL) that can be applied to a wide range of mission scenarios. Specifically, we compare coverage path planning (CPP), where the UAV's goal is to survey an area of interest to data harvesting (DH), where the UAV collects data from distributed Internet of Things (IoT) sensor devices. By exploiting structured map information of the environment, we train double deep Q-networks (DDQNs) with identical architectures on both distinctly different mission scenarios to make movement decisions that balance the respective mission goal with navigation constraints. By introducing a novel approach exploiting a compressed global map of the environment combined with a cropped but uncompressed local map showing the vicinity of the UAV agent, we demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently scale to large environments. We also extend previous results for generalizing control policies that require no retraining when scenario parameters change and offer a detailed analysis of crucial map processing parameters' effects on path planning performance.
summary: Path planning methods for autonomous unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are typically designed for one specific type of mission. This work presents a method for autonomous UAV path planning based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL) that can be applied to a wide range of mission scenarios. Specifically, we compare coverage path planning (CPP), where the UAV's goal is to survey an area of interest to data harvesting (DH), where the UAV collects data from distributed Internet of Things (IoT) sensor devices. By exploiting structured map information of the environment, we train double deep Q-networks (DDQNs) with identical architectures on both distinctly different mission scenarios to make movement decisions that balance the respective mission goal with navigation constraints. By introducing a novel approach exploiting a compressed global map of the environment combined with a cropped but uncompressed local map showing the vicinity of the UAV agent, we demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently scale to large environments. We also extend previous results for generalizing control policies that require no retraining when scenario parameters change and offer a detailed analysis of crucial map processing parameters' effects on path planning performance.
abstract_zh: 自主无人机 (UAV) 的路径规划方法通常是针对一种特定类型的任务而设计的。这项工作提出了一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的自主无人机路径规划方法，可应用于广泛的任务场景。具体来说，我们比较了覆盖路径规划（CPP），其中无人机的目标是调查数据收集（DH）感兴趣的区域，其中无人机从分布式物联网（IoT）传感器设备收集数据。通过利用环境的结构化地图信息，我们在两个截然不同的任务场景上训练具有相同架构的双深度 Q 网络（DDQN），以做出平衡各自任务目标与导航约束的运动决策。通过引入一种新颖的方法，利用压缩的环境全局地图与显示无人机代理附近的裁剪但未压缩的局部地图相结合，我们证明了所提出的方法可以有效地扩展到大型环境。我们还扩展了先前的结果，以概括控制策略，当场景参数发生变化时不需要重新训练，并提供关键地图处理参数对路径规划性能影响的详细分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的无人机路径规划方法，结合全局和局部地图信息，适用于多种任务场景。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机路径规划方法针对特定任务设计，缺乏通用性和适应性，需开发可处理不同任务（如区域覆盖与数据采集）的灵活算法。
AI.method: 采用双深度Q网络（DDQN）架构，利用压缩的全局地图与未压缩的局部地图信息，训练适用于覆盖路径规划（CPP）和数据采集（DH）两种任务的通用策略。
AI.result: 方法能高效扩展至大范围环境，策略无需重新训练即可适应参数变化，且分析了地图处理参数对路径规划性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合多尺度地图信息，实现了无人机路径规划的通用性与鲁棒性，为复杂场景下的自主导航提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Nanyu Li,Charles C. Zhou
title: AMPA-Net: Optimization-Inspired Attention Neural Network for Deep Compressed Sensing
title_zh: AMPA-Net：用于深度压缩感知的优化启发的注意力神经网络
comment: 7 pages,7 figures
comments: 7 pages,7 figures
abstract: Compressed sensing (CS) is a challenging problem in image processing due to reconstructing an almost complete image from a limited measurement. To achieve fast and accurate CS reconstruction, we synthesize the advantages of two well-known methods (neural network and optimization algorithm) to propose a novel optimization inspired neural network which dubbed AMP-Net. AMP-Net realizes the fusion of the Approximate Message Passing (AMP) algorithm and neural network. All of its parameters are learned automatically. Furthermore, we propose an AMPA-Net which uses three attention networks to improve the representation ability of AMP-Net. Finally, We demonstrate the effectiveness of AMP-Net and AMPA-Net on four standard CS reconstruction benchmark data sets. Our code is available on https://github.com/puallee/AMPA-Net.
summary: Compressed sensing (CS) is a challenging problem in image processing due to reconstructing an almost complete image from a limited measurement. To achieve fast and accurate CS reconstruction, we synthesize the advantages of two well-known methods (neural network and optimization algorithm) to propose a novel optimization inspired neural network which dubbed AMP-Net. AMP-Net realizes the fusion of the Approximate Message Passing (AMP) algorithm and neural network. All of its parameters are learned automatically. Furthermore, we propose an AMPA-Net which uses three attention networks to improve the representation ability of AMP-Net. Finally, We demonstrate the effectiveness of AMP-Net and AMPA-Net on four standard CS reconstruction benchmark data sets. Our code is available on https://github.com/puallee/AMPA-Net.
abstract_zh: 压缩感知（CS）是图像处理中的一个具有挑战性的问题，因为它可以从有限的测量中重建几乎完整的图像。为了实现快速准确的 CS 重建，我们综合了两种著名方法（神经网络和优化算法）的优点，提出了一种新颖的优化启发神经网络，称为 AMP-Net。 AMP-Net实现了近似消息传递（AMP）算法和神经网络的融合。它的所有参数都是自动学习的。此外，我们提出了一个 AMPA-Net，它使用三个注意力网络来提高 AMP-Net 的表示能力。最后，我们证明了 AMP-Net 和 AMPA-Net 在四个标准 CS 重建基准数据集上的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/puallee/AMPA-Net 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合优化算法与神经网络的新型压缩感知图像重建方法AMP-Net，并通过引入注意力机制改进为AMPA-Net。
AI.motivation: 传统压缩感知方法在重建速度和精度上存在局限，需融合神经网络的非线性表达能力和优化算法的迭代特性以提升性能。
AI.method: 将近似消息传递(AMP)算法与神经网络结合，自动学习参数；进一步引入三个注意力网络构建AMPA-Net以增强特征表示能力。
AI.result: 在四个标准压缩感知数据集上验证了AMP-Net和AMPA-Net的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过优化启发的网络结构与注意力机制，在压缩感知重建任务中取得了优于现有方法的精度与效率平衡。
