search_text: AMPA-Net: Optimization-Inspired Attention Neural Network for Deep Compressed Sensing AMPA-Net：用于深度压缩感知的优化启发的注意力神经网络 Compressed sensing (CS) is a challenging problem in image processing due to reconstructing an almost complete image from a limited measurement. To achieve fast and accurate CS reconstruction, we synthesize the advantages of two well-known methods (neural network and optimization algorithm) to propose a novel optimization inspired neural network which dubbed AMP-Net. AMP-Net realizes the fusion of the Approximate Message Passing (AMP) algorithm and neural network. All of its parameters are learned automatically. Furthermore, we propose an AMPA-Net which uses three attention networks to improve the representation ability of AMP-Net. Finally, We demonstrate the effectiveness of AMP-Net and AMPA-Net on four standard CS reconstruction benchmark data sets. Our code is available on https://github.com/puallee/AMPA-Net. 压缩感知（CS）是图像处理中的一个具有挑战性的问题，因为它可以从有限的测量中重建几乎完整的图像。为了实现快速准确的 CS 重建，我们综合了两种著名方法（神经网络和优化算法）的优点，提出了一种新颖的优化启发神经网络，称为 AMP-Net。 AMP-Net实现了近似消息传递（AMP）算法和神经网络的融合。它的所有参数都是自动学习的。此外，我们提出了一个 AMPA-Net，它使用三个注意力网络来提高 AMP-Net 的表示能力。最后，我们证明了 AMP-Net 和 AMPA-Net 在四个标准 CS 重建基准数据集上的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/puallee/AMPA-Net 上获取。 本文提出了一种结合优化算法与神经网络的新型压缩感知图像重建方法AMP-Net，并通过引入注意力机制改进为AMPA-Net。 Nanyu Li,Charles C. Zhou cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yong-Gu Lee,Seong-Jae Lee,Sang-Jin Lee,Tae-Seung Baek,Dong-Whan Lee,Kyeong-Chan Jang,Ho-Jin Sohn,Jin-Soo Kim
title: Development of Open Informal Dataset Affecting Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 影响自动驾驶的开放非正式数据集的开发
comment: 26 pages, 16 figures
comments: 26 pages, 16 figures
abstract: This document is a document that has written procedures and methods for collecting objects and unstructured dynamic data on the road for the development of object recognition technology for self-driving cars, and outlines the methods of collecting data, annotation data, object classifier criteria, and data processing methods. On-road object and unstructured dynamic data were collected in various environments, such as weather, time and traffic conditions, and additional reception calls for police and safety personnel were collected. Finally, 100,000 images of various objects existing on pedestrians and roads, 200,000 images of police and traffic safety personnel, 5,000 images of police and traffic safety personnel, and data sets consisting of 5,000 image data were collected and built.
summary: This document is a document that has written procedures and methods for collecting objects and unstructured dynamic data on the road for the development of object recognition technology for self-driving cars, and outlines the methods of collecting data, annotation data, object classifier criteria, and data processing methods. On-road object and unstructured dynamic data were collected in various environments, such as weather, time and traffic conditions, and additional reception calls for police and safety personnel were collected. Finally, 100,000 images of various objects existing on pedestrians and roads, 200,000 images of police and traffic safety personnel, 5,000 images of police and traffic safety personnel, and data sets consisting of 5,000 image data were collected and built.
abstract_zh: 本文件是为自动驾驶汽车的物体识别技术的开发而编写的收集道路上的物体​​和非结构化动态数据的程序和方法的文件，并概述了收集数据的方法、注释数据、物体分类器标准和数据处理方法。在各种环境下收集道路物体和非结构化动态数据，例如天气、时间和交通状况，并收集警察和安全人员的额外接听电话。最终收集并构建了10万张行人和道路上存在的各种物体的图像、20万张警察和交通安全人员的图像、5000张警察和交通安全人员的图像以及由5000张图像数据组成的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一个用于自动驾驶对象识别的开放数据集，包含多种环境下的道路物体和动态数据。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶技术需要多样化且高质量的数据集来训练模型，现有数据集在复杂环境和特殊场景（如警察、安全人员交互）覆盖不足。
AI.method: 通过多环境（天气、时间、交通）采集道路物体和动态数据，结合标注规范、分类标准及数据处理技术，并补充警察与安全人员相关数据。
AI.result: 构建包含10万张行人/道路物体图像、20万张警察/安全人员图像及5千张其他相关图像的数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为自动驾驶模型提供了多场景训练资源，有助于提升复杂环境下的识别鲁棒性。

authors_text: Gabriele Moreno Berton,Valerio Paolicelli,Carlo Masone,Barbara Caputo
title: Adaptive-Attentive Geolocalization from few queries: a hybrid approach
title_zh: 来自少量查询的自适应注意力地理定位：混合方法
comment: The pytorch code is available at https://github.com/valeriopaolicelli/AdAGeo
comments: The pytorch code is available at https://github.com/valeriopaolicelli/AdAGeo
abstract: We address the task of cross-domain visual place recognition, where the goal is to geolocalize a given query image against a labeled gallery, in the case where the query and the gallery belong to different visual domains. To achieve this, we focus on building a domain robust deep network by leveraging over an attention mechanism combined with few-shot unsupervised domain adaptation techniques, where we use a small number of unlabeled target domain images to learn about the target distribution. With our method, we are able to outperform the current state of the art while using two orders of magnitude less target domain images. Finally we propose a new large-scale dataset for cross-domain visual place recognition, called SVOX. The pytorch code is available at https://github.com/valeriopaolicelli/AdAGeo .
summary: We address the task of cross-domain visual place recognition, where the goal is to geolocalize a given query image against a labeled gallery, in the case where the query and the gallery belong to different visual domains. To achieve this, we focus on building a domain robust deep network by leveraging over an attention mechanism combined with few-shot unsupervised domain adaptation techniques, where we use a small number of unlabeled target domain images to learn about the target distribution. With our method, we are able to outperform the current state of the art while using two orders of magnitude less target domain images. Finally we propose a new large-scale dataset for cross-domain visual place recognition, called SVOX. The pytorch code is available at https://github.com/valeriopaolicelli/AdAGeo .
abstract_zh: 我们解决跨域视觉位置识别的任务，其目标是在查询和图库属于不同视觉域的情况下，针对标记的图库对给定的查询图像进行地理定位。为了实现这一目标，我们专注于通过利用注意力机制与少镜头无监督域适应技术相结合来构建域鲁棒深度网络，其中我们使用少量未标记的目标域图像来了解目标分布。通过我们的方法，我们能够在使用少两个数量级的目标域图像的同时超越当前的技术水平。最后，我们提出了一个用于跨域视觉位置识别的新的大规模数据集，称为 SVOX。 pytorch 代码可在 https://github.com/valeriopaolicelli/AdAGeo 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合注意力机制与少量样本无监督域适应的混合方法，解决跨域视觉地点识别中查询图像与画廊属于不同视觉领域时的地理定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在跨域场景下表现不佳，且依赖大量目标域标注数据，亟需一种在少量目标域样本下仍能保持性能的鲁棒解决方案。
AI.method: 通过注意力机制增强特征对齐，结合少量未标记目标域图像进行无监督域适应，构建领域鲁棒的深度网络，并发布新数据集SVOX。
AI.result: 在目标域图像使用量减少两个数量级的情况下，模型性能超越现有最优方法，且新数据集SVOX推动了跨域视觉定位研究。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了跨域差异问题，为低样本场景下的视觉地理定位提供了新思路，同时SVOX数据集为后续研究提供了基准。

authors_text: Rahaf Aljundi,Nikolay Chumerin,Daniel Olmeda Reino
title: Identifying Wrongly Predicted Samples: A Method for Active Learning
title_zh: 识别错误预测样本：一种主动学习方法
abstract: State-of-the-art machine learning models require access to significant amount of annotated data in order to achieve the desired level of performance. While unlabelled data can be largely available and even abundant, annotation process can be quite expensive and limiting. Under the assumption that some samples are more important for a given task than others, active learning targets the problem of identifying the most informative samples that one should acquire annotations for. Instead of the conventional reliance on model uncertainty as a proxy to leverage new unknown labels, in this work we propose a simple sample selection criterion that moves beyond uncertainty. By first accepting the model prediction and then judging its effect on the generalization error, we can better identify wrongly predicted samples. We further present an approximation to our criterion that is very efficient and provides a similarity based interpretation. In addition to evaluating our method on the standard benchmarks of active learning, we consider the challenging yet realistic scenario of imbalanced data where categories are not equally represented. We show state-of-the-art results and better rates at identifying wrongly predicted samples. Our method is simple, model agnostic and relies on the current model status without the need for re-training from scratch.
summary: State-of-the-art machine learning models require access to significant amount of annotated data in order to achieve the desired level of performance. While unlabelled data can be largely available and even abundant, annotation process can be quite expensive and limiting. Under the assumption that some samples are more important for a given task than others, active learning targets the problem of identifying the most informative samples that one should acquire annotations for. Instead of the conventional reliance on model uncertainty as a proxy to leverage new unknown labels, in this work we propose a simple sample selection criterion that moves beyond uncertainty. By first accepting the model prediction and then judging its effect on the generalization error, we can better identify wrongly predicted samples. We further present an approximation to our criterion that is very efficient and provides a similarity based interpretation. In addition to evaluating our method on the standard benchmarks of active learning, we consider the challenging yet realistic scenario of imbalanced data where categories are not equally represented. We show state-of-the-art results and better rates at identifying wrongly predicted samples. Our method is simple, model agnostic and relies on the current model status without the need for re-training from scratch.
abstract_zh: 最先进的机器学习模型需要访问大量带注释的数据才能达到所需的性能水平。虽然未标记的数据在很大程度上是可用的，甚至是丰富的，但注释过程可能非常昂贵且受到限制。假设某些样本对于给定任务比其他样本更重要，主动学习的目标是识别应获取注释的最具信息量的样本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个超越不确定性的简单样本选择标准，而不是传统上依赖模型不确定性作为利用新未知标签的代理。通过首先接受模型预测，然后判断其对泛化误差的影响，我们可以更好地识别错误预测的样本。我们进一步提出了一个非常有效的标准近似值，并提供了基于相似性的解释。除了根据主动学习的标准基准评估我们的方法之外，我们还考虑了不平衡数据的挑战性但现实的场景，其中类别的代表程度不均。我们展示了最先进的结果以及识别错误预测样本的更高速率。我们的方法很简单，与模型无关，并且依赖于当前的模型状态，无需从头开始重新训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种主动学习方法，通过评估模型预测对泛化误差的影响来识别错误预测样本，无需依赖传统不确定性度量。
AI.motivation: 标注数据成本高昂且传统主动学习依赖模型不确定性可能不够准确，需更有效识别错误预测样本以提升标注效率。
AI.method: 接受模型预测后分析其对泛化误差的影响，提出基于相似性的高效近似方法，适用于不平衡数据场景。
AI.result: 在标准基准和不平衡数据集上均优于现有方法，实现更优的错误样本识别率且无需模型重训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简单、模型无关且高效，通过直接评估预测影响提升主动学习性能，适用于实际不平衡数据场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种主动学习方法，通过评估模型预测对泛化误差的影响来识别错误预测样本，无需依赖传统不确定性度量。
ai_content.motivation: 标注数据成本高昂且传统主动学习依赖模型不确定性可能不够准确，需更有效识别错误预测样本以提升标注效率。

search_text: Identifying Wrongly Predicted Samples: A Method for Active Learning 识别错误预测样本：一种主动学习方法 State-of-the-art machine learning models require access to significant amount of annotated data in order to achieve the desired level of performance. While unlabelled data can be largely available and even abundant, annotation process can be quite expensive and limiting. Under the assumption that some samples are more important for a given task than others, active learning targets the problem of identifying the most informative samples that one should acquire annotations for. Instead of the conventional reliance on model uncertainty as a proxy to leverage new unknown labels, in this work we propose a simple sample selection criterion that moves beyond uncertainty. By first accepting the model prediction and then judging its effect on the generalization error, we can better identify wrongly predicted samples. We further present an approximation to our criterion that is very efficient and provides a similarity based interpretation. In addition to evaluating our method on the standard benchmarks of active learning, we consider the challenging yet realistic scenario of imbalanced data where categories are not equally represented. We show state-of-the-art results and better rates at identifying wrongly predicted samples. Our method is simple, model agnostic and relies on the current model status without the need for re-training from scratch. 最先进的机器学习模型需要访问大量带注释的数据才能达到所需的性能水平。虽然未标记的数据在很大程度上是可用的，甚至是丰富的，但注释过程可能非常昂贵且受到限制。假设某些样本对于给定任务比其他样本更重要，主动学习的目标是识别应获取注释的最具信息量的样本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个超越不确定性的简单样本选择标准，而不是传统上依赖模型不确定性作为利用新未知标签的代理。通过首先接受模型预测，然后判断其对泛化误差的影响，我们可以更好地识别错误预测的样本。我们进一步提出了一个非常有效的标准近似值，并提供了基于相似性的解释。除了根据主动学习的标准基准评估我们的方法之外，我们还考虑了不平衡数据的挑战性但现实的场景，其中类别的代表程度不均。我们展示了最先进的结果以及识别错误预测样本的更高速率。我们的方法很简单，与模型无关，并且依赖于当前的模型状态，无需从头开始重新训练。 本文提出一种主动学习方法，通过评估模型预测对泛化误差的影响来识别错误预测样本，无需依赖传统不确定性度量。 Rahaf Aljundi,Nikolay Chumerin,Daniel Olmeda Reino cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Zijue Chen,David Ting,Rhys Newbury,Chao Chen
title: Semantic Segmentation for Partially Occluded Apple Trees Based on Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于深度学习的部分遮挡苹果树语义分割
abstract: Fruit tree pruning and fruit thinning require a powerful vision system that can provide high resolution segmentation of the fruit trees and their branches. However, recent works only consider the dormant season, where there are minimal occlusions on the branches or fit a polynomial curve to reconstruct branch shape and hence, losing information about branch thickness. In this work, we apply two state-of-the-art supervised learning models U-Net and DeepLabv3, and a conditional Generative Adversarial Network Pix2Pix (with and without the discriminator) to segment partially occluded 2D-open-V apple trees. Binary accuracy, Mean IoU, Boundary F1 score and Occluded branch recall were used to evaluate the performances of the models. DeepLabv3 outperforms the other models at Binary accuracy, Mean IoU and Boundary F1 score, but is surpassed by Pix2Pix (without discriminator) and U-Net in Occluded branch recall. We define two difficulty indices to quantify the difficulty of the task: (1) Occlusion Difficulty Index and (2) Depth Difficulty Index. We analyze the worst 10 images in both difficulty indices by means of Branch Recall and Occluded Branch Recall. U-Net outperforms the other two models in the current metrics. On the other hand, Pix2Pix (without discriminator) provides more information on branch paths, which are not reflected by the metrics. This highlights the need for more specific metrics on recovering occluded information. Furthermore, this shows the usefulness of image-transfer networks for hallucination behind occlusions. Future work is required to further enhance the models to recover more information from occlusions such that this technology can be applied to automating agricultural tasks in a commercial environment.
summary: Fruit tree pruning and fruit thinning require a powerful vision system that can provide high resolution segmentation of the fruit trees and their branches. However, recent works only consider the dormant season, where there are minimal occlusions on the branches or fit a polynomial curve to reconstruct branch shape and hence, losing information about branch thickness. In this work, we apply two state-of-the-art supervised learning models U-Net and DeepLabv3, and a conditional Generative Adversarial Network Pix2Pix (with and without the discriminator) to segment partially occluded 2D-open-V apple trees. Binary accuracy, Mean IoU, Boundary F1 score and Occluded branch recall were used to evaluate the performances of the models. DeepLabv3 outperforms the other models at Binary accuracy, Mean IoU and Boundary F1 score, but is surpassed by Pix2Pix (without discriminator) and U-Net in Occluded branch recall. We define two difficulty indices to quantify the difficulty of the task: (1) Occlusion Difficulty Index and (2) Depth Difficulty Index. We analyze the worst 10 images in both difficulty indices by means of Branch Recall and Occluded Branch Recall. U-Net outperforms the other two models in the current metrics. On the other hand, Pix2Pix (without discriminator) provides more information on branch paths, which are not reflected by the metrics. This highlights the need for more specific metrics on recovering occluded information. Furthermore, this shows the usefulness of image-transfer networks for hallucination behind occlusions. Future work is required to further enhance the models to recover more information from occlusions such that this technology can be applied to automating agricultural tasks in a commercial environment.
abstract_zh: 果树修剪和疏果需要强大的视觉系统，可以提供果树及其树枝的高分辨率分割。然而，最近的工作只考虑休眠季节，其中树枝上的遮挡最小，或者拟合多项式曲线来重建树枝形状，因此丢失了有关树枝厚度的信息。在这项工作中，我们应用两种最先进的监督学习模型 U-Net 和 DeepLabv3，以及条件生成对抗网络 Pix2Pix（带和不带鉴别器）来分割部分遮挡的 2D-open-V 苹果树。使用二值准确率、平均 IoU、边界 F1 分数和闭塞分支召回率来评估模型的性能。 DeepLabv3 在二进制精度、平均 IoU 和边界 F1 分数方面优于其他模型，但在遮挡分支召回方面被 Pix2Pix（无鉴别器）和 U-Net 超越。我们定义了两个难度指数来量化任务的难度：（1）遮挡难度指数和（2）深度难度指数。我们通过分支召回和闭塞分支召回来分析两个难度指数中最差的 10 个图像。 U-Net 在当前指标中优于其他两个模型。另一方面，Pix2Pix（没有鉴别器）提供了有关分支路径的更多信息，这些信息未通过度量反映出来。这凸显了需要更具体的指标来恢复被遮挡的信息。此外，这显示了图像传输网络对于遮挡背后的幻觉的有用性。未来的工作需要进一步增强模型，以从遮挡中恢复更多信息，以便该技术可以应用于商业环境中的农业任务自动化。

AI.tldr: 本文基于深度学习对部分遮挡的2D开放V形苹果树进行语义分割，以提升果树修剪和疏果的视觉系统性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅针对休眠期果树（遮挡少）或通过多项式曲线拟合枝干形状，导致枝干厚度信息丢失，需开发能处理遮挡的高精度分割方法。
AI.method: 采用U-Net、DeepLabv3和Pix2Pix（含/不含判别器）三种模型进行分割，通过二分类准确率、Mean IoU、边界F1分数及遮挡枝干召回率评估性能，并定义遮挡难度指数和深度难度指数分析困难样本。
AI.result: DeepLabv3在二分类准确率、Mean IoU和边界F1分数上表现最佳，但Pix2Pix（无判别器）和U-Net在遮挡枝干召回率上更优；U-Net在当前指标中整体表现最佳，而Pix2Pix能提供现有指标未反映的枝干路径信息。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更具体的遮挡信息恢复指标，图像迁移网络在遮挡区域信息生成中具有潜力，未来需进一步优化模型以实现农业自动化商用。

authors_text: Xudong Lv,Boya Wang,Dong Ye,Shuo Wang
title: Semantic Flow-guided Motion Removal Method for Robust Mapping
title_zh: 用于鲁棒映射的语义流引导运动消除方法
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Moving objects in scenes are still a severe challenge for the SLAM system. Many efforts have tried to remove the motion regions in the images by detecting moving objects. In this way, the keypoints belonging to motion regions will be ignored in the later calculations. In this paper, we proposed a novel motion removal method, leveraging semantic information and optical flow to extract motion regions. Different from previous works, we don't predict moving objects or motion regions directly from image sequences. We computed rigid optical flow, synthesized by the depth and pose, and compared it against the estimated optical flow to obtain initial motion regions. Then, we utilized K-means to finetune the motion region masks with instance segmentation masks. The ORB-SLAM2 integrated with the proposed motion removal method achieved the best performance in both indoor and outdoor dynamic environments.
summary: Moving objects in scenes are still a severe challenge for the SLAM system. Many efforts have tried to remove the motion regions in the images by detecting moving objects. In this way, the keypoints belonging to motion regions will be ignored in the later calculations. In this paper, we proposed a novel motion removal method, leveraging semantic information and optical flow to extract motion regions. Different from previous works, we don't predict moving objects or motion regions directly from image sequences. We computed rigid optical flow, synthesized by the depth and pose, and compared it against the estimated optical flow to obtain initial motion regions. Then, we utilized K-means to finetune the motion region masks with instance segmentation masks. The ORB-SLAM2 integrated with the proposed motion removal method achieved the best performance in both indoor and outdoor dynamic environments.
abstract_zh: 场景中的移动物体对于 SLAM 系统来说仍然是一个严峻的挑战。许多努力试图通过检测运动物体来去除图像中的运动区域。这样，属于运动区域的关键点将在后面的计算中被忽略。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的运动去除方法，利用语义信息和光流来提取运动区域。与以前的工作不同，我们不直接从图像序列预测移动对象或运动区域。我们计算了由深度和姿态合成的刚性光流，并将其与估计的光流进行比较以获得初始运动区域。然后，我们利用 K 均值通过实例分割掩模来微调运动区域掩模。与所提出的运动消除方法集成的 ORB-SLAM2 在室内和室外动态环境中均取得了最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合语义信息和光流的运动区域去除方法，以提升SLAM系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 动态场景中的移动物体仍是SLAM系统的重大挑战，传统方法直接预测运动区域存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过深度和姿态计算刚性光流，与估计光流对比获取初始运动区域，再结合实例分割掩码使用K-means优化运动掩码。
AI.result: 集成所提方法的ORB-SLAM2在室内外动态环境中均取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效去除运动区域，提升了动态场景下的建图准确性与稳定性。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有效去除运动区域，提升了动态场景下的建图准确性与稳定性。

method: 通过深度和姿态计算刚性光流，与估计光流对比获取初始运动区域，再结合实例分割掩码使用K-means优化运动掩码。
result: 集成所提方法的ORB-SLAM2在室内外动态环境中均取得最佳性能。
conclusion: 该方法有效去除运动区域，提升了动态场景下的建图准确性与稳定性。
search_text: Semantic Flow-guided Motion Removal Method for Robust Mapping 用于鲁棒映射的语义流引导运动消除方法 Moving objects in scenes are still a severe challenge for the SLAM system. Many efforts have tried to remove the motion regions in the images by detecting moving objects. In this way, the keypoints belonging to motion regions will be ignored in the later calculations. In this paper, we proposed a novel motion removal method, leveraging semantic information and optical flow to extract motion regions. Different from previous works, we don't predict moving objects or motion regions directly from image sequences. We computed rigid optical flow, synthesized by the depth and pose, and compared it against the estimated optical flow to obtain initial motion regions. Then, we utilized K-means to finetune the motion region masks with instance segmentation masks. The ORB-SLAM2 integrated with the proposed motion removal method achieved the best performance in both indoor and outdoor dynamic environments. 场景中的移动物体对于 SLAM 系统来说仍然是一个严峻的挑战。许多努力试图通过检测运动物体来去除图像中的运动区域。这样，属于运动区域的关键点将在后面的计算中被忽略。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的运动去除方法，利用语义信息和光流来提取运动区域。与以前的工作不同，我们不直接从图像序列预测移动对象或运动区域。我们计算了由深度和姿态合成的刚性光流，并将其与估计的光流进行比较以获得初始运动区域。然后，我们利用 K 均值通过实例分割掩模来微调运动区域掩模。与所提出的运动消除方法集成的 ORB-SLAM2 在室内和室外动态环境中均取得了最佳性能。 本文提出了一种结合语义信息和光流的运动区域去除方法，以提升SLAM系统的鲁棒性。 Xudong Lv,Boya Wang,Dong Ye,Shuo Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Timothy Farnworth,Christopher Renton,Reuben Strydom,Adrian Wills,Tristan Perez
title: A Heteroscedastic Likelihood Model for Two-frame Optical Flow
title_zh: 二帧光流的异方差似然模型
abstract: Machine vision is an important sensing technology used in mobile robotic systems. Advancing the autonomy of such systems requires accurate characterisation of sensor uncertainty. Vision includes intrinsic uncertainty due to the camera sensor and extrinsic uncertainty due to environmental lighting and texture, which propagate through the image processing algorithms used to produce visual measurements. To faithfully characterise visual measurements, we must take into account these uncertainties. In this paper, we propose a new class of likelihood functions that characterises the uncertainty of the error distribution of two-frame optical flow that enables a heteroscedastic dependence on texture. We employ the proposed class to characterise the Farneback and Lucas Kanade optical flow algorithms and achieve close agreement with their respective empirical error distributions over a wide range of texture in a simulated environment. The utility of the proposed likelihood model is demonstrated in a visual odometry ego-motion study, which results in performance competitive with contemporary methods. The development of an empirically congruent likelihood model advances the requisite tool-set for vision-based Bayesian inference and enables sensor data fusion with GPS, LiDAR and IMU to advance robust autonomous navigation.
summary: Machine vision is an important sensing technology used in mobile robotic systems. Advancing the autonomy of such systems requires accurate characterisation of sensor uncertainty. Vision includes intrinsic uncertainty due to the camera sensor and extrinsic uncertainty due to environmental lighting and texture, which propagate through the image processing algorithms used to produce visual measurements. To faithfully characterise visual measurements, we must take into account these uncertainties. In this paper, we propose a new class of likelihood functions that characterises the uncertainty of the error distribution of two-frame optical flow that enables a heteroscedastic dependence on texture. We employ the proposed class to characterise the Farneback and Lucas Kanade optical flow algorithms and achieve close agreement with their respective empirical error distributions over a wide range of texture in a simulated environment. The utility of the proposed likelihood model is demonstrated in a visual odometry ego-motion study, which results in performance competitive with contemporary methods. The development of an empirically congruent likelihood model advances the requisite tool-set for vision-based Bayesian inference and enables sensor data fusion with GPS, LiDAR and IMU to advance robust autonomous navigation.
abstract_zh: 机器视觉是移动机器人系统中使用的重要传感技术。提高此类系统的自主性需要准确表征传感器的不确定性。视觉包括由于相机传感器引起的内在不确定性和由于环境照明和纹理引起的外在不确定性，这些不确定性通过用于产生视觉测量的图像处理算法传播。为了忠实地表征视觉测量，我们必须考虑这些不确定性。在本文中，我们提出了一类新的似然函数，它描述了两帧光流误差分布的不确定性，从而实现了对纹理的异方差依赖。我们采用所提出的类来表征 Farneback 和 Lucas Kanade 光流算法，并在模拟环境中的各种纹理上与它们各自的经验误差分布紧密一致。所提出的似然模型的实用性在视觉里程计自我运动研究中得到了证明，其性能与当代方法具有竞争力。经验一致似然模型的开发为基于视觉的贝叶斯推理提供了必要的工具集，并使传感器数据与 GPS、LiDAR 和 IMU 融合，以推进稳健的自主导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异方差似然模型，用于表征双帧光流误差分布的不确定性，以提升视觉测量的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉算法未充分考虑传感器内在不确定性与环境外在因素（如光照、纹理）对光流误差的影响，导致测量可靠性不足，影响自主导航系统的性能。
AI.method: 设计具有纹理异方差特性的似然函数，应用于Farneback和Lucas Kanade光流算法，通过模拟环境验证其与经验误差分布的一致性，并在视觉里程计任务中评估效果。
AI.result: 所提模型在多种纹理场景下准确拟合光流误差分布，视觉里程计性能与当前主流方法相当，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为视觉测量提供了更精确的不确定性表征，为多传感器数据融合与鲁棒自主导航系统提供了关键工具支持。

authors_text: Basil Mustafa,Carlos Riquelme,Joan Puigcerver,André Susano Pinto,Daniel Keysers,Neil Houlsby
title: Deep Ensembles for Low-Data Transfer Learning
title_zh: 用于低数据传输学习的深度集成
abstract: In the low-data regime, it is difficult to train good supervised models from scratch. Instead practitioners turn to pre-trained models, leveraging transfer learning. Ensembling is an empirically and theoretically appealing way to construct powerful predictive models, but the predominant approach of training multiple deep networks with different random initialisations collides with the need for transfer via pre-trained weights. In this work, we study different ways of creating ensembles from pre-trained models. We show that the nature of pre-training itself is a performant source of diversity, and propose a practical algorithm that efficiently identifies a subset of pre-trained models for any downstream dataset. The approach is simple: Use nearest-neighbour accuracy to rank pre-trained models, fine-tune the best ones with a small hyperparameter sweep, and greedily construct an ensemble to minimise validation cross-entropy. When evaluated together with strong baselines on 19 different downstream tasks (the Visual Task Adaptation Benchmark), this achieves state-of-the-art performance at a much lower inference budget, even when selecting from over 2,000 pre-trained models. We also assess our ensembles on ImageNet variants and show improved robustness to distribution shift.
summary: In the low-data regime, it is difficult to train good supervised models from scratch. Instead practitioners turn to pre-trained models, leveraging transfer learning. Ensembling is an empirically and theoretically appealing way to construct powerful predictive models, but the predominant approach of training multiple deep networks with different random initialisations collides with the need for transfer via pre-trained weights. In this work, we study different ways of creating ensembles from pre-trained models. We show that the nature of pre-training itself is a performant source of diversity, and propose a practical algorithm that efficiently identifies a subset of pre-trained models for any downstream dataset. The approach is simple: Use nearest-neighbour accuracy to rank pre-trained models, fine-tune the best ones with a small hyperparameter sweep, and greedily construct an ensemble to minimise validation cross-entropy. When evaluated together with strong baselines on 19 different downstream tasks (the Visual Task Adaptation Benchmark), this achieves state-of-the-art performance at a much lower inference budget, even when selecting from over 2,000 pre-trained models. We also assess our ensembles on ImageNet variants and show improved robustness to distribution shift.
abstract_zh: 在低数据情况下，很难从头开始训练好的监督模型。相反，从业者转向利用迁移学习预先训练的模型。集成是构建强大预测模型的一种在经验和理论上都很有吸引力的方法，但使用不同随机初始化训练多个深度网络的主要方法与通过预训练权重进行传输的需求相冲突。在这项工作中，我们研究了从预训练模型创建集成的不同方法。我们证明预训练本身的本质是多样性的高效来源，并提出了一种实用的算法，可以有效地识别任何下游数据集的预训练模型的子集。该方法很简单：使用最近邻精度对预先训练的模型进行排名，通过小的超参数扫描微调最佳模型，并贪婪地构建一个集成以最小化验证交叉熵。当与 19 个不同下游任务的强大基线（视觉任务适应基准）一起进行评估时，即使从 2,000 多个预训练模型中进行选择，也能以低得多的推理预算实现最先进的性能。我们还评估了 ImageNet 变体上的集成，并显示出对分布变化的鲁棒性的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从预训练模型中构建集成模型以解决低数据量下的迁移学习问题。
AI.motivation: 在数据量有限的情况下，从头训练模型效果不佳，但传统集成方法（多模型随机初始化）与迁移学习所需的预训练权重存在冲突，需探索有效利用预训练模型的集成策略。
AI.method: 通过近邻准确率对预训练模型排序，筛选最优模型进行微调，并通过贪心算法构建最小化验证集交叉熵的集成模型。
AI.result: 在19个下游任务（Visual Task Adaptation Benchmark）中达到最先进性能，推理成本更低；在ImageNet变体上展现更强分布外鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型的多样性可有效用于低数据迁移学习，该方法在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算资源需求。

authors_text: Hui Liu,Bo Zhao,Minzhi Ji,Peng Liu
title: GreedyFool: Multi-Factor Imperceptibility and Its Application to Designing a Black-box Adversarial Attack
title_zh: GreedyFool：多因素不可感知性及其在设计黑盒对抗攻击中的应用
abstract: Adversarial examples are well-designed input samples, in which perturbations are imperceptible to the human eyes, but easily mislead the output of deep neural networks (DNNs). Existing works synthesize adversarial examples by leveraging simple metrics to penalize perturbations, that lack sufficient consideration of the human visual system (HVS), which produces noticeable artifacts. To explore why the perturbations are visible, this paper summarizes four primary factors affecting the perceptibility of human eyes. Based on this investigation, we design a multi-factor metric MulFactorLoss for measuring the perceptual loss between benign examples and adversarial ones. In order to test the imperceptibility of the multi-factor metric, we propose a novel black-box adversarial attack that is referred to as GreedyFool. GreedyFool applies differential evolution to evaluate the effects of perturbed pixels on the confidence of a target DNN, and introduces greedy approximation to automatically generate adversarial perturbations. We conduct extensive experiments on the ImageNet and CIFRA-10 datasets and a comprehensive user study with 60 participants. The experimental results demonstrate that MulFactorLoss is a more imperceptible metric than the existing pixelwise metrics, and GreedyFool achieves a 100% success rate in a black-box manner.
summary: Adversarial examples are well-designed input samples, in which perturbations are imperceptible to the human eyes, but easily mislead the output of deep neural networks (DNNs). Existing works synthesize adversarial examples by leveraging simple metrics to penalize perturbations, that lack sufficient consideration of the human visual system (HVS), which produces noticeable artifacts. To explore why the perturbations are visible, this paper summarizes four primary factors affecting the perceptibility of human eyes. Based on this investigation, we design a multi-factor metric MulFactorLoss for measuring the perceptual loss between benign examples and adversarial ones. In order to test the imperceptibility of the multi-factor metric, we propose a novel black-box adversarial attack that is referred to as GreedyFool. GreedyFool applies differential evolution to evaluate the effects of perturbed pixels on the confidence of a target DNN, and introduces greedy approximation to automatically generate adversarial perturbations. We conduct extensive experiments on the ImageNet and CIFRA-10 datasets and a comprehensive user study with 60 participants. The experimental results demonstrate that MulFactorLoss is a more imperceptible metric than the existing pixelwise metrics, and GreedyFool achieves a 100% success rate in a black-box manner.
abstract_zh: 对抗性例子是精心设计的输入样本，其中的扰动是人眼无法察觉的，但很容易误导深度神经网络（DNN）的输出。现有的作品通过利用简单的指标来惩罚扰动来合成对抗性示例，但缺乏对人类视觉系统（HVS）的充分考虑，而人类视觉系统（HVS）会产生明显的伪影。为了探索为什么扰动是可见的，本文总结了影响人眼感知能力的四个主要因素。基于这项调查，我们设计了一个多因素度量 MulFactorLoss，用于测量良性示例和对抗性示例之间的感知损失。为了测试多因素指标的不可感知性，我们提出了一种新颖的黑盒对抗攻击，称为 GreedyFool。 GreedyFool 应用差分进化来评估扰动像素对目标 DNN 置信度的影响，并引入贪婪近似来自动生成对抗性扰动。我们对 ImageNet 和 CIFRA-10 数据集进行了广泛的实验，并对 60 名参与者进行了全面的用户研究。实验结果表明，MulFactorLoss 是一个比现有像素级指标更难以察觉的指标，并且 GreedyFool 以黑盒方式实现了 100% 的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多因素不可感知性的黑盒对抗攻击方法GreedyFool，通过设计新的感知损失函数MulFactorLoss生成人类难以察觉的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本生成方法过度依赖像素级度量，忽视人类视觉系统特性，导致生成的扰动容易被察觉。本文旨在通过结合人类视觉感知因素提升对抗样本的不可感知性。
AI.method: 提出多因素感知损失函数MulFactorLoss，综合四个影响人类感知的关键因素；设计GreedyFool攻击框架，结合差分进化算法和贪心近似策略生成对抗扰动，并在ImageNet和CIFAR-10数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明MulFactorLoss相比传统像素级度量具有更优的不可感知性，GreedyFool在黑盒场景下对目标模型达到100%攻击成功率，用户研究验证了对抗样本的隐蔽性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入多因素感知模型和贪心优化策略，本文有效提升了黑盒对抗攻击的隐蔽性与成功率，为对抗样本生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yuta Yajima,Akihiro Inokuchi
title: Refining Similarity Matrices to Cluster Attributed Networks Accurately
title_zh: 精确细化相似矩阵以聚类属性网络
comment: 9pages, 11 figures, 3 tables
comments: 9pages, 11 figures, 3 tables
abstract: As a result of the recent popularity of social networks and the increase in the number of research papers published across all fields, attributed networks consisting of relationships between objects, such as humans and the papers, that have attributes are becoming increasingly large. Therefore, various studies for clustering attributed networks into sub-networks are being actively conducted. When clustering attributed networks using spectral clustering, the clustering accuracy is strongly affected by the quality of the similarity matrices, which are input into spectral clustering and represent the similarities between pairs of objects. In this paper, we aim to increase the accuracy by refining the matrices before applying spectral clustering to them. We verify the practicability of our proposed method by comparing the accuracy of spectral clustering with similarity matrices before and after refining them.
summary: As a result of the recent popularity of social networks and the increase in the number of research papers published across all fields, attributed networks consisting of relationships between objects, such as humans and the papers, that have attributes are becoming increasingly large. Therefore, various studies for clustering attributed networks into sub-networks are being actively conducted. When clustering attributed networks using spectral clustering, the clustering accuracy is strongly affected by the quality of the similarity matrices, which are input into spectral clustering and represent the similarities between pairs of objects. In this paper, we aim to increase the accuracy by refining the matrices before applying spectral clustering to them. We verify the practicability of our proposed method by comparing the accuracy of spectral clustering with similarity matrices before and after refining them.
abstract_zh: 由于最近社交网络的流行以及各领域发表的研究论文数量的增加，由具有属性的对象（例如人类和论文）之间的关系组成的属性网络变得越来越大。因此，正在积极进行将属性网络聚类为子网络的各种研究。当使用谱聚类对属性网络进行聚类时，聚类精度很大程度上受到相似矩阵质量的影响，相似矩阵被输入谱聚类并表示对象对之间的相似性。在本文中，我们的目标是在对矩阵应用谱聚类之前通过细化矩阵来提高准确性。我们通过比较谱聚类与相似矩阵精炼前后的准确性，验证了所提出方法的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化相似度矩阵提升属性网络聚类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 属性网络规模扩大导致传统光谱聚类方法因相似度矩阵质量不足而影响聚类效果，需改进矩阵以提高准确性。
AI.method: 在应用光谱聚类前，通过优化算法改进相似度矩阵，再对比优化前后聚类结果。
AI.result: 实验验证了优化后的相似度矩阵显著提升了聚类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 优化相似度矩阵能有效增强属性网络聚类的准确性。

authors_text: Elochukwu Ukwandu,Mohamed Amine Ben Farah,Hanan Hindy,David Brosset,Dimitris Kavallieros,Robert Atkinson,Christos Tachtatzis,Miroslav Bures,Ivan Andonovic,Xavier Bellekens
title: A Review of Cyber-Ranges and Test-Beds: Current and Future Trends
title_zh: 网络靶场和试验台回顾：当前和未来趋势
comment: 43 pages, 18 Figures, 8 Tables
comments: 43 pages, 18 Figures, 8 Tables
abstract: Cyber situational awareness has been proven to be of value in forming a comprehensive understanding of threats and vulnerabilities within organisations, as the degree of exposure is governed by the prevailing levels of cyber-hygiene and established processes. A more accurate assessment of the security provision informs on the most vulnerable environments that necessitate more diligent management. The rapid proliferation in the automation of cyber-attacks is reducing the gap between information and operational technologies and the need to review the current levels of robustness against new sophisticated cyber-attacks, trends, technologies and mitigation countermeasures has become pressing. A deeper characterisation is also the basis with which to predict future vulnerabilities in turn guiding the most appropriate deployment technologies. Thus, refreshing established practices and the scope of the training to support the decision making of users and operators. The foundation of the training provision is the use of Cyber-Ranges (CRs) and Test-Beds (TBs), platforms/tools that help inculcate a deeper understanding of the evolution of an attack and the methodology to deploy the most impactful countermeasures to arrest breaches. In this paper, an evaluation of documented CR and TB platforms is evaluated. CRs and TBs are segmented by type, technology, threat scenarios, applications and the scope of attainable training. To enrich the analysis of documented CR and TB research and cap the study, a taxonomy is developed to provide a broader comprehension of the future of CRs and TBs. The taxonomy elaborates on the CRs/TBs different dimensions, as well as, highlighting a diminishing differentiation between application areas.

A more accurate assessment of the security provision informs on the most vulnerable environments that necessitate more diligent management. The rapid proliferation in the automation of cyber-attacks is reducing the gap between information and operational technologies and the need to review the current levels of robustness against new sophisticated cyber-attacks, trends, technologies and mitigation countermeasures has become pressing. Thus, refreshing established practices and the scope of the training to support the decision making of users and operators. In this paper, an evaluation of documented CR and TB platforms is evaluated. CRs and TBs are segmented by type, technology, threat scenarios, applications and the scope of attainable training. To enrich the analysis of documented CR and TB research and cap the study, a taxonomy is developed to provide a broader comprehension of the future of CRs and TBs. The taxonomy elaborates on the CRs/TBs different dimensions, as well as, highlighting a diminishing differentiation between application areas.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，网络态势感知对于全面了解组织内的威胁和漏洞具有重要价值，因为暴露程度取决于当前的网络卫生水平和既定流程。对安全措施进行更准确的评估可以了解最脆弱的环境，从而需要更勤奋的管理。网络攻击自动化的迅速扩散正在缩小信息和操作技术之间的差距，并且迫切需要审查当前针对新的复杂网络攻击、趋势、技术和缓解对策的稳健性水平。更深入的表征也是预测未来漏洞的基础，进而指导最合适的部署技术。因此，刷新既定实践和培训范围，以支持用户和操作员的决策。培训的基础是使用网络靶场 (CR) 和测试床 (TB)、平台/工具，帮助深入了解攻击的演变以及部署最有效的对策来阻止违规行为的方法。本文对已记录的 CR 和 TB 平台进行了评估。 CR 和 TB 按类型、技术、威胁场景、应用和可实现的培训范围进行细分。为了丰富对记录的 CR 和 TB 研究的分析并限制研究，开发了一种分类法，以便更广泛地理解 CR 和 TB 的未来。该分类法详细阐述了 CR/TB 的不同维度，并强调了应用领域之间的差异逐渐缩小。

AI.tldr: 本文对网络靶场（CRs）和测试床（TBs）的现状及未来趋势进行综述，通过分类评估和构建分类法，分析其技术、应用场景及培训效果。
AI.motivation: 随着网络攻击自动化加剧，组织需提升安全态势感知能力，而CRs/TBs作为培训和测试工具的重要性日益凸显，亟需系统梳理其发展现状与未来方向。
AI.method: 通过文献调研，对现有CRs/TBs平台按类型、技术、威胁场景等维度分类，并构建分类法以总结其应用特点与发展趋势。
AI.result: 提出涵盖CRs/TBs多维度的分类框架，揭示其应用场景边界逐渐模糊，并总结当前平台在培训和技术验证中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: CRs/TBs的分类法为未来研究提供基础，强调其在应对新型网络威胁中的核心价值，同时需进一步融合技术与培训需求以提升实战效能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文对网络靶场（CRs）和测试床（TBs）的现状及未来趋势进行综述，通过分类评估和构建分类法，分析其技术、应用场景及培训效果。
ai_content.motivation: 随着网络攻击自动化加剧，组织需提升安全态势感知能力，而CRs/TBs作为培训和测试工具的重要性日益凸显，亟需系统梳理其发展现状与未来方向。
ai_content.method: 通过文献调研，对现有CRs/TBs平台按类型、技术、威胁场景等维度分类，并构建分类法以总结其应用特点与发展趋势。
ai_content.result: 提出涵盖CRs/TBs多维度的分类框架，揭示其应用场景边界逐渐模糊，并总结当前平台在培训和技术验证中的关键作用。
ai_content.conclusion: CRs/TBs的分类法为未来研究提供基础，强调其在应对新型网络威胁中的核心价值，同时需进一步融合技术与培训需求以提升实战效能。

search_text: A Review of Cyber-Ranges and Test-Beds: Current and Future Trends 网络靶场和试验台回顾：当前和未来趋势 Cyber situational awareness has been proven to be of value in forming a comprehensive understanding of threats and vulnerabilities within organisations, as the degree of exposure is governed by the prevailing levels of cyber-hygiene and established processes. A more accurate assessment of the security provision informs on the most vulnerable environments that necessitate more diligent management. The rapid proliferation in the automation of cyber-attacks is reducing the gap between information and operational technologies and the need to review the current levels of robustness against new sophisticated cyber-attacks, trends, technologies and mitigation countermeasures has become pressing. A deeper characterisation is also the basis with which to predict future vulnerabilities in turn guiding the most appropriate deployment technologies. Thus, refreshing established practices and the scope of the training to support the decision making of users and operators. The foundation of the training provision is the use of Cyber-Ranges (CRs) and Test-Beds (TBs), platforms/tools that help inculcate a deeper understanding of the evolution of an attack and the methodology to deploy the most impactful countermeasures to arrest breaches. In this paper, an evaluation of documented CR and TB platforms is evaluated. CRs and TBs are segmented by type, technology, threat scenarios, applications and the scope of attainable training. To enrich the analysis of documented CR and TB research and cap the study, a taxonomy is developed to provide a broader comprehension of the future of CRs and TBs. The taxonomy elaborates on the CRs/TBs different dimensions, as well as, highlighting a diminishing differentiation between application areas. 事实证明，网络态势感知对于全面了解组织内的威胁和漏洞具有重要价值，因为暴露程度取决于当前的网络卫生水平和既定流程。对安全措施进行更准确的评估可以了解最脆弱的环境，从而需要更勤奋的管理。网络攻击自动化的迅速扩散正在缩小信息和操作技术之间的差距，并且迫切需要审查当前针对新的复杂网络攻击、趋势、技术和缓解对策的稳健性水平。更深入的表征也是预测未来漏洞的基础，进而指导最合适的部署技术。因此，刷新既定实践和培训范围，以支持用户和操作员的决策。培训的基础是使用网络靶场 (CR) 和测试床 (TB)、平台/工具，帮助深入了解攻击的演变以及部署最有效的对策来阻止违规行为的方法。本文对已记录的 CR 和 TB 平台进行了评估。 CR 和 TB 按类型、技术、威胁场景、应用和可实现的培训范围进行细分。为了丰富对记录的 CR 和 TB 研究的分析并限制研究，开发了一种分类法，以便更广泛地理解 CR 和 TB 的未来。该分类法详细阐述了 CR/TB 的不同维度，并强调了应用领域之间的差异逐渐缩小。 本文对网络靶场（CRs）和测试床（TBs）的现状及未来趋势进行综述，通过分类评估和构建分类法，分析其技术、应用场景及培训效果。 Elochukwu Ukwandu,Mohamed Amine Ben Farah,Hanan Hindy,David Brosset,Dimitris Kavallieros,Robert Atkinson,Christos Tachtatzis,Miroslav Bures,Ivan Andonovic,Xavier Bellekens cs.CR,cs.HC,eess.SY

authors_text: Span Spanbauer,Ian Hunter
title: Extended Koopman Models
title_zh: 扩展库夫曼模型
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures
abstract: We introduce two novel generalizations of the Koopman operator method of nonlinear dynamic modeling. Each of these generalizations leads to greatly improved predictive performance without sacrificing a unique trait of Koopman methods: the potential for fast, globally optimal control of nonlinear, nonconvex systems. The first generalization, Convex Koopman Models, uses convex rather than linear dynamics in the lifted space. The second, Extended Koopman Models, additionally introduces an invertible transformation of the control signal which contributes to the lifted convex dynamics. We describe a deep learning architecture for parameterizing these classes of models, and show experimentally that each significantly outperforms traditional Koopman models in trajectory prediction for two nonlinear, nonconvex dynamic systems.
summary: We introduce two novel generalizations of the Koopman operator method of nonlinear dynamic modeling. Each of these generalizations leads to greatly improved predictive performance without sacrificing a unique trait of Koopman methods: the potential for fast, globally optimal control of nonlinear, nonconvex systems. The first generalization, Convex Koopman Models, uses convex rather than linear dynamics in the lifted space. The second, Extended Koopman Models, additionally introduces an invertible transformation of the control signal which contributes to the lifted convex dynamics. We describe a deep learning architecture for parameterizing these classes of models, and show experimentally that each significantly outperforms traditional Koopman models in trajectory prediction for two nonlinear, nonconvex dynamic systems.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了非线性动态建模的库普曼算子方法的两种新颖的推广。这些概括中的每一个都可以大大提高预测性能，而不会牺牲库普曼方法的独特特征：对非线性非凸系统进行快速、全局最优控制的潜力。第一个概括是凸库普曼模型，在提升空间中使用凸动力学而不是线性动力学。第二个是扩展库普曼模型，另外引入了控制信号的可逆变换，这有助于提升凸动力学。我们描述了一种用于参数化这些模型类别的深度学习架构，并通过实验证明，每个模型在两个非线性、非凸动态系统的轨迹预测中都显着优于传统的库普曼模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种Koopman算子方法的扩展模型，通过引入凸动力学和控制信号变换，在保持全局最优控制优势的同时提升非线性系统的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Koopman方法依赖线性动力学，难以充分建模复杂非线性系统，需在保持控制优势的前提下提升预测精度。
AI.method: 提出凸Koopman模型（使用凸动力学）和扩展Koopman模型（增加控制信号可逆变换），并设计深度学习架构实现模型参数化。
AI.result: 实验表明两种模型在两个非线性非凸系统中显著优于传统Koopman模型，轨迹预测性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 扩展模型有效平衡了预测精度与控制优化能力，为复杂动态系统建模提供了新方法。

authors_text: Cheng Yu,Bo Wang,Bo Yang,Robby T. Tan
title: Multi-Scale Networks for 3D Human Pose Estimation with Inference Stage Optimization
title_zh: 用于具有推理阶段优化的 3D 人体姿势估计的多尺度网络
comment: 14 pages, 13 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2004.11822
comments: 14 pages, 13 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2004.11822
abstract: Estimating 3D human poses from a monocular video is still a challenging task. Many existing methods' performance drops when the target person is occluded by other objects, or the motion is too fast/slow relative to the scale and speed of the training data. Moreover, many of these methods are not designed or trained under severe occlusion explicitly, making their performance on handling occlusion compromised. Addressing these problems, we introduce a spatio-temporal network for robust 3D human pose estimation. As humans in videos may appear in different scales and have various motion speeds, we apply multi-scale spatial features for 2D joints or keypoints prediction in each individual frame, and multi-stride temporal convolutional networks (TCNs) to estimate 3D joints or keypoints. Furthermore, we design a spatio-temporal discriminator based on body structures as well as limb motions to assess whether the predicted pose forms a valid pose and a valid movement. During training, we explicitly mask out some keypoints to simulate various occlusion cases, from minor to severe occlusion, so that our network can learn better and becomes robust to various degrees of occlusion. As there are limited 3D ground-truth data, we further utilize 2D video data to inject a semi-supervised learning capability to our network. Moreover, we observe that there is a discrepancy between 3D pose prediction and 2D pose estimation due to different pose variations between video and image training datasets. We, therefore propose a confidence-based inference stage optimization to adaptively enforce 3D pose projection to match 2D pose estimation to further improve final pose prediction accuracy. Experiments on public datasets validate the effectiveness of our method, and our ablation studies show the strengths of our network's individual submodules.
summary: Estimating 3D human poses from a monocular video is still a challenging task. Many existing methods' performance drops when the target person is occluded by other objects, or the motion is too fast/slow relative to the scale and speed of the training data. Moreover, many of these methods are not designed or trained under severe occlusion explicitly, making their performance on handling occlusion compromised. Addressing these problems, we introduce a spatio-temporal network for robust 3D human pose estimation. As humans in videos may appear in different scales and have various motion speeds, we apply multi-scale spatial features for 2D joints or keypoints prediction in each individual frame, and multi-stride temporal convolutional networks (TCNs) to estimate 3D joints or keypoints. Furthermore, we design a spatio-temporal discriminator based on body structures as well as limb motions to assess whether the predicted pose forms a valid pose and a valid movement. During training, we explicitly mask out some keypoints to simulate various occlusion cases, from minor to severe occlusion, so that our network can learn better and becomes robust to various degrees of occlusion. As there are limited 3D ground-truth data, we further utilize 2D video data to inject a semi-supervised learning capability to our network. Moreover, we observe that there is a discrepancy between 3D pose prediction and 2D pose estimation due to different pose variations between video and image training datasets. We, therefore propose a confidence-based inference stage optimization to adaptively enforce 3D pose projection to match 2D pose estimation to further improve final pose prediction accuracy. Experiments on public datasets validate the effectiveness of our method, and our ablation studies show the strengths of our network's individual submodules.
abstract_zh: 从单眼视频中估计 3D 人体姿势仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。当目标人被其他物体遮挡，或者运动相对于训练数据的规模和速度太快/太慢时，许多现有方法的性能会下降。此外，许多这些方法并不是在严重遮挡下明确设计或训练的，这使得它们处理遮挡的性能受到影响。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一个时空网络来进行鲁棒的 3D 人体姿态估计。由于视频中的人物可能以不同的尺度出现并具有不同的运动速度，因此我们应用多尺度空间特征来预测每个帧中的 2D 关节或关键点，并应用多步幅时间卷积网络 (TCN) 来估计 3D 关节或关键点。此外，我们设计了一个基于身体结构和肢体运动的时空鉴别器，以评估预测的姿势是否形成有效的姿势和有效的运动。在训练过程中，我们明确地屏蔽了一些关键点来模拟各种遮挡情况，从轻微遮挡到严重遮挡，以便我们的网络可以更好地学习并对各种程度的遮挡变得鲁棒。由于 3D 地面实况数据有限，我们进一步利用 2D 视频数据为我们的网络注入半监督学习能力。此外，我们观察到，由于视频和图像训练数据集之间不同的姿势变化，3D 姿势预测和 2D 姿势估计之间存在差异。因此，我们提出了一种基于置信度的推理阶段优化，以自适应地强制 3D 姿态投影来匹配 2D 姿态估计，以进一步提高最终姿态预测的准确性。对公共数据集的实验验证了我们方法的有效性，我们的消融研究显示了我们网络各个子模块的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度网络与推理阶段优化方法，用于从单目视频中鲁棒估计3D人体姿态，特别是在遮挡和运动速度变化情况下。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在目标人物被遮挡或运动速度与训练数据不匹配时性能下降，且未明确针对严重遮挡进行设计，导致遮挡处理能力不足。
AI.method: 设计时空网络，结合多尺度空间特征预测2D关键点与多步长TCN估计3D关键点；引入基于人体结构和肢体运动的时空判别器验证姿态有效性；通过遮挡掩码模拟不同遮挡场景进行训练，并利用2D数据增强半监督学习能力；提出基于置信度的推理阶段优化以对齐3D与2D姿态预测。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，消融实验表明各子模块的贡献显著。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度特征融合、遮挡鲁棒训练及推理阶段优化，显著提升了复杂场景下3D人体姿态估计的准确性与鲁棒性。

ai_content_json.method: 设计时空网络，结合多尺度空间特征预测2D关键点与多步长TCN估计3D关键点；引入基于人体结构和肢体运动的时空判别器验证姿态有效性；通过遮挡掩码模拟不同遮挡场景进行训练，并利用2D数据增强半监督学习能力；提出基于置信度的推理阶段优化以对齐3D与2D姿态预测。
ai_content_json.result: 在公开数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，消融实验表明各子模块的贡献显著。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度特征融合、遮挡鲁棒训练及推理阶段优化，显著提升了复杂场景下3D人体姿态估计的准确性与鲁棒性。

search_text: Multi-Scale Networks for 3D Human Pose Estimation with Inference Stage Optimization 用于具有推理阶段优化的 3D 人体姿势估计的多尺度网络 Estimating 3D human poses from a monocular video is still a challenging task. Many existing methods' performance drops when the target person is occluded by other objects, or the motion is too fast/slow relative to the scale and speed of the training data. Moreover, many of these methods are not designed or trained under severe occlusion explicitly, making their performance on handling occlusion compromised. Addressing these problems, we introduce a spatio-temporal network for robust 3D human pose estimation. As humans in videos may appear in different scales and have various motion speeds, we apply multi-scale spatial features for 2D joints or keypoints prediction in each individual frame, and multi-stride temporal convolutional networks (TCNs) to estimate 3D joints or keypoints. Furthermore, we design a spatio-temporal discriminator based on body structures as well as limb motions to assess whether the predicted pose forms a valid pose and a valid movement. During training, we explicitly mask out some keypoints to simulate various occlusion cases, from minor to severe occlusion, so that our network can learn better and becomes robust to various degrees of occlusion. As there are limited 3D ground-truth data, we further utilize 2D video data to inject a semi-supervised learning capability to our network. Moreover, we observe that there is a discrepancy between 3D pose prediction and 2D pose estimation due to different pose variations between video and image training datasets. We, therefore propose a confidence-based inference stage optimization to adaptively enforce 3D pose projection to match 2D pose estimation to further improve final pose prediction accuracy. Experiments on public datasets validate the effectiveness of our method, and our ablation studies show the strengths of our network's individual submodules. 从单眼视频中估计 3D 人体姿势仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。当目标人被其他物体遮挡，或者运动相对于训练数据的规模和速度太快/太慢时，许多现有方法的性能会下降。此外，许多这些方法并不是在严重遮挡下明确设计或训练的，这使得它们处理遮挡的性能受到影响。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一个时空网络来进行鲁棒的 3D 人体姿态估计。由于视频中的人物可能以不同的尺度出现并具有不同的运动速度，因此我们应用多尺度空间特征来预测每个帧中的 2D 关节或关键点，并应用多步幅时间卷积网络 (TCN) 来估计 3D 关节或关键点。此外，我们设计了一个基于身体结构和肢体运动的时空鉴别器，以评估预测的姿势是否形成有效的姿势和有效的运动。在训练过程中，我们明确地屏蔽了一些关键点来模拟各种遮挡情况，从轻微遮挡到严重遮挡，以便我们的网络可以更好地学习并对各种程度的遮挡变得鲁棒。由于 3D 地面实况数据有限，我们进一步利用 2D 视频数据为我们的网络注入半监督学习能力。此外，我们观察到，由于视频和图像训练数据集之间不同的姿势变化，3D 姿势预测和 2D 姿势估计之间存在差异。因此，我们提出了一种基于置信度的推理阶段优化，以自适应地强制 3D 姿态投影来匹配 2D 姿态估计，以进一步提高最终姿态预测的准确性。对公共数据集的实验验证了我们方法的有效性，我们的消融研究显示了我们网络各个子模块的优势。 本文提出一种多尺度网络与推理阶段优化方法，用于从单目视频中鲁棒估计3D人体姿态，特别是在遮挡和运动速度变化情况下。 Cheng Yu,Bo Wang,Bo Yang,Robby T. Tan cs.CV

authors: Geert J. L. H. van Leenders
authors_json: Geert J. L. H. van Leenders
authors_text: Martijn P. A. Starmans,Milea J. M. Timbergen,Melissa Vos,Michel Renckens,Dirk J. Grünhagen,Geert J. L. H. van Leenders,Roy S. Dwarkasing,François E. J. A. Willemssen,Wiro J. Niessen,Cornelis Verhoef,Stefan Sleijfer,Jacob J. Visser,Stefan Klein
title: Differential diagnosis and molecular stratification of gastrointestinal stromal tumors on CT images using a radiomics approach
title_zh: 使用放射组学方法在 CT 图像上对胃肠道间质瘤进行鉴别诊断和分子分层
comment: Martijn P.A. Starmans and Milea J.M. Timbergen contributed equally
comments: Martijn P.A. Starmans and Milea J.M. Timbergen contributed equally
abstract: Distinguishing gastrointestinal stromal tumors (GISTs) from other intra-abdominal tumors and GISTs molecular analysis is necessary for treatment planning, but challenging due to its rarity. The aim of this study was to evaluate radiomics for distinguishing GISTs from other intra-abdominal tumors, and in GISTs, predict the c-KIT, PDGFRA,BRAF mutational status and mitotic index (MI). All 247 included patients (125 GISTS, 122 non-GISTs) underwent a contrast-enhanced venous phase CT. The GIST vs. non-GIST radiomics model, including imaging, age, sex and location, had a mean area under the curve (AUC) of 0.82. Three radiologists had an AUC of 0.69, 0.76, and 0.84, respectively. The radiomics model had an AUC of 0.52 for c-KIT, 0.56 for c-KIT exon 11, and 0.52 for the MI. Hence, our radiomics model was able to distinguish GIST from non-GISTS with a performance similar to three radiologists, but was not able to predict the c-KIT mutation or MI.
summary: Distinguishing gastrointestinal stromal tumors (GISTs) from other intra-abdominal tumors and GISTs molecular analysis is necessary for treatment planning, but challenging due to its rarity. The aim of this study was to evaluate radiomics for distinguishing GISTs from other intra-abdominal tumors, and in GISTs, predict the c-KIT, PDGFRA,BRAF mutational status and mitotic index (MI). All 247 included patients (125 GISTS, 122 non-GISTs) underwent a contrast-enhanced venous phase CT. The GIST vs. non-GIST radiomics model, including imaging, age, sex and location, had a mean area under the curve (AUC) of 0.82. Three radiologists had an AUC of 0.69, 0.76, and 0.84, respectively. The radiomics model had an AUC of 0.52 for c-KIT, 0.56 for c-KIT exon 11, and 0.52 for the MI. Hence, our radiomics model was able to distinguish GIST from non-GISTS with a performance similar to three radiologists, but was not able to predict the c-KIT mutation or MI.
abstract_zh: 将胃肠道间质瘤 (GIST) 与其他腹腔内肿瘤和 GIST 分子分析区分开来对于治疗计划是必要的，但由于其罕见而具有挑战性。本研究的目的是评估放射组学以区分 GIST 与其他腹内肿瘤，并在 GIST 中预测 c-KIT、PDGFRA、BRAF 突变状态和有丝分裂指数 (MI)。所有 247 名患者（125 名 GISTS，122 名非 GIST）均接受了对比增强静脉期 CT。 GIST 与非 GIST 放射组学模型（包括影像学、年龄、性别和位置）的平均曲线下面积 (AUC) 为 0.82。三位放射科医生的 AUC 分别为 0.69、0.76 和 0.84。放射组学模型的 c-KIT 的 AUC 为 0.52，c-KIT 外显子 11 的 AUC 为 0.56，MI 的 AUC 为 0.52。因此，我们的放射组学模型能够区分 GIST 和非 GISTS，其性能与三位放射科医生相似，但无法预测 c-KIT 突变或 MI。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用影像组学方法，通过CT图像区分胃肠道间质瘤（GIST）与其他腹腔肿瘤，并预测GIST的分子分型和有丝分裂指数。
AI.motivation: 胃肠道间质瘤（GIST）的分子分析对治疗方案制定至关重要，但因其罕见性，传统诊断方法存在挑战，需探索更高效的影像学分析手段。
AI.method: 纳入247例患者（125例GIST，122例非GIST），采用增强CT静脉期影像，结合影像组学特征、年龄、性别和肿瘤位置构建预测模型，并与三位放射科医生的诊断效能对比。
AI.result: 影像组学模型区分GIST与非GIST的AUC为0.82，与放射科医生的AUC（0.69-0.84）相近；但预测c-KIT突变（AUC 0.52）、c-KIT外显子11突变（AUC 0.56）和有丝分裂指数（AUC 0.52）的性能较低。
AI.conclusion: 影像组学模型可有效区分GIST与其他腹腔肿瘤，但当前方法在预测分子突变和有丝分裂指数方面表现不足，需进一步优化特征或结合其他数据。

authors_text: Faeze Brahman,Snigdha Chaturvedi
title: Modeling Protagonist Emotions for Emotion-Aware Storytelling
title_zh: 为有情感意识的故事讲述主角情感建模
comment: EMNLP 2020, update: Conference version of Weber et al. (2020) is cited
comments: EMNLP 2020, update: Conference version of Weber et al. (2020) is cited
abstract: Emotions and their evolution play a central role in creating a captivating story. In this paper, we present the first study on modeling the emotional trajectory of the protagonist in neural storytelling. We design methods that generate stories that adhere to given story titles and desired emotion arcs for the protagonist. Our models include Emotion Supervision (EmoSup) and two Emotion-Reinforced (EmoRL) models. The EmoRL models use special rewards designed to regularize the story generation process through reinforcement learning. Our automatic and manual evaluations demonstrate that these models are significantly better at generating stories that follow the desired emotion arcs compared to baseline methods, without sacrificing story quality.
summary: Emotions and their evolution play a central role in creating a captivating story. In this paper, we present the first study on modeling the emotional trajectory of the protagonist in neural storytelling. We design methods that generate stories that adhere to given story titles and desired emotion arcs for the protagonist. Our models include Emotion Supervision (EmoSup) and two Emotion-Reinforced (EmoRL) models. The EmoRL models use special rewards designed to regularize the story generation process through reinforcement learning. Our automatic and manual evaluations demonstrate that these models are significantly better at generating stories that follow the desired emotion arcs compared to baseline methods, without sacrificing story quality.
abstract_zh: 情感及其演变在创造引人入胜的故事中发挥着核心作用。在本文中，我们提出了第一个关于神经叙事中主角情感轨迹建模的研究。我们设计的方法可以生成符合给定故事标题和主角所需情感弧的故事。我们的模型包括情绪监督（EmoSup）和两个情绪强化（EmoRL）模型。 EmoRL 模型使用特殊奖励，旨在通过强化学习规范故事生成过程。我们的自动和手动评估表明，与基线方法相比，这些模型在生成遵循所需情感弧的故事方面明显更好，而且不牺牲故事质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种建模主角情感轨迹的方法，以生成符合指定情感弧线的高质量故事。
AI.motivation: 情感演变是创造引人入胜故事的关键，但现有方法难以有效建模主角情感变化轨迹。
AI.method: 设计了Emotion Supervision（EmoSup）和两种Emotion-Reinforced（EmoRL）模型，通过强化学习中的特殊奖励机制规范故事生成过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提模型在生成符合目标情感弧线的故事方面显著优于基线方法，且保持了故事质量。
AI.conclusion: 情感感知建模能有效提升故事生成质量，为神经叙事领域提供了新思路和方法。

conclusion: 情感感知建模能有效提升故事生成质量，为神经叙事领域提供了新思路和方法。
search_text: Modeling Protagonist Emotions for Emotion-Aware Storytelling 为有情感意识的故事讲述主角情感建模 Emotions and their evolution play a central role in creating a captivating story. In this paper, we present the first study on modeling the emotional trajectory of the protagonist in neural storytelling. We design methods that generate stories that adhere to given story titles and desired emotion arcs for the protagonist. Our models include Emotion Supervision (EmoSup) and two Emotion-Reinforced (EmoRL) models. The EmoRL models use special rewards designed to regularize the story generation process through reinforcement learning. Our automatic and manual evaluations demonstrate that these models are significantly better at generating stories that follow the desired emotion arcs compared to baseline methods, without sacrificing story quality. 情感及其演变在创造引人入胜的故事中发挥着核心作用。在本文中，我们提出了第一个关于神经叙事中主角情感轨迹建模的研究。我们设计的方法可以生成符合给定故事标题和主角所需情感弧的故事。我们的模型包括情绪监督（EmoSup）和两个情绪强化（EmoRL）模型。 EmoRL 模型使用特殊奖励，旨在通过强化学习规范故事生成过程。我们的自动和手动评估表明，与基线方法相比，这些模型在生成遵循所需情感弧的故事方面明显更好，而且不牺牲故事质量。 本文提出了一种建模主角情感轨迹的方法，以生成符合指定情感弧线的高质量故事。 Faeze Brahman,Snigdha Chaturvedi cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Dong Li,Sitong Chen,Xudong Liu,Yunda Sun,Li Zhang
title: Towards Optimal Filter Pruning with Balanced Performance and Pruning Speed
title_zh: 实现性能和修剪速度平衡的最佳过滤器修剪
abstract: Filter pruning has drawn more attention since resource constrained platform requires more compact model for deployment. However, current pruning methods suffer either from the inferior performance of one-shot methods, or the expensive time cost of iterative training methods. In this paper, we propose a balanced filter pruning method for both performance and pruning speed. Based on the filter importance criteria, our method is able to prune a layer with approximate layer-wise optimal pruning rate at preset loss variation. The network is pruned in the layer-wise way without the time consuming prune-retrain iteration. If a pre-defined pruning rate for the entire network is given, we also introduce a method to find the corresponding loss variation threshold with fast converging speed. Moreover, we propose the layer group pruning and channel selection mechanism for channel alignment in network with short connections. The proposed pruning method is widely applicable to common architectures and does not involve any additional training except the final fine-tuning. Comprehensive experiments show that our method outperforms many state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Filter pruning has drawn more attention since resource constrained platform requires more compact model for deployment. However, current pruning methods suffer either from the inferior performance of one-shot methods, or the expensive time cost of iterative training methods. In this paper, we propose a balanced filter pruning method for both performance and pruning speed. Based on the filter importance criteria, our method is able to prune a layer with approximate layer-wise optimal pruning rate at preset loss variation. The network is pruned in the layer-wise way without the time consuming prune-retrain iteration. If a pre-defined pruning rate for the entire network is given, we also introduce a method to find the corresponding loss variation threshold with fast converging speed. Moreover, we propose the layer group pruning and channel selection mechanism for channel alignment in network with short connections. The proposed pruning method is widely applicable to common architectures and does not involve any additional training except the final fine-tuning. Comprehensive experiments show that our method outperforms many state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 由于资源受限的平台需要更紧凑的模型来部署，过滤器修剪引起了更多关注。然而，当前的剪枝方法要么受到一次性方法性能较差的影响，要么受到迭代训练方法昂贵的时间成本的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种兼顾性能和剪枝速度的平衡滤波器剪枝方法。基于过滤器重要性标准，我们的方法能够在预设的损失变化下以近似逐层最佳剪枝率来剪枝层。网络以分层方式进行剪枝，无需耗时的剪枝重新训练迭代。如果给定整个网络的预定义剪枝率，我们还引入了一种以快速收敛速度找到相应损失变化阈值的方法。此外，我们提出了用于短连接网络中通道对齐的层组剪枝和通道选择机制。所提出的剪枝方法广泛适用于常见架构，并且除了最终微调之外不涉及任何额外的训练。综合实验表明，我们的方法优于许多最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种平衡性能与剪枝速度的滤波器剪枝方法，无需迭代训练即可实现近似层最优剪枝率。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法存在一次性方法性能差或迭代方法耗时高的问题，需在资源受限平台部署时兼顾模型压缩效率与性能。
AI.method: 基于滤波器重要性准则确定层剪枝率，通过预设损失变化阈值实现层间剪枝；引入快速收敛的全局剪枝率阈值计算方法，并提出层组剪枝与通道对齐机制以适应短连接网络结构。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个主流架构上优于现有先进剪枝技术，且无需额外训练仅需最终微调。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过理论分析与结构优化，在保证模型性能的同时显著提升剪枝效率，为资源受限场景下的模型压缩提供新思路。

authors_text: Kamrun Naher Keya,Rashidul Islam,Shimei Pan,Ian Stockwell,James R. Foulds
title: Equitable Allocation of Healthcare Resources with Fair Cox Models
title_zh: 利用公平考克斯模型公平分配医疗资源
comment: AAAI Fall Symposium on AI in Government and Public Sector (AAAI FSS-20), 2020
comments: AAAI Fall Symposium on AI in Government and Public Sector (AAAI FSS-20), 2020
abstract: Healthcare programs such as Medicaid provide crucial services to vulnerable populations, but due to limited resources, many of the individuals who need these services the most languish on waiting lists. Survival models, e.g. the Cox proportional hazards model, can potentially improve this situation by predicting individuals' levels of need, which can then be used to prioritize the waiting lists. Providing care to those in need can prevent institutionalization for those individuals, which both improves quality of life and reduces overall costs. While the benefits of such an approach are clear, care must be taken to ensure that the prioritization process is fair or independent of demographic information-based harmful stereotypes. In this work, we develop multiple fairness definitions for survival models and corresponding fair Cox proportional hazards models to ensure equitable allocation of healthcare resources. We demonstrate the utility of our methods in terms of fairness and predictive accuracy on two publicly available survival datasets.
summary: Healthcare programs such as Medicaid provide crucial services to vulnerable populations, but due to limited resources, many of the individuals who need these services the most languish on waiting lists. Survival models, e.g. the Cox proportional hazards model, can potentially improve this situation by predicting individuals' levels of need, which can then be used to prioritize the waiting lists. Providing care to those in need can prevent institutionalization for those individuals, which both improves quality of life and reduces overall costs. While the benefits of such an approach are clear, care must be taken to ensure that the prioritization process is fair or independent of demographic information-based harmful stereotypes. In this work, we develop multiple fairness definitions for survival models and corresponding fair Cox proportional hazards models to ensure equitable allocation of healthcare resources. We demonstrate the utility of our methods in terms of fairness and predictive accuracy on two publicly available survival datasets.
abstract_zh: 医疗补助等医疗保健计划为弱势群体提供了重要的服务，但由于资源有限，许多需要这些服务的个人在等候名单上最苦恼。生存模型，例如Cox 比例风险模型可以通过预测个人的需求水平来潜在地改善这种情况，然后可以使用该水平来确定等待名单的优先顺序。为有需要的人提供护理可以防止这些人被送入收容机构，从而提高生活质量并降低总体成本。虽然这种方法的好处是显而易见的，但必须注意确保优先顺序确定过程是公平的或独立于基于人口统计信息的有害陈规定型观念。在这项工作中，我们为生存模型和相应的公平 Cox 比例风险模型开发了多种公平定义，以确保医疗资源的公平分配。我们在两个公开可用的生存数据集上展示了我们的方法在公平性和预测准确性方面的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出公平的Cox比例风险模型，以实现医疗资源的公平分配。
AI.motivation: 医疗资源有限导致高需求者长期等待，传统生存模型可能引入人口统计偏见，需确保资源分配的公平性。
AI.method: 定义多种生存模型的公平性准则，构建对应的公平Cox模型框架。
AI.result: 在两个公开生存数据集上验证了方法的公平性与预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能在保证预测性能的同时实现医疗资源的公平分配。

authors_text: Zhao Chen,Jiquan Ngiam,Yanping Huang,Thang Luong,Henrik Kretzschmar,Yuning Chai,Dragomir Anguelov
title: Just Pick a Sign: Optimizing Deep Multitask Models with Gradient Sign Dropout
title_zh: 只需选择一个符号：使用梯度符号丢失优化深度多任务模型
comment: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2020
comments: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2020
abstract: The vast majority of deep models use multiple gradient signals, typically corresponding to a sum of multiple loss terms, to update a shared set of trainable weights. However, these multiple updates can impede optimal training by pulling the model in conflicting directions. We present Gradient Sign Dropout (GradDrop), a probabilistic masking procedure which samples gradients at an activation layer based on their level of consistency. GradDrop is implemented as a simple deep layer that can be used in any deep net and synergizes with other gradient balancing approaches. We show that GradDrop outperforms the state-of-the-art multiloss methods within traditional multitask and transfer learning settings, and we discuss how GradDrop reveals links between optimal multiloss training and gradient stochasticity.
summary: The vast majority of deep models use multiple gradient signals, typically corresponding to a sum of multiple loss terms, to update a shared set of trainable weights. However, these multiple updates can impede optimal training by pulling the model in conflicting directions. We present Gradient Sign Dropout (GradDrop), a probabilistic masking procedure which samples gradients at an activation layer based on their level of consistency. GradDrop is implemented as a simple deep layer that can be used in any deep net and synergizes with other gradient balancing approaches. We show that GradDrop outperforms the state-of-the-art multiloss methods within traditional multitask and transfer learning settings, and we discuss how GradDrop reveals links between optimal multiloss training and gradient stochasticity.
abstract_zh: 绝大多数深度模型使用多个梯度信号（通常对应于多个损失项的总和）来更新一组共享的可训练权重。然而，这些多次更新可能会将模型拉向相互冲突的方向，从而阻碍最佳训练。我们提出了梯度符号丢失（GradDrop），这是一种概率掩蔽过程，它根据梯度的一致性水平对激活层的梯度进行采样。 GradDrop 被实现为一个简单的深层，可以在任何深层网络中使用，并与其他梯度平衡方法协同作用。我们证明 GradDrop 在传统多任务和迁移学习设置中优于最先进的多重损失方法，并且我们讨论了 GradDrop 如何揭示最佳多重损失训练和梯度随机性之间的联系。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为GradDrop的方法，用于优化深度多任务模型中的梯度信号。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数深度模型在训练过程中使用多个梯度信号进行更新，但这些信号可能会导致模型在训练过程中出现冲突，从而影响训练效果。
AI.method: 该论文提出了一种基于梯度一致性的概率掩码方法GradDrop，通过在激活层上对梯度进行采样，以优化多任务模型的训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，GradDrop在传统的多任务和迁移学习设置中优于最先进的多损失方法，并揭示了最优多损失训练与梯度随机性之间的联系。
AI.conclusion: GradDrop是一种简单且有效的深度层，能够与其他梯度平衡方法协同工作，提升多任务模型的训练效果。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为GradDrop的方法，用于优化深度多任务模型中的梯度信号。
ai_content.motivation: 当前大多数深度模型在训练过程中使用多个梯度信号进行更新，但这些信号可能会导致模型在训练过程中出现冲突，从而影响训练效果。
ai_content.method: 该论文提出了一种基于梯度一致性的概率掩码方法GradDrop，通过在激活层上对梯度进行采样，以优化多任务模型的训练过程。

search_text: Just Pick a Sign: Optimizing Deep Multitask Models with Gradient Sign Dropout 只需选择一个符号：使用梯度符号丢失优化深度多任务模型 The vast majority of deep models use multiple gradient signals, typically corresponding to a sum of multiple loss terms, to update a shared set of trainable weights. However, these multiple updates can impede optimal training by pulling the model in conflicting directions. We present Gradient Sign Dropout (GradDrop), a probabilistic masking procedure which samples gradients at an activation layer based on their level of consistency. GradDrop is implemented as a simple deep layer that can be used in any deep net and synergizes with other gradient balancing approaches. We show that GradDrop outperforms the state-of-the-art multiloss methods within traditional multitask and transfer learning settings, and we discuss how GradDrop reveals links between optimal multiloss training and gradient stochasticity. 绝大多数深度模型使用多个梯度信号（通常对应于多个损失项的总和）来更新一组共享的可训练权重。然而，这些多次更新可能会将模型拉向相互冲突的方向，从而阻碍最佳训练。我们提出了梯度符号丢失（GradDrop），这是一种概率掩蔽过程，它根据梯度的一致性水平对激活层的梯度进行采样。 GradDrop 被实现为一个简单的深层，可以在任何深层网络中使用，并与其他梯度平衡方法协同作用。我们证明 GradDrop 在传统多任务和迁移学习设置中优于最先进的多重损失方法，并且我们讨论了 GradDrop 如何揭示最佳多重损失训练和梯度随机性之间的联系。 该论文提出了一种名为GradDrop的方法，用于优化深度多任务模型中的梯度信号。 Zhao Chen,Jiquan Ngiam,Yanping Huang,Thang Luong,Henrik Kretzschmar,Yuning Chai,Dragomir Anguelov cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Xingyao Zhang,Linjun Shou,Jian Pei,Ming Gong,Lijie Wen,Daxin Jiang
title: A Graph Representation of Semi-structured Data for Web Question Answering
title_zh: 用于网络问答的半结构化数据的图形表示
comment: Accepted as long paper in COLING 2020
comments: Accepted as long paper in COLING 2020
abstract: The abundant semi-structured data on the Web, such as HTML-based tables and lists, provide commercial search engines a rich information source for question answering (QA). Different from plain text passages in Web documents, Web tables and lists have inherent structures, which carry semantic correlations among various elements in tables and lists. Many existing studies treat tables and lists as flat documents with pieces of text and do not make good use of semantic information hidden in structures. In this paper, we propose a novel graph representation of Web tables and lists based on a systematic categorization of the components in semi-structured data as well as their relations. We also develop pre-training and reasoning techniques on the graph model for the QA task. Extensive experiments on several real datasets collected from a commercial engine verify the effectiveness of our approach. Our method improves F1 score by 3.90 points over the state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: The abundant semi-structured data on the Web, such as HTML-based tables and lists, provide commercial search engines a rich information source for question answering (QA). Different from plain text passages in Web documents, Web tables and lists have inherent structures, which carry semantic correlations among various elements in tables and lists. Many existing studies treat tables and lists as flat documents with pieces of text and do not make good use of semantic information hidden in structures. In this paper, we propose a novel graph representation of Web tables and lists based on a systematic categorization of the components in semi-structured data as well as their relations. We also develop pre-training and reasoning techniques on the graph model for the QA task. Extensive experiments on several real datasets collected from a commercial engine verify the effectiveness of our approach. Our method improves F1 score by 3.90 points over the state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: Web 上丰富的半结构化数据，例如基于 HTML 的表格和列表，为商业搜索引擎的问答 (QA) 提供了丰富的信息源。与Web文档中的纯文本段落不同，Web表格和列表具有固有的结构，这些结构承载了表格和列表中的各个元素之间的语义相关性。许多现有研究将表格和列表视为带有文本片段的平面文档，并且没有充分利用隐藏在结构中的语义信息。在本文中，我们基于对半结构化数据中的组件及其关系的系统分类，提出了一种新颖的网络表格和列表的图形表示形式。我们还开发了针对 QA 任务的图模型的预训练和推理技术。对从商业引擎收集的几个真实数据集进行的广泛实验验证了我们方法的有效性。我们的方法将 F1 分数比最先进的基线提高了 3.90 分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图表示的半结构化数据模型，用于提升网络问答系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将网页表格和列表视为扁平文本，未能有效利用其结构中的语义关联，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 通过系统分类半结构化数据组件及其关系，构建图模型，并开发预训练与推理技术以支持问答任务。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上实验验证，F1分数较现有最佳方法提升3.90点。
AI.conclusion: 图表示方法能有效挖掘半结构化数据的语义信息，显著提升网络问答效果。
